perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man with pink-dyed hair sitting at a restaurant table, gesturing toward a large sizzling steak platter in front of him. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of a piece of steak with a small black sign stuck into it. (3) The man picks up the piece of steak with his fork and takes a large bite, his expression shifting from excitement to a strained, chewing grimace. (4) Blue variety-show style graphics like a question mark and text overlays appear around him as he continues to struggle with the tough meat, eventually making a frustrated face toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop/electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone about the steak. (2) The sound of the sizzling plate is briefly audible beneath the music and speech. (3) As the man bites the steak, a slide-whistle sound effect plays, followed by the sound of him chewing and making sounds of mild struggle. (4) Cartoon-style boing and whistle sound effects are layered over his reaction as he finishes the bite and speaks in a slightly disappointed tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "這牛排真貼心 還有告示耶" (This steak is so thoughtful, there's even a sign) - excited tone. (2) Functional Text: "先吃這塊避免過熟 EAT FIRST!" (Eat this piece first to avoid overcooking) - informative tone. (3) Decorative/Hook Text: "貼心 貼心" (Thoughtful, thoughtful) - emphasizing his initial reaction. (4) Functional Text: "真的有點熟耶" (It really is a bit overdone) - observational tone. (5) Decorative Text: "真的硬硬der" (It's really tough/hard) - humorous tone. (6) Decorative Text: "北七嘎" (Idiot/Clumsy) - comedic self-deprecating tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Close-up of detail -> Eating Action -> Comedic Reaction

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action montage. It begins with a man's face framed within a small rectangular opening of a cardboard box; he has a wide-eyed, shocked expression. In the background, a man with black hair smiles broadly. (2) A series of rapid cuts follows, showing different people appearing behind the box. These include a woman screaming, a man with glasses smiling, another man with his mouth wide open, a woman with long hair shouting, and a woman wearing a black face mask. (3) The box remains the central focus throughout the sequence, with the background person changing on every beat of the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic music begins immediately, featuring a repetitive vocal sample saying 'Kenchana'. (2) A melodic 'Ding-ding-ding-ding' rhythm plays in sync with the visual cuts. (3) The vocal line and rhythmic melody continue at a constant, fast tempo until the video loops.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) No on-screen text, subtitles, or decorative captions are present.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male creator in a white sweatshirt with sunflower patterns introducing a topic, while a man in a blue hoodie and a grotesque mask stands behind him. (2) The scene shifts to the creator standing in front of a shoe cabinet; he pulls out a pair of green slippers and a pair of white fuzzy slippers to compare them, then throws the fuzzy ones into a large white trash bag. (3) The creator is shown holding a pair of expensive-looking yellow-green quilted shoes, gesturing emphatically while talking to the camera. (4) The scene transitions to a storage area where the creator pulls out large amounts of plastic bubble wrap from top shelves and throws them into the bag, expressing surprise at the volume. (5) The creator moves to an open refrigerator, pulling out a bottle of liquid and pointing to the expiration date, then finds a carton of milk and a small bottle of sauce, showing them to the camera with exaggerated facial expressions. (6) A woman in a black shirt appears, reacting to the creator's discoveries in the fridge, while the masked men stand in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice (Cai Aga) speaks very loudly and excitedly, introducing 'Duan She Li' (decluttering). (2) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'swoosh' accompany transitions. The male voice remains dominant, explaining the first concept about shoe cabinets. (3) A cash register 'cha-ching' sound effect plays when a price is mentioned. (4) Crinkling sounds of plastic bubble wrap are heard as it is moved. The male voice rises in pitch to show shock. (5) Short snippets of other voices (female and other males) are heard laughing and providing brief responses or interjections. (6) The audio ends with a humorous, fast-paced dialogue sequence and a final punchy sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '嘎哥要來教大家' (Gage is going to teach everyone) - Functional: Intro. (2) '斷捨離的奧義' (The essence of decluttering) - Decorative: Hook. (3) '觀念一：鞋櫃一進一出' (Concept 1: One in, one out for the shoe cabinet) - Functional: List. (4) '同款不同色' (Same style, different colors) - Decorative: Caption. (5) 'NT 6,000' - Functional: Price info. (6) '觀念二：越貴要越常穿' (Concept 2: The more expensive, the more often you should wear it) - Functional: List. (7) '平均成本才能下降' (So the average cost can drop) - Decorative: Logical hook. (8) '觀念三：盒子不要留' (Concept 3: Don't keep boxes) - Functional: List. (9) '觀念四：買新汰舊' (Concept 4: Buy new, discard old) - Functional: List. (10) '2024年11月26號' - Functional: Date display. (11) 'Excuse Me???' - Decorative: Emotional hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Shoe Cabinet Demo -> Storage Cleaning -> Refrigerator Audit -> Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman sitting at her office desk. A man in a black sweater approaches her, shouting and waving papers. (2) The scene shifts to a bright showroom where the man, now in a blue and white striped shirt, and the woman are standing next to a mattress. (3) The man demonstrates the stability of the mattress by placing a candle and a glass of water on it while the woman jumps or rolls beside them. (4) Close-up shots show the internal structure of the foam and the man's hands pressing into the material. (5) The man points to various promotional texts on screen while the woman lies comfortably on the bed in different positions (back, side, stomach). (6) The video concludes by cutting back to the office setting where the woman appears to have been dreaming at her desk.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a male voice shouting in a loud, comedic, and exaggerated tone. Upbeat and fast-paced background music begins immediately. (2) A female voice asks a question with a curious and clear tone. (3) The man transitions into a high-energy promotional narration style, explaining product benefits. (4) Various sound effects (SFX) are heard, including thumping sounds during the bed test and whooshing sounds for transitions. (5) The background music remains consistent in its energetic tempo throughout the demonstration. (6) The video ends with a return to the comedic shouting and office ambient sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Names of characters and subtitles for the spoken dialogue. (2) Hook/Decorative Text: '懲罰你' (Punish you) and '兩倍薪水' (Double salary) appear in large, colorful fonts during the intro skit. (3) Brand Text: '日日居 ZEZE GOOD' and product names like '三眠制釋壓床墊' appear prominently. (4) Promotional Text: '10年保固', '150天安心試睡', '6期0利率', and '57折' highlight the sales offer.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Skit Hook -> Transition to Showroom -> Product Feature Demo -> Promotion Details -> Comedic Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a red hoodie with heart patterns and a woman in a pink long-sleeved shirt stand in a white office space. The man gestures aggressively towards wooden tables and white cabinets with a shocked expression. (2) Transition to footage of a professional technician in a blue uniform and black mask kneeling to tape the floor, then using various handheld spraying devices on cabinets, walls, and in the air. Close-ups show a digital monitor reading '0.000'. (3) The man and woman return, standing in front of large wooden storage shelves. The man speaks directly to the camera, pointing emphatically and making circular hand gestures while the woman listens and nods.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male and female dialogue in Mandarin and Hokkien with a loud, theatrical tone. An upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop BGM starts immediately. (2) The dialogue shifts to a steady, professional male narrator voiceover. Sounds of mechanical spraying and air movement (SFX) are audible over the continuous music. (3) The original high-energy dialogue returns, accompanied by occasional rhythmic sound effects (dings and whooshes) and the same upbeat background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '老板娘' (Boss lady) - Functional text identifying the woman. (2) '吸毒' (Inhaling poison) - Decorative hook text in large purple font, conveying alarm. (3) '佳迪恩环保科技' (Jiadien Environmental Tech) - Functional brand name. (4) '精准去除室内甲醛' (Precisely removing indoor formaldehyde) - Functional descriptive text. (5) '保障長期健康' (Guarantee long-term health) - Functional text. (6) '客製化方案' (Customized plan) - Decorative hook text in blue. (7) '提供最专业的检测和治理方案' (Providing the most professional detection and treatment solutions) - Functional call-to-action text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Theatrical problem setup -> Technical service demonstration -> Detailed benefit explanation and call-to-action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male in a light green sweatshirt is yelling at a group of three employees (one male, two females) in an office setting. He holds a black foam stick and gestures aggressively. (2) The scene cuts between his exaggerated angry facial expressions and the neutral or confused faces of the employees. (3) The man singles out the male employee with curly hair, scolding him. Suddenly, the man pulls out a skincare product and his demeanor changes to enthusiastic. (4) Close-up shots show the male employee in a bathroom using the cleanser, toner, and serum. The textures of the creams and liquids are clearly displayed as he applies them to his face. (5) The video returns to the office where the two men talk in a friendly manner. (6) The final phase features product sets displayed on a wooden stand with fast-paced shots of the main character pointing towards promotional text.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-volume, energetic male vocals shouting in a mix of Mandarin and Taiwanese. Fast-paced, upbeat background music with a synth-pop style starts immediately. (2) Occasional short responses from a second male voice with a calmer tone. (3) The music maintains a constant rhythm while the main vocal transitions into a persuasive and fast-talking promotional style. (4) Specific sound effects (SFX) are audible during the bathroom scenes: the sound of a tube being squeezed, water splashing, and hands rubbing together. (5) In the final phase, the main vocal becomes even more rapid, emphasizing discount codes and links, accompanied by cheerful pop music and occasional 'ding' sound effects for text pop-ups.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '散漫！' (Lazy!), '點閱率那麼差嗎？' (Are the views that bad?) appearing in large, variety-show style fonts. (2) Decorative Text: '周耶嫩？' (Joe?), '你在臭我嗎？' (Are you insulting me?) with emotional stickers. (3) Product Labels: '清潔呼吸潔顏霜', '靜潤涵水平衡露', '無瑕煥肌精華', '無瑕煥肌乳霜'. (4) Call to Action: '嘎哥優惠團購中', '專屬折扣碼 yga0721', '全館免運' with high-contrast colors and bold emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Conflict -> Product Introduction -> Tutorial Demo -> Call to Action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video uses a three-tier split-screen layout. The top and bottom tiers show static group photos and short clips of a large group of people in yellow and blue baseball uniforms on a field. The middle tier features a man with glasses and a grey polo shirt speaking directly to the camera in a studio or office setting. (2) As the man speaks, he uses frequent hand gestures, including pointing and clasping his hands together. The group photos in the background tiers shift slightly, showing different poses of the 'Ar-Ga-Bang' baseball team. (3) In the final phase, the man in the middle expresses strong encouragement by raising his fists and then opening his arms wide in a gesture of appreciation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, sentimental pop-rock background music track begins immediately. A male voice speaks in Mandarin with a tone that is both earnest and slightly theatrical. (2) The vocal remains at a high volume relative to the music, maintaining a continuous flow of speech with a friendly and passionate delivery. (3) The music swells slightly toward the end as the speaker finishes his message, with a clean cut to silence at the 12-second mark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text stickers on the left side of the middle tier read '七月半' and '呱吉'. (2) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom of the middle tier, translating the spoken Mandarin: 'Aga, honestly... your existence gives me confidence in life.' (3) Emotional hook text continues with 'I know 'Do Not Watch at Work' can exist for 10 more years... so you must persevere.'

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Constant talking head in middle frame with supporting visuals on top and bottom tiers.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a sincere yet humorous tribute and message of encouragement from the creator Froggy (呱吉) to his fellow prominent YouTuber Aga (蔡阿嘎). By using a split-screen format to showcase shared team memories while delivering a monologue, the content aims to acknowledge Aga's long-term influence on the creator community and urge him to continue his work despite challenges.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man wearing a white sweatshirt with a blue graphic and grey pants is seen squatting in a snowboarding-like pose in an airport terminal. (2) He maintains this exact pose across a series of rapid cuts in different environments: a bus stop sidewalk, in front of a Starbucks, on top of a sofa at home while wearing a ski helmet, on a residential street, in a game arcade, and inside a clothing store trying on various jackets. (3) The scene shifts to a real snowy mountain where the man, now in full orange and black snowboarding gear, is lying face-down in the snow with a snowboard attached to his feet. (4) He lifts his head to look at the camera with a tired but smiling expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic, and rhythmic background music with a strong beat plays as the scenes cut rapidly. No vocals are present. (2) At the 12-second mark, as the scene shifts to the snow, the music transitions to a slower, more melodic acoustic style. (3) Soft male vocals begin singing "Nobody ever knows... nobody ever sees..." (4) Subdued ambient wind noise and the sound of snow rustling are audible in the final scene.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: "POV:當你以為滑雪很簡單" (POV: When you think snowboarding is easy) appears as a fixed orange banner at the top throughout the entire video. The tone is humorous and ironic. (2) Functional Text: Japanese signage and store titles appear briefly in the background of various scenes.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Expectation Montage -> Reality Transition -> Humorous Result

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Preparation -> Execution -> Reality Check
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create humorous content by contrasting the 'practice' of a snowboarding pose in inappropriate daily life settings with the actual difficult and tiring reality of snowboarding on a mountain. It mocks the 'POV' trend where people make things look easy, only to show the exhausted and messy reality of a beginner.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While brands like Burton and Starbucks are visible, they appear as organic background elements rather than paid placements.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Main creator consistently uses a fixed 'squat' pose throughout various cuts to maintain visual continuity.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'Expectation vs. Reality' trope, which is highly effective for engagement in short-form video platforms.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a modern kitchen where a man in a brown long-sleeved shirt (the main creator) stands behind another man in a beige t-shirt who is eating lunch at a wooden table. The main creator holds a small white packet. (2) The main creator puts on sunglasses, leans in closer to the camera with an excited expression, and presents the product packet directly to the lens while the other man continues eating. (3) The scene transitions into a stylized promotional sequence with high-contrast filters and dynamic text overlays; the main creator is seen dancing and gesturing with the product while the sitting man looks at the camera with a confused expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched and energetic male voice speaks in Mandarin, greeting the audience with a fast-paced delivery. (2) A loud, upbeat electronic pop track with a strong percussion beat starts abruptly. (3) The male vocal continues to speak enthusiastically over the music, transitioning from an explanation into a promotional pitch as the ambient kitchen silence is replaced by the high-tempo BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '很多人都在問' (Many people are asking) - Hook text. (2) '嘎哥維持身材的小秘密' (Ga-ge's little secret to maintaining his figure) - Descriptive text. (3) '因為我餐前都有吃綠蓓緹' (Because I eat Luvvitte before meals) - Functional product introduction. (4) '他沒吃' (He didn't eat it) - Humorous side note pointing to the friend. (5) '綠蓓緹 嘎哥優惠團購中' (Luvvitte, Ga-ge's discount group buy in progress) - Call-to-action text.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a static wide-angle shot of a modern apartment's living and dining area; the room is tidy with a large TV, sofa, and dining table visible. (2) At 00:07, a sudden earthquake occurs, causing the entire frame to shake violently; dust and small particles are seen falling from the ceiling while furniture and plants vibrate intensely. (3) The shaking gradually subsides around 00:20, and the scene returns to a static state with the interior layout remaining largely unchanged despite the seismic event.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a silent indoor environment with minimal background hum. (2) At 00:07, a loud, low-frequency rumbling sound starts abruptly, accompanied by the sharp, chaotic rattling of household objects and the building's structure. (3) The intense rumbling and rattling continue for approximately 12 seconds before fading out, eventually returning to the initial silence of the room.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A digital timestamp in the top-left corner reads '2025/01/21 00:17:32' and increments throughout the video, providing a factual record of the event's timing.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Steady indoor shot -> Sudden earthquake shaking -> Return to stillness

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with brown hair, wearing a blue tie-dye shirt and a colorful beaded necklace, stands on a wide, stony riverbed under an overcast sky, yelling loudly with his mouth wide open towards a bridge in the distance. (2) A yellow and orange train passes by on the distant bridge against a backdrop of mist-covered green mountains. (3) The man turns his head to look directly at the camera, rubbing his stomach with a satisfied expression and speaking enthusiastically. (4) He continues to talk to the camera while gesturing, looking energetic and happy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a long, loud, and high-pitched male yell that persists for several seconds. (2) At the end of the yell, an upbeat and bouncy background music track with a fast tempo begins. (3) A male voice speaks in a loud, energetic, and humorous tone in Mandarin/Taiwanese. (4) The sounds of a variety-show style 'ding' or 'pop' sound effect are heard as he speaks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text '喔 真飽' (Oh, so full) appears in blue with a white border as the man finishes yelling. (2) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom: '整輛自強號給他吞下去' (Swallowed the whole Tze-Chiang Limited Express train). (3) Large, stylized purple decorative text '爽' (Satisfying/Refreshing) appears next to the man's head as he smiles.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man in a black T-shirt sits at a table with a purple plush toy and books, holding a yellow apple slice which he places in his mouth. (2) He uses his lips to move the apple slice, creating an exaggerated 'duck bill' appearance and making various funny facial expressions directly to the camera. (3) The scene cuts to him holding a round waffle cracker; he performs a trick where he appears to put the whole cracker in his mouth and then retrieves it fully intact, ending with a triumphant pose holding two crackers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays as a male voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone in Mandarin. (2) Cartoonish sound effects like a duck 'quack' and a 'sproing' sound are synchronized with the man's facial movements. (3) The audio continues with 'gulping' sound effects and canned laughter as the man describes his cracker-swallowing challenge, maintaining a loud and fast-paced vocal delivery.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '1秒鐘 用蘋果變醜小鴨' - A hook title suggesting a quick transformation into a duck. (2) '呱' (Quack) and '你的上唇可以這麼靈活嗎?' (Can your upper lip be this flexible?) - Decorative and variety-style text reacting to the man's expressions. (3) '你有辦法一嘴吞 法蘭酥嗎?' (Can you swallow a waffle cracker in one bite?) and '成功!' (Success!) - Functional text describing the challenge and the result.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Duckling Gag -> Cracker Swallowing Challenge -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young man wearing a black 'Old Boy' T-shirt and a green backpack standing in front of a wooden fence at a zoo. He is smiling and gesturing towards the background. (2) The scene cuts to various animals in enclosures, starting with two monkeys on a concrete floor; one monkey jumps into the air and lands flat on its belly. (3) An alpaca with a harness looks directly into the camera with a neutral expression. (4) A small monkey with yellow-tinted fur hangs onto the wire mesh of its cage, moving its head. (5) A large orangutan is seen lying down behind a fence, appearing lethargic. (6) A gorilla sits on a rock in a grassy area, scratching its stomach while looking away. (7) The final shot shows a group of monkeys huddled together, grooming one another.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched and energetic male vocals open the video with a loud greeting '耶～歡迎來到厭世動物園' (Yeah~ welcome to the World-weary Zoo). Fast-paced, quirky background music starts. (2) The audio shifts as the same male voice adopts a deep, gravelly, and grumbling tone, providing inner monologues for the animals. Sounds of monkey screeching and ambient zoo noise are heard. (3) The music remains consistent in the background as the speaker continues the humorous narration in a variety of funny voices, mimicking a grumpy or indifferent attitude. (4) The video ends with a comical 'shing' sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '耶～歡迎來到厭世動物園' (Yeah~ welcome to the world-weary zoo) appears at the start. (2) Decorative Text: '看三小 我是草泥馬勒' (What are you looking at? I'm an alpaca) appears over the alpaca shot, conveying a defiant tone. (3) Functional Text: '放我出去' (Let me out) appears as subtitles for the orangutan, conveying a depressed tone. (4) Decorative Text: '這裡有一隻...啊 這裡又一隻' (There is one here... oh, there's another one here) appears during the monkey grooming scene.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Animal Montage -> Comedic Dubbing

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with dyed orange hair wearing a white hoodie stands in a paved outdoor park area; he looks up at the sky and then tries to put on a pair of sunglasses, but pokes himself in the right eye and covers it with his hand. (2) The scene cuts to the man sitting on the ground in the same park; he holds a plastic drink cup and tries to insert a straw into his mouth, but misses and pokes his cheek, grimacing. (3) The scene cuts to the man walking along a park path; he takes a bite out of a rice ball, then turns to the camera with a shocked expression, revealing blackened or missing front teeth while gesturing wildly with his hand toward his head.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM starts immediately. A male voice speaks in a cheerful, energetic tone. A sharp metallic 'clink' sound effect is heard, followed by a loud, high-pitched male scream of pain. (2) The male voice speaks again in the same energetic tone over the continuous BGM. A sliding sound effect followed by a 'thud' occurs, followed by another loud male scream. (3) The male voice speaks a third time as the BGM continues. A crunching sound effect is heard, followed by a very loud, distorted, and sustained male scream of frustration, ending with a comical whistle sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '太陽好大啊 來戴個太陽眼鏡好了' (The sun is so bright, let's put on sunglasses) in a cheerful tone. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '戳!' (Poke!) in yellow variety-show style font. (3) Functional Text: '口好渴啊 來喝個飲料好了' (I'm so thirsty, let's have a drink) in a neutral tone. (4) Decorative/Hook Text: '捅!' (Stab!) in yellow variety-show style font. (5) Functional Text: '哎唷 肚子有點餓 來吃個御飯糰好了' (Oh, I'm a bit hungry, let's eat a rice ball) in a casual tone. (6) Decorative/Hook Text: '啊咧!' (A-re!) in large yellow font indicating shock. (7) Functional Text: '搞什麼東西啊? なんだよ バカ 八嘎!!' (What the heck? What is it, idiot!) in a mix of Chinese and Japanese characters, conveying anger.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man in a black t-shirt stands before a red iron gate. Suddenly, an arm reaches out from behind the gate and grabs his neck. He reacts with an exaggerated wide-eyed expression and open mouth. (2) The scene repeats rapidly with various visual filters including high-contrast black and white and saturated color shifts. The man is seen being pulled or 'choked' multiple times from different angles. (3) The man looks directly at the camera with a small smile and an awkward expression while the text 'Awkward' appears. The 'ghost hand' reaches out one last time to grab him as he continues to look at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, bouncy circus-style music begins. Sudden loud choking sounds and exaggerated gasps are heard in sync with the visual grab. (2) Repetitive, high-pitched 'boing' and cartoonish 'smack' sound effects accompany each visual cut. (3) The music pauses briefly for a short, dry vocalization, then resumes with high-pitched canned laughter (female) as the man stares at the camera. The music ends on a sharp, upbeat note.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '(萬聖節) 不給糖就搗蛋大師' (Halloween Trick or Treat Master) appears at the bottom. (2) Effect Text: '抓!!' (Grab!!), '抓走' (Grabbed away), and '鬼手' (Ghost hand) appear in large, stylized fonts to emphasize the action. (3) Functional/Hook Text: '尷尬' (Awkward), '還來?' (Again?), and '無聊中年男子' (Bored middle-aged man) appear with arrows to label the man's emotional state and identity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Setup -> Repetitive Slapstick Montage -> Reaction Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a white t-shirt and a woman in a black sweatshirt are sitting across from each other at a white table, playing a fast-paced reaction game involving a bell and plastic cups. (2) The woman looks frustrated and gestures dismissively as the man stands up, brandishing a pink foam bat and speaking excitedly to the camera in a modern apartment setting. (3) The scene shifts to a montage of a white DIKE brand portable air cooler being used in various rooms: a kitchen where the woman is cooking, a living room where she is napping on a sofa, and a bedroom where she is sleeping in bed. (4) The man and woman then crouch next to the air cooler on the floor, the man points at the device's display panel and gestures toward the woman. (5) A lineup of four different white cooling appliances (portable AC, tower fan, handheld fan) is shown in a hallway. (6) The man holds a small light blue handheld fan, gesturing enthusiastically while the woman stands behind him, both looking directly at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Rapid metallic ringing sounds of a service bell accompany high-pitched, playful arguing between a male and a female voice. (2) An upbeat, fast-tempo pop-style background music track fades in as the male voice becomes loud, energetic, and takes on a rhythmic, sales-pitch tone. (3) The male voice narrates product features with a professional but highly excited cadence, occasionally punctuated by subtle 'whoosh' sound effects during scene transitions. (4) A short dialogue segment occurs between the man and woman with a balanced vocal ratio over the music. (5) The male voice returns to a high-energy delivery for a final promotional offer, ending with a sharp, enthusiastic closing statement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional white and yellow subtitles at the bottom of the screen translate the spoken Chinese dialogue throughout the video. (2) Large, stylized decorative hook text appears in the center-left: '天氣太熱' (The weather is too hot) and '真的有問題!' (There's really a problem!) in bold red and yellow fonts. (3) Product-specific labels and feature text appear during the montage: 'DIKE多功能移動式瞬涼水冷氣', '免安裝', '廚房', '客廳', '臥室', '250瓦', '優惠中'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Game -> Problem/Conflict (Heat) -> Solution (Product Showcase) -> Technical Details -> Group Buy Offer/CTA

It uses a comedic opening 'game' to establish a high-energy mood, then pivots to the 'problem' of summer heat making people irritable. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a colorful polka-dot vest and a striped shirt stands in a brightly lit room next to a clothing rack, holding a pair of light blue shorts. He puts on sunglasses with a confident expression. (2) He stands behind a seated woman, both wearing 'HAHABABY' branded shirts; he puts on sunglasses again and points at her while she smiles. (3) He kneels on a round rug next to the woman on a grey sofa; they hold hands as he puts on sunglasses and stares intensely at the lens. (4) He points at the woman's arm while standing by a white table, then moves close to the camera while wearing sunglasses. (5) Fast cuts follow showing various bottles and tubes of Bayer products (Bepanthen and Berocca), with close-ups of hands applying lotion to an arm. (6) The man sits at a table with an array of the products displayed, gesturing towards them and the camera while speaking excitedly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. A male voice speaks in a very fast, enthusiastic, and high-pitched tone, almost like a variety show host. (2) Sharp sound effects (SFX) like 'dings' or 'whooshes' emphasize visual transitions and his movements with the sunglasses. (3) The male voice continues a dense narration, transitioning from playful banter with the woman to a more structured, rhythmic presentation of product benefits. (4) The audio maintains a high volume and fast tempo until the end, concluding with a final energetic pitch.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你說沒人叫你小北鼻' (You say no one calls you little baby) - Humorous hook. (2) '那是因為 你沒穿 Hahababy' (That's because you didn't wear Hahababy) - Brand hook. (3) '為什麼現在稱呼你 都要加個您' (Why do people call you 'Nin' now?) - Playful text. (4) '哈妮的皮膚很乾澀 嘎哥推薦你要用拜耳' (Honey's skin is dry, Ga-ge recommends Bayer) - Functional endorsement. (5) 'Bayer Bepanthen® 護膚系列產品' - Functional product title. (6) '添加維他命B5 益生元' - Technical product features. (7) '嘎哥團購中' (Ga-ge group buy in progress) - Call to action hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro skits with a partner -> Transition to product benefit explanation -> Direct group-buy call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a POV shot showing a vast, snowy ski slope with a wooden building and a large lake in the background under a bright sky. (2) The camera pans backwards to reveal the main character, a woman in a yellow snowboarding jacket and white helmet, as she snowboards downhill. Two other snowboarders are visible in the background. (3) She continues to snowboard while holding the camera, looking back at it and then toward the path. (4) Suddenly, she loses balance, the camera tilts wildly toward the sky and then into the snow, ending with a close-up of her face covered in snow as she laughs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Heavy wind noise and the distinct scraping sound of a snowboard on packed snow dominate the audio. A female voice speaks in Mandarin, excitedly challenging viewers to see how shaky the filming is while snowboarding. (2) The sound of wind and snow continues at a steady pace. (3) A sudden loud 'Ah!' is heard, followed by a soft thud and the muffled sound of impact with snow. (4) The video concludes with the sounds of the woman laughing and catching her breath.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：當你以為邊滑雪邊自拍很簡單' (POV: When you think it's easy to take a selfie while skiing) is displayed as a hook at the top of the screen throughout the video. It carries a humorous and relatable tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young boys in matching brown boba tea-patterned pajamas are sitting on a wooden bench or table in a modern living room, watching a large TV screen. The TV shows a live broadcast of fireworks at the Taipei 101 building. (2) A woman in a pink tracksuit enters the frame from the left, holding a smartphone to record the TV and the children; she raises her hand in excitement. (3) The camera pans around the room, showing a white sofa, a Christmas tree in the background, and a reflection of the mother filming in the window. (4) The younger boy stands up, points at the TV screen as the fireworks change to a vibrant green color, and then turns to look at the camera with a wide, joyful smile and laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy Mandarin pop music with a male vocalist plays continuously. (2) High-pitched cheering and 'Woo!' sounds from both the children and an adult woman are heard clearly over the music. (3) The acoustic environment is dominated by the TV audio and the immediate room's reactions, creating a festive atmosphere. (4) No distinct ambient noise or Foley effects are heard, just the synthesized pop track and vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'TVBS HD LIVE' is displayed in the top right corner of the TV screen throughout the video. (2) Functional Text: '2023 TAIPEI' and Chinese characters related to the New Year countdown appear on the lower left of the TV broadcast. (3) Functional Text: 'SHIN KONG MITSUKOSHI' logo appears briefly as a sponsor on the TV screen.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a continuous scene of children reacting to a New Year's Eve firework broadcast on TV.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man wearing headphones and a green shirt (influencer Cai Aga) sitting in a studio-like environment, speaking animatedly and gesturing with his hands. (2) The scene cuts to two women sitting together on a couch, listening to him; they smile and laugh. (3) A transition shows a person in a red hoodie and a large, cartoonish yellow-faced mask sitting on a brown leather couch, participating in the conversation. (4) The video continues with rapid cuts between the man, the two women, and the masked figure as they engage in a lively discussion with exaggerated facial expressions and gestures. (5) The final shot shows the studio blurred out with a text box directing viewers to a YouTube channel.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice (Mandarin) starts the video with an inquisitive and upbeat tone, followed by higher-pitched female voices responding in a casual, conversational manner. (2) As the conversation progresses, frequent bursts of group laughter and lighthearted banter are heard. (3) There are subtle sound effects added for comedic emphasis, such as 'boing' sounds or canned laughter overlays. (4) The speech density is high, with overlapping voices reflecting a group discussion. (5) The background has a clean studio-quality acoustic with no significant environmental noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text in the form of traditional Chinese subtitles appears at the bottom of the screen to translate the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative hook text and emotional stickers occasionally appear near the speakers to emphasize specific words like 'OK!' or names like '洪嘉琳'. (3) At the end, functional text appears: '完整影片請上蔡阿嘎543頻道收看', which is a call to action for the main channel.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Group Discussion -> Reaction -> Call to Action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man sits on a closed toilet seat in a bathroom, wearing a pink sweatshirt and dark pants, intently looking at his smartphone. Text at the top reads 'POV: When wife asks you to take care of the kids'. (2) He switches to playing an orange handheld gaming console, leaning forward with a focused expression. (3) He then switches to reading a book with a portrait on the cover. (4) Suddenly, he stands up and begins a frantic cleaning sequence: he wipes the toilet lid, scrubs the bathtub with a sponge, uses a squeegee on the wall tiles, and wipes the bathroom mirror with a cloth, moving with exaggerated speed and a panicked facial expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, slightly whimsical orchestral music begins with a steady tempo featuring piano and woodwinds. No vocals detected. (2) Short, rhythmic sound effects of scrubbing and wiping enter, synchronized with the man's cleaning movements. (3) The background music continues at a consistent pace until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'POV：當老婆叫你顧小孩 / When wife asks you to take care of the kids' appears in a brown bar at the top, setting a relatable and humorous hook. (2) Functional Text: The book title on the cover is partially visible but primarily serves as a prop.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The man transitions from idling on the toilet with various distractions to a frantic, high-speed cleaning montage.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a blue sweatshirt sitting on a brown leather sofa, holding papers and speaking with an amused expression. (2) At 00:09, the scene cuts to a woman with long black hair wearing headphones and a grey sweatshirt, laughing heartily while sitting on another section of the sofa. (3) At 00:11, a man in a red sweater appears, gesturing while talking. (4) From 00:14 to 00:30, the camera cuts between the man in blue telling a story and the woman's reactions; at 00:30, a comedic visual effect shows multiple transparent layers of the man's face as he acts out a scream. (5) At 00:32, a person with short curly hair and glasses in a black turtleneck sweater takes over the narrative, speaking expressively with hand gestures. (6) The video concludes with a white end screen containing text and an animated mask icon covering the speaker's face.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male voice describing a long-term struggle with skin issues (folliculitis) affecting a person named 'Adan'. (2) Frequent bursts of high-pitched female laughter are heard in the background. (3) A second male voice asks a clarifying question about physical discomfort. (4) The first male voice recounts a painful experience of riding a bike with the condition, accompanied by exaggerated sound effects and a loud, comical scream at 00:30. (5) A third voice (female, slightly deep) begins a new anecdote about a hospital visit, recounting a confusing dialogue with a doctor regarding their identity and an awkward medical examination request. (6) The soundscape is dense with overlapping speech, laughter, and studio-quality vocal clarity.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom center, tracking the spoken dialogue. (2) At 00:09 and 00:11, decorative captions like '就是釘子戶' (just a nail house/stubborn resident) and '阿丹走走會磨到嗎' (Will Adan's walking cause friction?) appear for emphasis. (3) From 00:54 to the end, full-screen text appears: '完整影片請上大頭佛工作室頻道收看' (Watch the full video on the Big Head Buddha Studio channel), functioning as a Call to Action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows an 'Interview/Talk Show' flow where speakers recount humorous personal anecdotes followed by group laughter and a promotional outro.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a male and a female character sitting at a desk indoors, both wearing matching orange jumpsuits; they are looking at papers. (2) The man, Tsai Aga, begins reacting with exaggerated shock, opening his mouth wide and looking intensely at the documents. (3) A graphic overlay of a Wikipedia page and a long text block appears over the scene as the man gestures aggressively, slamming the papers on the desk. (4) The editing switches between close-ups of the man's angry, funny facial expressions and medium shots where he points at the camera or looks at his colleague. (5) The man continues to shout and gesture with a mix of papers and his hands until the final comedic punchline.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A calm female voice reads a narrative in Mandarin. (2) A male voice suddenly interrupts with a loud, high-pitched Japanese shout 'Chotto Matte!', followed by rapid, high-volume speaking in a mix of Mandarin and Hokkien. (3) Fast-paced, upbeat comedic music begins, featuring electronic beats and variety-show style sound effects like 'boing' and impact noises. (4) The male voice remains energetic and loud, yelling and hitting the table, which creates percussive thuds. (5) The audio ends with the man's loud delivery of a joke followed by a brief silence or musical tail.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text appears in a white box on the left, telling a story about a boss's success versus an employee's frustration. (2) Decorative hook text '鳩都媽得' (Chotto Matte!) pops up in large yellow characters. (3) Variety-show style captions like '2014年', '百萬訂閱' (Million subscribers), and '很夯 很紅' appear to emphasize the man's energetic claims. (4) Decorative text '三高風險' (Triple high risk) appears in large red and white font as a punchline.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Reading intro -> Shocked interruption -> Angry/Comedic debunking -> Punchline

(5) The video ends with him still running and shouting in an empty, minimalist room.

(3) The shouting is continuous, with the male voice expressing shock and distress through sustained yells and short, frantic phrases. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male creator in a white t-shirt standing on a street in Okinawa, Japan, excitedly introducing the goal of the trip. (2) Transitions to several team members attempting to put on tight black wetsuits by a pool; one female member struggles significantly, while others laugh and stretch. (3) On-screen interviews are conducted with various female team members and a male instructor wearing glasses, expressing their anxiety and determination. (4) The scene shifts underwater, showing the team diving in murky water, making hand signals and holding hands for safety. (5) Post-dive, members are seen back on land, still in wetsuits, drinking water and sharing their stressful but successful experiences.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, fast-paced upbeat music plays as a high-pitched male voice introduces the setting with excitement. (2) Sounds of laughter and playful chatter are heard as people struggle with their wetsuits, accompanied by the constant background music. (3) Clear, direct vocal recordings of different female speakers and one male speaker during interview segments, with the BGM lowering slightly in volume. (4) Underwater muffled sounds, bubbles, and regulator breathing noises become prominent during the diving scenes. (5) The music swells back to a high volume as the group celebrates finishing their dive, with many overlapping voices expressing relief.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Japan OKINAWA' and '考潛水證照' (Taking diving certification) are shown to establish context. (2) Decorative Text: '這裡好像有困難...' (Looks like there's some difficulty...) and variety-show style stickers like '好夯喔' (So hot) appear to highlight funny moments. (3) Functional Text: '好像在演一場災難片' (Feels like acting in a disaster movie) and '對自己的空氣剩餘量感到焦慮' (Anxious about the remaining air) narrate the participants' internal states during the challenge.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action vlog. A male creator in a white sweater with sunflower patterns is in a living room, talking excitedly to a woman in a dark jumpsuit and a person wearing a yellow bald mask. He holds a white trash bag and a child's drawing. (2) Scene transitions to a hallway where he holds a pink yoga mat and a black duffel bag, yelling at the woman while flame effects appear behind him. (3) He moves to a kitchen area, opening a cabinet overflowing with paper bags and reactively pointing at the clutter. (4) In a bedroom setting, he pulls out a small two-tone t-shirt from a messy wardrobe, confronts another character, and throws the shirt at the woman's head. (5) Back in the living room, he stands by a TV cabinet, pulling out bubble wrap from a high shelf and screaming at the camera with dramatic red light and text overlays.

A high-pitched, energetic male voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin, occasionally punctuated by a female voice's brief response. (2) Loud 'whoosh' and impact sound effects (SFX) occur during scene transitions. The male voice becomes louder and more aggressive, sounding like a mock-lecture. (3) Sound of paper bags crinkling is heard clearly. The music remains consistent in tempo. (4) Fabric rustling sounds as clothes are handled. A second male voice is heard briefly. (5) The main male voice reaches a peak volume, shouting emphatically. The music reaches a crescendo with a final 'boom' SFX as the video ends.

(No!) appears in large, bold red characters for emphasis. (4) '觀念七：興趣用品斷捨離' (Concept 7: Declutter hobby items) marks a new section. (5) '你去多久沒露營???' (How long since you went camping???) acts as a hook. (6) '紙袋山石流' (Paper bag landslide) appears during the kitchen scene. (7) '你頭殼裝屎喔' (Is your head full of s**t?) appears in stylized orange font during the final outburst.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an indoor gaming center where two young boys are standing in front of a green screen; a large vertical screen shows a game where digitized versions of the boys fall from the sky and stack on a platform. (2) As the boys strike various poses—hugging, lying down, and lifting each other—the game captures these silhouettes and drops them into the stack. (3) A fast-paced montage follows, showing the boys repeatedly trying to create the tallest stack without the figures falling off. (4) The boys are seen laughing, rolling on a green mat, and looking increasingly exhausted. (5) The video ends with one of the boys lying flat on the mat, looking tired but happy, with his digital avatar mimicking him on the screen.

(2) Two young children's voices are heard throughout, speaking excitedly in Mandarin, shouting instructions like 'move closer' and laughing as they play. (3) Frequent sound effects from the game are heard, including 'dings' for success, 'pops' for new items falling, and fanfares for high scores. (4) Ambient noise is minimal, but the slight echo suggests a large, open indoor space. (5) Towards the end, the volume of the boys' voices stays high but their tone shifts to a more panting, exhausted state.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young boys in matching pajamas are standing in a hotel room. One boy with glasses is listening to the other boy tell a story. They both laugh and the camera zooms in. (2) The scene cuts to them attempting a new joke. The boy with glasses stands still while the other boy walks around him. The storytelling is interrupted as they realize a mistake was made in the joke's setup. (3) The boy with glasses gets down on his knees, and then stands back up to reset. An adult hand briefly enters the frame to adjust the boy's clothes. (4) 'TAKE 2' starts. The boys repeat the joke about bananas walking on the road. One boy pretends to slip and falls onto a white bed, and both boys burst into intense laughter, rolling on the bed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Playful, upbeat background music starts. Two young male voices are heard speaking Chinese in an excited, high-pitched tone. (2) Sudden sound effects (SFX) like a cartoon 'boing' and laughter tracks are layered over the boys' natural laughter. (3) An adult male voice off-screen says 'Action' and 'Take 2' to direct the kids. (4) The audio concludes with a mixture of the boys' genuine high-pitched laughter and the continuing cheerful BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Chinese translating the boys' jokes about fish memory and bananas. (2) Decorative Text: 'ACTION' appears in a stylized font at the start. 'TAKE 2 action' appears during the reset. (3) Effect Text: Captions like '哈哈哈' (Hahaha) and emoji-surrounded phrases like '🔥前面的香蕉好熱哦🔥' (The banana in front is so hot) appear to emphasize punchlines.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro joke -> Failed joke attempt/Reset -> Successful joke delivery and laughter

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action recording. It begins with a first-person perspective shot walking through a park toward a wooden fence. On the fence sits an orange shopping bag and a yellow paper bag decorated with colorful smiley face stickers. (2) The camera moves closer to the bags, zooming in and out slightly while shaking. (3) At approximately 34 seconds, a young man with brown hair, wearing a yellow and white polo shirt and blue jeans, enters the frame from the right. He gestures aggressively toward the bags and speaks directly into the camera or at someone just out of view. (4) He continues to point at the objects and pace slightly until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice is heard immediately, shouting in a loud, confrontational tone using a mix of Mandarin and Taiwanese Hokkien. Ambient sounds of an outdoor park, including wind and distant movement, are audible in the background. (2) The shouting continues throughout the entire duration, with the speaker sounding increasingly agitated and repetitive. (3) No background music or intentional sound effects are present; the soundscape consists entirely of the vocal rant and natural ambient field noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '欸' (Hey) appears as a large hook. (2) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue such as '不要吸啦' (Don't smoke it), '那個電子菸 不要吸啦' (That electronic cigarette, don't smoke it), '丟掉' (Throw it away), and '要報警了喔' (I'm going to call the police). (3) Decorative Text: Ironic blessings appear in large white font like '身體健康 萬事如意' (Good health and prosperity) and '恭喜發財 蛇年行大運' (Happy New Year), contrasting with the angry shouting. (4) Functional Text: '那個是二級毒品耶' (That's a category 2 drug) appears at the very end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Focus on stationary objects -> Creator enters frame to confront unseen subject.

(2) He begins to pull the bags out one by one, and a large quantity of them begins to cascade down, falling past the oven onto the floor. His facial expression is one of exaggerated shock and amusement. (3) He reaches into the higher shelves of the cabinet, causing even more bags from various retailers to tumble out in a continuous stream. (4) The man stands amidst the pile of bags covering the kitchen floor, gesturing towards the mess with his arms wide and a wide smile, as hands of an off-screen person are seen briefly near the cabinet.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, loud male voice begins speaking in a Chinese dialect with an excited and mocking tone. Background laughter from at least two other individuals is audible. (2) The continuous rustling sound of paper and plastic bags being moved and falling is heard clearly. (3) The main male voice shouts phrases repeatedly with increasing volume and excitement, accompanied by loud bursts of laughter and cheering from the off-screen group. (4) The rustling sound stops as the bags finish falling, leaving only the man's continued loud speech and the fading sounds of laughter.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male creator in a green t-shirt enters the frame holding chopsticks, excitedly challenging a female creator in an olive hoodie. (2) Three small white bowls containing different types of cooked cephalopods (squid, neritic squid, and squid) are lined up on a white counter. (3) The female creator uses chopsticks to taste from the bowls while the male creator gestures wildly, shouting and pointing at his watch. (4) The male creator shifts to a promotional stance, giving a thumbs up and pointing towards the camera as graphic overlays appear. (5) A smartphone screen is shown, scrolling through the 'Taiwan Mobile' website highlighting 5G and fiber optic plans. (6) The male creator holds the phone while the female creator eats in the background. (7) Both creators stand together in the kitchen setting, performing a synchronized dance with finger hearts and thumbs-up gestures as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately as a male voice shouts excitedly with a high-pitched, energetic tone. (2) The male voice explains a game involving identifying squid while the female voice responds with brief, curious inquiries. (3) As the game begins, the male voice increases in speed and volume, shouting 'Faster!' repeatedly, accompanied by a ticking clock sound effect. (4) The audio transitions to a more structured promotional tone as the male voice describes telecom benefits, with 'cha-ching' cash register sound effects interspersed. (5) Background music remains energetic but slightly lower in volume to favor the clear, professional narration about data plans. (6) The video concludes with the male voice shouting a brand slogan followed by both characters making light vocalizations of excitement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Zhang Ta-ke is here' - Hook text indicating the start of a character bit. (2) 'Play an octopus game with you' - Functional text explaining the premise. (3) 'Squid, Neritic Squid, Squid' - Functional labels for the three bowls. (4) '10 Seconds' - Effect text emphasizing the time limit. (5) 'Taiwan Mobile "Good Speed Double" is fastest' - Promotional hook text. (6) '5G Mobile + Fiber Wi-Fi 6' - Functional text describing the product. (7) 'Netflix + Disney+ + MyVideo Max' - Branding text for included services. (8) '$500/month' - Price information. (9) 'Taiwan Mobile - Great Possibilities' - Brand slogan.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Game Challenge -> High-Pace Tasting -> Transition to Telecom Ad -> Detailed Plan Explanation -> Outro Celebration.

(2) A sharp 'boing' sound effect accompanies the toilet toy popping up, followed by a woman's brief scream and subsequent laughter. (3) The audio remains dominated by the fast-paced, synchronized dialogue between the man and woman as they unbox products. Various 'ding' and 'shimmer' sound effects are used to highlight the reveal of rare items. The music increases slightly in volume during the final promotional announcement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) An elderly man in a white polo shirt and blue slacks is enthusiastically singing into a microphone and dancing on a stage with several children. (3) The video returns to the elderly man on stage, with a digital meter labeled 'E-person index' appearing on screen, indicating a high level of extroversion. (4) A young man in a black suit enters the stage to try and lead the elderly man away, but the man playfully shakes him off and continues his performance. (5) The camera returns to the group at the table, where the woman in the black hat speaks directly to the camera with a playful and humorous expression.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male creator (GaGe) standing on a street in Tokyo, wearing a white polo shirt and a red crossbody bag, talking excitedly to the camera. (2) Chronological montage of various pedestrians walking through the Omotesando district, showcasing their personal styles. (3) GaGe sits on a bench with two women, showing them photos of passersby on his smartphone and engaging in a humorous discussion while gesturing frequently. (4) The scene shifts to a shoe store where another male (Zonghan) examines sneakers; later, they move to a hat shop where GaGe helps Zonghan try on a black cap and sunglasses in front of a mirror. (5) The final phase is a fast-paced montage of the two men trying on different jackets and outfits in a boutique, with some shots partially blurred to create a teaser effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy BGM with a fast tempo starts immediately. A male voice (GaGe) speaks in a loud, enthusiastic, and high-pitched tone in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects (SFX) like camera shutters and 'bling' sounds are synced with on-screen text and photo appearances. (3) A mix of male and female voices is heard during a group conversation, characterized by frequent laughter and overlapping speech. (4) In the store scenes, ambient background noise of a retail environment is audible under the BGM, while the dialogue focuses on fashion advice. (5) The music swells in volume towards the end, shifting to a more rhythmic 'reveal' style track as the clothing montage plays out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional and Hook Text: '學路人穿搭' (Learn to dress like passersby) and '東京 表參道' (Tokyo, Omotesando) appear in large, stylized green fonts to set the scene. (2) Decorative Text: '路人穿搭探討' (Discussion on passersby outfits) appears as a header during the street observation segments. (3) Humorous Labels: '宗翰頭髮保衛戰' (Zonghan's hair defense war) and '請你脫離舒適圈' (Please step out of your comfort zone) are shown with emotional stickers to emphasize the comedic tone. (4) Functional Text: Standard white subtitles provide a literal translation of the spoken Mandarin dialogue throughout the entire video.

(3) A bright white visual flash effect centers on their point of contact, briefly obscuring the frame. (4) The flash clears to reveal a single man in the center of the frame dressed as a Buddhist monk in a yellow inner robe and red outer sash, holding a golden staff and striking a martial arts pose.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Two energetic male voices shout 'Fu... sion...' in unison over quiet ambient outdoor noise. (2) The voices culminate in a loud, sharp shout of 'Ha!' accompanied by a 'whoosh' sound effect. (3) A magical, shimmering sound effect (SFX) plays during the visual transition flash. (4) The monk character makes a brief vocal grunt as he strikes his final pose, followed by the fading magical chime.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) None

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with bleached hair wearing a maroon hoodie performs Wing Chun hand gestures in front of a shelf filled with collectibles. (2) He transitions into aggressive martial arts punches and strikes towards the camera with an exaggerated, fierce expression. (3) The scene cuts to him 'fighting' an individual wearing a chimpanzee mask and a plaid vest; the man is repeatedly slapped in the face by the chimpanzee. (4) The man stops the fight, looking dizzy and distressed, holding his head while pleading for the hitting to stop.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat music starts. A male voice speaks loudly and confidently in a mix of Cantonese and Mandarin, introducing himself as a martial arts master. (2) Rapid, rhythmic percussion SFX accompany his punches. (3) Sharp 'slap' SFX play in quick succession as he is hit. (4) The music continues as the male voice shifts to a high-pitched, desperate, and humorous tone, pleading for mercy while ambient room quiet remains in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '是的 我是正宗詠春 賣問' (Yes, I am authentic Wing Chun Mai Wen). Tone: Boastful. (2) Functional Text: '師承 陳華順 葉問' (Taught by Chen Huashun, Ip Man). Tone: Proud. (3) Decorative Text: '喝!' (Heh!) and '叫你賣問 你還問?' (I told you 'Mai Wen', you still ask?). Tone: Aggressive/Mocking. (4) Functional Text: '不要再打了 再打就腦震盪了' (Stop hitting, any more and I'll have a concussion). Tone: Humorous and desperate.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with martial arts demo -> Comedic conflict with a masked character -> Humorous defeat.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young boy in brown patterned pajamas stands in a bright, modern apartment hallway holding a white piece of paper. He smiles and laughs while looking at the camera. (2) He places the paper, which has the Chinese character for 'Year' written on it, onto the light-wood floor. He proceeds to step and jump over it, looking back at the camera with a joyful expression. (3) A woman in a pink tracksuit and face mask appears, followed by the boy who is now wearing sunglasses. They both take turns stepping over the paper on the floor. (4) The camera follows them into a living room area where they cheer with arms raised in celebration. Hands of a third person enter the frame to high-five or gesture wildly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) No background music is present. High-pitched child's laughter and a male adult's voice are heard in conversation. The male's voice is encouraging and amused. (2) The child repeatedly says '跨年' (stepping over the year) and laughs. The adult male provides commentary and laughs loudly. (3) As the woman appears, her voice joins in, also saying '跨年'. (4) The audio reaches a peak of excitement with multiple voices shouting '新年快樂' (Happy New Year) accompanied by the sounds of clapping and frantic hand movements hitting the air.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: The handwritten character '年' (Year) appears on the paper on the floor, intended to represent the concept of a year. (2) Decorative Text: Simple drawings around the character '年' on the paper, adding a festive and creative tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Pun Setup -> Demonstration -> Group Celebration

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young boys are seen at a wooden table, enthusiastically counting large stacks of New Taiwan Dollar bills (1000 and 100 denominations). Several red envelopes are scattered on the table. (2) The boys organize the cash and carefully place it into the red envelopes. They share smiles and looks of excitement. (3) The scene shifts to the boys leaving; one boy carries the other on his back inside an elevator, both wearing helmets and jackets. (4) They arrive at a bank's ATM area. The older boy inserts the cash into the machine while the younger one watches intently. (5) After the deposit, they check a bank book and pose happily with a woman for the camera, showing a peace sign.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo Japanese-style pop music begins immediately and remains consistent throughout the video. (2) No clear human speech or vocals are heard from the main characters over the music. (3) Faint ambient sounds of the bank and ATM mechanical movements are audible in the background but are largely masked by the BGM. (4) The music reaches a final upbeat crescendo as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional/Hook Text: "POV：回台北第一件事。馬上存紅包" (POV: First thing returning to Taipei. Immediately deposit red envelopes). This text remains on screen throughout the video with an enthusiastic tone. (2) Decorative Text: Red envelopes on the table feature traditional Chinese characters for "Great Fortune and Great Profit."

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in an orange hoodie and a woman in a red hoodie stand behind a table full of Chinese New Year dishes, including a large king crab and whole fish. They wave and gesture enthusiastically at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to focus on four bottles of 'OKASANG' drinks arranged on the table; the man picks up a black bottle to show the label. (3) The woman holds two different flavored bottles, pointing to their labels as she talks. (4) Close-up shot of a yellowish liquid being poured from an 'OKASANG' bottle into a crystal glass, followed by the woman drinking it with a satisfied expression. (5) The man presents several boxes of 'Red Dates Extract', holding them up and pointing to the packaging. (6) Both characters hold the red product boxes and a red gift bag, waving and smiling to the camera in a festive finale.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat, and celebratory music plays as a male and female voice shout greetings simultaneously in an excited, high-pitched tone. (2) The male voice takes the lead, speaking Mandarin with high energy and occasional Hokkien phrases, describing the food and transitioning to the drinks. (3) The female voice joins in, her tone bright and persuasive as she describes the taste and health benefits of specific flavors. (4) Background music maintains a steady, rhythmic beat with occasional sound effects (pops/chimes) syncing with on-screen text appearances. (5) The audio concludes with a synchronized cheer from both speakers over a festive musical crescendo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '祝大家新年快樂' (Happy New Year to everyone!) appears in festive red and yellow, establishing a celebratory tone. (2) 'OKASANG' brand name and '0卡桑' (0 calorie) are displayed prominently during product shots. (3) '成分天然' (Natural ingredients) and '30杯的紅棗茶' (Equivalent to 30 cups of red date tea) are used as decorative hooks to emphasize health benefits. (4) '新年快樂' (Happy New Year) reappears at the end in large, bold font.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Festive Greeting) -> Product Demo (Drinks) -> Tasting/Experience -> Supplementary Product (Extract) -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in the morning on a snowy slope. (2) Transition to the afternoon; the girl is now shown successfully gliding down the slope. She demonstrates significant progress, making turns and performing small hops on the board while maintaining her balance. (3) The sequence continues with shots of her navigating the ski resort terrain with confidence, followed by other snowboarders in the background. (4) The video concludes with a close-up of the girl smiling at the camera, showing a sense of accomplishment.

(2) A male vocal enters, rapping with an energetic and confident tone. (3) Throughout the video, the sound of the snowboard scraping against the snow and ice is intermittently audible underneath the music. (4) The music remains constant until the end of the clip, maintaining a high-energy atmosphere.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a direct-response commercial featuring popular Taiwanese YouTuber Cai Aga. The ultimate goal is to promote a Mother's Day sale for DIKE brand kitchen appliances (specifically the dishwasher, food waste disposer, and pressure cooker). It uses high-energy humor and a 'problem-solution' narrative (manual dishwashing vs. automated dishwasher) to encourage viewers to purchase via a group-buy link.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The characters explicitly demonstrate the product's functions, mention the brand name repeatedly, and provide specific discount information and a call to action.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature exaggerated facial expressions and fast-paced, high-volume delivery style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges entertainment and advertising by using the influencer's established comedy persona to pitch household appliances.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with brown hair, wearing a white patterned long-sleeve shirt and a red cross-body bag, sits in an airport gate area, gesturing and pointing at the camera while speaking. (2) He is then shown sitting alone in a completely empty, large airport waiting hall. (3) He enters a clean train car with a large yellow suitcase and proceeds to sit in a corner seat by the window. (4) He stands outdoors in a grassy park near a traditional Japanese-style building, holding a bag and talking. (5) In a clothing store, he holds up a white sweater and then a pair of light-wash denim pants, making facial expressions as if debating or mocking a shopping partner. (6) At night, he walks along a street with neon signs and lanterns, stopping in front of a restaurant entrance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy male vocals begin immediately in Mandarin, accompanied by an upbeat, electronic background track with a steady beat. (2) The vocal track remains dominant throughout, with brief pauses for rhythmic sound effects during scene transitions. (3) Subtle ambient noises like the faint hum of a train and the muffled chatter of a street appear at very low levels under the music and narration. (4) The audio concludes with a final energetic sentence and the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '這集就是I人獨旅的精髓攻略奧義' (This episode is the essence/strategy of solo travel for introverts) - Excited tone. (2) Decorative Text: '1人獨旅教科書' (Solo travel textbook) - Informative tone. (3) Functional Text: '要在沒人的候機室等待' (Wait in an empty waiting room) - Instructive tone. (4) Functional Text: '電車選最邊邊的位置' (Choose the corner seat on the train) - Practical tone. (5) Decorative Text: '真獨旅 連景點都直接包場' (Real solo travel, even attractions are empty) - Boastful tone. (6) Functional Text: '可以跳過女裝的部分' (Can skip the women's clothing section) - Humorous tone. (7) Functional Text: '喜歡就買嘛 不用Care人家想法' (If you like it, buy it; no need to care about others' thoughts) - Decisive tone. (8) Functional Text: '還有自助點餐的店家' (Also restaurants with self-service ordering) - Enthusiastic tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Traveling alone -> Shopping alone -> Eating alone -> Outro

(3) He then showcases a green utility jacket, a red bomber jacket with 'Gap Standard' printed on the back, and a light purple sweatshirt while holding a promotional flyer. (4) The sequence continues with a peach sweatshirt featuring an 'HH' logo and a beige/white color-blocked outdoor jacket. No vocals are present. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume and tempo throughout the montage of outfit changes. (3) Towards the end of the video, a clear, melodic male vocal enters singing the phrase 'Nobody ever knows...' as the subject appears with his shopping bags. The audio is high-quality and sounds like a studio recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Effect Text: 'GAP Standard' appears in white capital letters on the back of a red jacket during the montage (neutral). (2) Functional Text: 'HH' logo is visible on the center of a peach sweatshirt (neutral). (3) Functional Text: Japanese characters and a QR code are visible on a promotional poster held by the man in one of the clips (informative).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a red shirt and white cargo pants performs exaggerated 'superhero' gestures to move office chairs and open doors. (2) She continues these gestures in a bathroom, at a fridge, and a kitchen area. (3) She 'opens' a main entrance door with a wave, only to reveal a man in a baseball shirt standing behind it looking annoyed. (4) The man takes over the frame, demonstrating the actual features of a Samsung smart door lock mounted on the door. (5) Close-up shots of the door lock's numeric keypad, the YSDL logo, and the internal mechanisms. (6) The man demonstrates the palm recognition and face recognition features by placing his hand in front of the lock and looking at the sensor. (7) Close-ups of a smartphone displaying an app interface connected to the door lock. (8) The man holds a physical demo unit of the lock, giving thumbs up and pointing at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat background music starts immediately with magical 'whoosh' sound effects synced to the woman's gestures. (2) As the man appears, the music maintains a high tempo while his voice enters, speaking fast and loudly in a mix of Mandarin and Taiwanese. (3) Mechanical clicking sounds and digital beeps are heard as the door lock is operated. (4) The man's vocal tone is highly promotional, excited, and punctuated with 'Ha!' sounds. (5) A feminine robotic voice prompt 'Please open the door' is heard from the lock device. (6) The video ends with a loud final pitch and a final drum beat in the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'POV: 當你以為自己是超級英雄' (POV: When you think you are a superhero) in red. (2) Effect text: '成功啦!!' (Success!!) in stylized white font. (3) Functional text: '三星電子鎖' (Samsung Electronic Lock), '掌靜脈辨識' (Palm vein recognition), '臉部辨識開門' (Face recognition door opening). (4) Product details: '航空級鋁合金機身' (Aviation-grade aluminum alloy body). (5) CTA text: '嘎哥專屬優惠碼' (Aga's exclusive promo code), 'ysdlaga', '加入LINE官方帳號' (Join official LINE account).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Humorous skit hook -> Transition to product reveal -> Feature-by-feature demonstration -> Sales pitch and CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair and a black sweatshirt excitedly holds a large purple and white box for the 'Supamop' brand, gesturing towards it with exaggerated facial expressions. (2) A woman in a striped shirt joins him, and they both present various mop models and packaging boxes that feature 'haha baby' branding and colorful character illustrations. (3) Scene cuts to a series of quick demonstrations: a person mopping a white tiled floor, a close-up of the mop head spinning in a bucket, and shots of promotional gifts like a purple water bottle and a small cloth bag. (4) The man demonstrates a different white and green mop model ('Extreme Clean Mop'), showing how the dirty and clean water are separated within the bucket. (5) The video ends with the man pointing aggressively at the camera while the woman waves a mop head, both smiling broadly in a brightly lit indoor studio setting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, fast-paced male vocals begin immediately, speaking in a loud, enthusiastic tone with a Taiwanese accent. (2) Upbeat, electronic-pop background music with a steady 128 BPM tempo plays throughout. (3) Sound effects including 'ding' sounds, 'whoosh' transitions, and 'pop' noises are heard periodically to emphasize visual text appearing on screen. (4) Occasionally, a female voice joins in with a cheerful and supportive tone, echoing the man's excitement. (5) Ambient studio quietness is maintained beneath the dominant vocals and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '好神拖' (Supamop) and '價值連城' (Worth a fortune) appear with a comic-style explosive effect. (2) Functional text: '臺灣拖把領導品牌 NO.1' (Taiwan's Leading Mop Brand No. 1) provides brand authority. (3) Decorative text: 'Made in TAIWAN!' appears in large yellow block letters. (4) Functional text: '極淨拖' (Extreme Clean Mop) and '淨汙分離' (Clean/Dirty Separation) label the product features. (5) Hook text: '嘎哥開團啦' (Brother Aga's group buy is on!) with an arrow pointing down to a link appears at the end.
