perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair wearing a white sweatshirt stands in an outdoor area with a retro Japanese aesthetic; a vintage yellow tram is visible in the background. (2) The scene shifts to a covered arcade street with banners and shops reflecting mid-20th century Japan. (3) Close-ups of large billboards featuring Godzilla and Ultraman are shown. (4) The woman and a young boy in a beige jacket are inside a retro-style shop looking at toys on shelves, including vinyl Ultraman figures. (5) The boy is seen outdoors near a colorful drop-tower ride, looking hesitant. (6) A brief archival-style clip shows the same boy crying on the ride. (7) The boy drives a small, camouflage-patterned safari car around a track with oversized plastic animal figures like elephants and rhinos. (8) The group enters a restaurant designed to look like the interior of a luxury train carriage with wood paneling and green velvet seats. (9) Through the digital window of the 'train', a silhouette of Godzilla is seen emerging amidst rain and lightning effects.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music plays. A woman's voice speaks enthusiastically in Chinese, accompanied by the ambient sounds of an outdoor park. (2) The music continues as the acoustic environment shifts slightly to an indoor store setting; sounds of plastic packaging being handled and excited conversation between a man and a woman about toys are heard. (3) A sequence of outdoor sounds follows, including the mechanical noise of a ride and a distinct sound effect of a child crying (simulating a memory). (4) The final phase features a transition to a more dramatic soundscape; while the conversation continues, deep rumbling and roaring sound effects (SFX) are layered in as a monster appears in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '西武園遊樂園' (Seibu-en Amusement Park) - identifying the location. (2) Decorative Text: '昭和時期園區' (Showa Period Area) - setting the historical theme. (3) Decorative Text: '嗅到噴錢的味道' (Smelling the scent of spending money) - humorous hook about shopping. (4) Functional Text: '西武園遊樂園限定' (Seibu-en Amusement Park Limited) - highlighting exclusive merchandise. (5) Decorative Text: '蔡波你不敢嗎?' (Tsai Po, are you afraid?) - teasing the child. (6) Decorative Text: '不好玩! 快點停下來' (It's not fun! Stop it quickly) - variety-show style caption over a flashback. (7) Functional Text: '哥吉拉出沒' (Godzilla appears) - warning of the monster visual.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Exploration of Retro Street -> Toy Shopping -> Kid's Rides -> Train-themed Dining

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two men in a room filled with character toys; one man wears a large yellow mask while the other in a striped sweater gestures excitedly. (2) At the 17-second mark, the scene shifts to an office setting where a woman opens a large cardboard box; a man suddenly jumps out with a wide-eyed, screaming expression, causing her to recoil in shock. (3) A montage follows showing multiple people approaching similar boxes and being startled as the man jumps out repeatedly with exaggerated facial expressions. (4) The final seconds show the man laughing inside a box while being petted on the head by a woman.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with fast-paced Mandarin speech from an energetic male, accompanied by upbeat, bouncy background music. (2) As the pranks start, rhythmic 'whoosh' sound effects punctuate scene transitions, followed by loud, high-pitched male shouting of 'Xin Nian Kuai Le!' (Happy New Year) and subsequent screams of surprise from various victims. (3) The middle section is dominated by repetitive cycles of tense silence, explosive shouting, and immediate group laughter. (4) The audio concludes with a mix of ambient office chatter and fading comedic background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '年終獎金企劃' (Year-end bonus plan) - Functional title establishing the video's theme. (2) '看啊...感動啊...沒有啊' - Decorative captions following the dialogue with a humorous tone. (3) '楊亞妮嚇到!!!', '王鴨鴨嚇到!!!', '洪+0嚇到!!!' - Effect text identifying the pranked individuals and their reaction ('Scared!!!'). (4) '(想當蔡嘉 留言+1)' - Interactive hook encouraging viewer engagement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a person wearing a large, exaggerated Big Head Buddha mask sitting on a brown leather sofa, gesturing with his hands while talking into a professional microphone. (2) At 0:04, the scene cuts to a male host (Tsai Aga) wearing white headphones and holding a black 'Let's Cafe' cup, laughing heartily and pointing towards the camera. (3) Throughout the middle section, the camera cuts frequently between the masked character and the host. At 0:23, a female co-host appears next to the male host, both laughing and reacting to the conversation. (4) The host performs a dramatic singing gesture at 0:25. (5) From 0:37 to the end, the masked character explains a scenario involving AI, and the host and co-host react with a mix of laughter and mock disgust, with the host often holding his coffee cup near his face.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Male voice (deep and slightly muffled by the mask) begins speaking with a steady, conversational tone about attending events together. (2) Loud, high-pitched laughter from a second male voice (the host) enters, accompanied by clear, professional-grade studio acoustics. (3) Ambient sound includes the occasional rustling of clothes and the clicking of a cup on a table. (4) At 0:23, the host begins singing a brief, dramatic melody in a mock-serious tone while the female voice laughs in the background. (5) The final phase consists of fast-paced, overlapping dialogue and intense laughter as they discuss 'AI generation', ending with high-energy banter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你有去我就會去' (If you go, I'll go) - Functional dialogue, standard font. (2) '哇～他都跟著你' (Wow, he always follows you) - Functional reaction. (3) '原來如此啊' (So that's how it is) - Functional agreement. (4) '不要再造謠了' (Stop spreading rumors) - Decorative/Hook text with an emotional, slightly defensive tone. (5) '你的喜帖是我的請帖' (Your wedding invitation is my invitation) - Song lyrics appearing as the host sings, conveying a melodramatic tone. (6) '好噁 好想吐喔' (So gross, I want to puke) - Reactive text conveying exaggerated disgust.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro dialogue -> Mocking/Laughter -> Singing segment -> Final AI-themed banter

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a grey cardigan and a woman in a colorful patterned shirt stand in a modern white kitchen. The man holds a book and a paper recipe written in Classical Chinese. (2) Close-ups show the man's exaggerated expressions of confidence and confusion as he reads the recipe. (3) The woman begins preparing ingredients, including raw meat, while the man supervises and consults the text. (4) The man chops green onions with a wide, dramatic stance, followed by a sequence of him calculating numbers on screen. (5) They assemble a bun-like pastry and pan-fry it in a SAKURA-branded pan. (6) A group of four women and one man taste the finished product at a kitchen island, while the main man reacts strongly to their feedback.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately with high-pitched sound effects (dings and pops) emphasizing visual transitions. (2) A male voice speaks loudly and energetically in Mandarin, reading a recipe in a formal, rhythmic tone followed by excited banter. (3) Occasional high-pitched female laughter and collective chatter of a small group occur during the cooking and tasting scenes. (4) Sound effects like sizzling are heard when food hits the pan, and a 'fail' or 'sharp' sound effect plays when a low score is given. (5) The music maintains a consistent variety-show tempo throughout the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '地獄廚房回歸了' (Hell's Kitchen is back) with fire graphics. (2) Decorative text: '(煮出原本要的樣子) 看文言文食譜' (Trying to cook the original look by reading Classical Chinese recipes). (3) Effect text: '水煎包' (Pan-fried buns) appears with impact lines. (4) Joke text: '5x6=30' and large score text '60分' (60 points) appear to emphasize punchlines. (5) Dialogue captions: '妳真的不懂吃欸' (You really don't know how to eat) surrounded by fire emojis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Interpreting difficult recipe -> Chaotic cooking montage -> Group tasting and rating

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a brown and white striped polo shirt is standing in a room, holding small white cards and looking downwards with a contemplative expression. (3) The man in the striped shirt reacts with exaggerated facial expressions—eyes wide and mouth agape—as he reveals cards. The group around him is cheering and laughing. (4) Several giant cards (10 of Spades, 7 of Hearts, 8 of Spades) are shown on a dark table surface. The man in the striped shirt performs a rhythmic dance-like movement while holding the deck. (5) Finally, the man succeeds in a task, raising his arms in victory as the crowd surrounds and hugs him in a celebratory frenzy.

(3) The background is filled with the constant sound of a crowd cheering, clapping, and laughing loudly. (4) As the game reaches a climax, the music increases in volume and tempo. (5) The video ends with a loud collective shout of joy from multiple people.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: 'Didn't expect to be able to make a wish to someone other than my husband in this life... I want to get rid of glasses.' perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a brightly lit indoor arcade. A man in a black shirt with white patterns (Cai Ah-ga) speaks directly to the camera while another man in a green jacket (Cai Zong-han) sits at a game machine. (2) The camera zooms in on the game machine's screen, which features colorful graphics and token counts. A hand points to specific numbers on the glass panel. (3) The man in the green jacket presses a large yellow button repeatedly. The man in the black shirt watches closely with expressions of tension and fear. (4) The scene transitions to both men jumping, cheering, and raising their arms in triumph as the machine indicates a big win. (5) A final close-up shows a large number of tokens on the machine's screen followed by a freeze-frame of the winning moment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male vocals speaking Mandarin and Taiwanese, accompanied by the chaotic ambient noise of an arcade (beeps, music from other machines). (2) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music fades in during the gameplay. (3) Sudden, loud shouting and cheering from both men as they win. (4) Sound effects include the mechanical clicking of the machine's buttons and the digital 'win' chimes. (5) The audio ends with high-pitched laughter and excited chatter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '來啊蔡宗翰現在賭性堅強' - teasing the player's gambling spirit. (2) Functional Text: '我們已經中了啊', '得到1000枚' - explaining the game's current status and potential rewards. (3) Hook Text: '怕。' - expressing fear/tension. (4) Hook Text: '(真的中大獎了?!)' - questioning if a big prize was won. (5) Functional Text: '變成2640了' - confirming the final high token count.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Game Mechanics Explanation -> High-tension Gameplay -> Climactic Win celebration.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a gray shirt and a patterned cap stands next to a woman in a blue shirt in front of a traditional Japanese shrine's water purification pavilion. He turns to the camera with a surprised expression. (3) A close-up shot shows hands rinsing under the bamboo spout with a small metal sensor visible underneath. (4) The man leans down to inspect the underside of the wooden basin structure, pointing out the integrated technology while the woman watches and smiles. (5) They continue talking to each other and the camera while standing by the facility.

(2) A female voice joins in with laughter and brief comments, sounding surprised. (3) The sound of water splashing and flowing is heard clearly when the sensor is triggered. (4) Ambient outdoor sounds like distant wind and soft environmental noise are present underneath the conversation and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) A blue and yellow banner at the bottom reads: '⚠️日本新發現 神社手水舍變成感應水龍頭' (New discovery in Japan: Shrine chōzuya turned into a sensor faucet). (2) Functional subtitles appear throughout the video, translating the spoken dialogue in a casual and enthusiastic tone. (3) Occasional emotional captions appear to emphasize the 'modern' aspect of the discovery.

The man holds the paper, and the woman gets very close to his face, blowing in his ear and touching his shoulder. The man makes a face of mock disgust and flinches. (4) The man pulls the paper while the woman continues her antics. They eventually celebrate near a white divider.

(2) A cartoonish 'boing' sound effect plays when the toy falls, followed by more loud laughter. (3) The music continues at a steady pace while the male voice expresses mock outrage and the female voice giggles continuously. (4) A final chime sound effect plays as the music remains upbeat through the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins outdoors at night in a busy urban area; a male host in a white t-shirt and red crossbody bag introduces a female guest in a green jacket. (2) The scene shifts to the front of a restaurant where they examine a poster advertising a giant bowl of seafood noodles and the reward rules. (3) The female guest is then shown sitting inside the restaurant, calmly eating fries from a small bowl before the main challenge begins. (4) A male chef brings out an enormous ceramic bowl filled with red-broth noodles and various toppings; the host records the reveal with his smartphone, showing high excitement. (5) The female guest starts eating the giant bowl of noodles with chopsticks; several cuts show her progress and the host's surprised facial expressions as she continues to eat effortlessly. (6) The video ends with a promotional graphic for a full YouTube version.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat BGM starts immediately. A male voice speaks loudly and enthusiastically in Mandarin with a Taiwanese accent, introducing the guest. (2) Sound of clapping and crowd cheering SFX is layered over the host's introduction. (3) The host explains the challenge rules; his voice remains the dominant audio element. (4) Dramatic 'whoosh' and 'impact' SFX play as the giant bowl is revealed in the restaurant. (5) Sounds of slurping and occasional short comments from the female guest (soft, calm tone) contrast with the host's energetic commentary. (6) The music reaches a crescendo and then continues into a fade-out during the final call-to-action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '九十六學年度 東海大學 MVP大胃王' (96th Academic Year Tunghai University MVP Big Eater) appears in large stylized font. (2) Functional Text: '羅禁慾' (Luo Jin-yu) identifies the guest. (3) Hook Text: '15分鐘內吃完 獎金1萬円' (Finish within 15 mins for 10,000 yen reward) and '25分鐘內吃完 免費' (Finish within 25 mins for free) display the rules. (4) Contextual Text: '（挑戰前）' (Before the challenge) and '沒差這點胃容量' (This bit of stomach capacity doesn't matter) appear as she eats fries. (5) Variety Show Captions: '！！超大碗公！！' (!!Super Huge Bowl!!) and '喔！喔！喔！' (Oh! Oh! Oh!) emphasize the reveal. (6) Ending Hook: '請去YT看完整版' (Please go to YT to see the full version).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The flow goes from an energetic outdoor introduction to a restaurant rule explanation, followed by the reveal of the food and a montage of the eating challenge clips.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a bright, modern kitchen where a man with short brown hair in a white t-shirt looks shocked, holding a whiteboard and gesturing wildly. (2) The scene shifts to a sterile food factory environment where the man, another male companion, and a woman are all dressed in full white cleanroom suits, hairnets, and face shields, laughing and observing food production. (3) Returning to the kitchen, the two men sit at a counter filled with plates of dumplings and bowls of noodles, using chopsticks to eat and expressing high levels of satisfaction through exaggerated facial expressions and gestures. (4) Close-up shots highlight specific food items like plump white dumplings and beef noodles with large chunks of meat and tendon. (5) The video concludes with the men gesturing energetically towards the camera in a call-to-action manner.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately alongside high-energy male voices speaking in Mandarin. (2) The soundscape transitions to include ambient factory hums and the rustling of cleanroom suits as multiple voices (male and female) engage in a lively, humorous conversation filled with laughter. (3) Frequent sound effects (SFX) like dings, pops, and cartoonish emphasize-accents are layered over the dialogue. (4) Slurping sounds and vocal exclamations of enjoyment occur during the eating scenes. (5) The music swells slightly as a final direct-to-camera speech is delivered with high vocal intensity.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the conversation regarding company shares, the texture of the dumpling skin, and the quality of the beef noodles. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'You didn't know about the 20% shares?' (Shocked tone), 'Very thick skin!!' (Humorous emphasis), 'Really!!!' (Validation), 'Sister, can you come to work?' (Joking tone), 'Argentine Red Shrimp Pork Dumplings' (Product title), 'KTV Must-Order Flavor' (Marketing hook), 'The meat amount is crazy' (Exaggerated praise).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with long curly hair in a black t-shirt introduces a martial arts class in a hall filled with trophies; a young woman in a white hoodie stands next to him. (2) Different female students attempt jumping kicks and spinning moves on a black training mat. (3) A professional woman performs a complex 'Bagua Dao' routine, rolling across the floor while swinging a saber with a red tassel. (4) The woman in the white hoodie attempts the floor roll with a saber but repeatedly gets stuck on her back, flailing her legs. (5) A woman in a green sweatshirt attempts the move with better form but still shows some clumsiness. (6) The host man performs a successful floor roll with the saber. (7) The group laughs as the woman in white is seen lying awkwardly on the mat at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks clearly with an enthusiastic tone, accompanied by the natural echo of a large room. (2) Upbeat, fast-paced comical BGM begins. (3) The sound of feet scuffing on mats and the occasional 'swoosh' of a saber is heard. (4) Frequent female laughter and high-pitched exclamations occur during failed movement attempts. (5) Cartoonish sound effects (SFX) such as 'ding' and 'slide' sounds are added to emphasize comical moments. (6) The BGM remains consistent through the transitions between different people practicing. (7) Ends with loud collective laughter and a few concluding remarks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional white subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout. (2) Large yellow '武術課' (Martial Arts Class) title appears as a hook. (3) Decorative variety-show captions like '大叔!' (Uncle!), '肢體不協調王' (King of Incoordination), and '八卦刀表演一級' (Bagua Dao Performance Level 1) appear to label people and actions. (4) Status text like '卡住' (Stuck) and '不想努力了' (Don't want to try anymore) emphasizes the humor of the failures. (5) Final celebratory text '一氣呵成！帥！' (Done in one breath! Handsome!) appears during the successful demonstration.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Practice Montage -> Professional Demo -> Humorous Failure Comparison -> Successful Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a bedroom where a man wakes up and gets out of bed, leaving a woman sleeping. (2) He moves to the kitchen, prepares coffee, and then enters a living room area where he begins clearing a messy table cluttered with wires. (3) He introduces a series of PHILIPS charging products, demonstrating a 3-in-1 foldable charging stand with a phone, watch, and earbuds. (4) He leaves the house and is seen inside a car, installing a magnetic car charger on the dashboard and attaching his phone. (5) He returns home carrying a bag of groceries, finds the woman on the sofa looking at her phone, and hands her a compact magnetic power bank. (6) The video concludes with the man sitting at a table filled with various PHILIPS charging accessories, gesturing enthusiastically towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks in a fast, humorous, and slightly mock-serious tone. (2) Sound effects (SFX) of objects being moved, clicking sounds as devices snap magnetically onto chargers, and water running in the kitchen are heard. (3) The vocal performance remains high-energy throughout, describing product features with emphasis on speed and convenience. (4) The music continues at a steady, high BPM, maintaining a cheerful and promotional atmosphere. (5) In the final phase, the man's voice becomes more direct and persuasive, peaking in excitement during the call to action for a group buy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV：嘎式大男人主義' (POV: Gaga-style Male Chauvinism) sets the humorous tone. (2) Decorative Text: Large, bold blue captions appear such as '不用理她' (Don't mind her), 'PHILIPS 黑金剛 Qi2', 'Funcube', and '一秒收疊' (Fold in one second) to highlight product selling points. (3) Functional Text: Consistent subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (4) Promotional Text: '保證全網最低價' (Guaranteed lowest price) and '連結點起來' (Click the link) appear at the end for the CTA.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video uses a split-screen format: the top shows a high-quality music video of a girl in a residential alley and parks, while the bottom shows a low-budget recreation in an indoor office environment. (2) Chronological replication: the bottom character uses a red handbag and a clear umbrella to mimic the top character's joyful walk. (3) Rain simulation: in the bottom frame, a person uses a blue watering can to pour water on the character's umbrella to mimic the rain in the top frame. (4) Object substitution: the creator in the bottom frame uses a household mop to simulate playing an electric bass and pets a person lying on the floor to simulate petting a dog. (5) Closing scenes: both characters are shown crying while holding stacks of banknotes and photos, with the bottom version using exaggerated expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat Mandopop/Rock music begins immediately, featuring high-pitched and energetic female vocals. (2) The acoustic environment is dominated by studio-recorded music with clear electric guitar riffs and a steady drum beat. (3) No ambient noise or significant sound effects are heard; the audio is a continuous, high-quality music track. (4) The vocals remain consistent in tone, expressing a bright and emotional theme throughout the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: "低成本 COVER 愛是什麼 MV" (Low-cost cover of the 'Love is What' music video) appears at the top. (2) Call-to-action: "還沒看正片嗎 快去看哦!" (Haven't seen the full video yet? Go watch it now!) appears in the center. (3) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles for the song lyrics are displayed in the middle of the split-screen throughout the video.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a white mesh sweater and black pants with a chain stands in a park, holding a large cardboard box and looking distressed. (2) He shows the cardboard box which has 'Kaka Baby' branding, then places it on a wooden park bench to serve as a mattress. (3) He lies down on the bench with his arms outstretched, demonstrating 'sleeping in the park'. (4) He transitions to sitting on the ground with a large black and silver power station. (5) Detailed close-up shots of the power station's interface, including AC outlets, USB ports, and a digital display showing battery percentage. (6) He demonstrates plugging in a professional DSLR camera and a white desk fan into the power station while sitting in the park. (7) A quick transition shows him in a dark indoor room during a simulated power outage, using the power station's built-in LED light. (8) Back in the park, he unfolds a large, multi-paneled black solar panel and connects it to the power station. (9) He is seen sitting comfortably with a laptop, a fan, and his phone, all connected to the power unit. (10) The video ends with him presenting two different sizes of the power station side-by-side on the grass.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts immediately. A high-energy male voice speaks quickly with a humorous and slightly exaggerated tone. (2) The music continues as the speaker's voice remains dominant, shifting from a comedic narrative about the stock market to a more informative, promotional tone. (3) Subtle sound effects (SFX) such as digital beeps and clicking sounds occur when the speaker points to features on the device. (4) Ambient outdoor sounds like wind and distant birds are present but heavily suppressed by the studio-quality vocal recording and BGM. (5) A sharp 'power-off' sound effect is heard during the indoor scene simulation. (6) The music maintains a constant, energetic rhythm throughout the product demonstration until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '是不是又怕哪天台股又大跌' (Are you afraid the Taiwan stock market will crash again?) - Humorous hook. (2) '嘎哥就要教大家 怎麼樣舒服的睡公園' (Ga-ge will teach everyone how to sleep in the park comfortably) - Decorative hook. (3) '第一樣 紙箱最重要' (First, the cardboard box is most important) - Functional step. (4) '第二樣 手機要必備' (Second, the phone is essential) - Functional step. (5) 'PHILIPS 儲能行動電源' (PHILIPS Energy Storage Power Station) - Brand/Product identification. (6) Technical specs appear: '1000W', '294000mAh', '12個多元插座' (12 multi-functional outlets). (7) '符合BSMI及UL國際雙認證' (Meets BSMI and UL international certifications) - Trust/Quality text. (8) 'PHILIPS 100W 太陽能充電板' (PHILIPS 100W Solar Charging Panel) - Product identification. (9) '團購優惠中' (Group buy discount in progress) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro comedic premise -> Product feature demonstration -> Emergency use case -> Solar panel addition -> Promotional closing

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy advertisement for Philips portable power stations and solar panels. It uses a humorous framing device—pretending to be homeless in a park due to stock market losses—to demonstrate the product's high capacity, portability, and versatility in powering multiple devices (fans, cameras, laptops) in off-grid or emergency situations. The intent is to convince outdoor enthusiasts or those concerned with power outages to purchase the products through a group buy.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator extensively demonstrates the product's features, displays the brand name repeatedly, and provides technical specifications and a group buy call-to-action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a live-action shot of a man and a woman standing in front of a scooter rental shop in Okinawa; the man wears a white cap and sunglasses, pointing enthusiastically at the camera. (2) A montage follows showing the pair riding scooters across a large bridge and along coastal roads under a bright blue sky. (3) An illustrated map of Okinawa appears with red pins marking their route progress around the island's perimeter. (4) The duo is seen riding through various landscapes including urban streets with palm trees and rural seaside roads. (5) A dramatic segment shows them reaching scenic points like Zanpa Cape and a white lighthouse. (6) A crisis occurs where they are shown pushing a scooter and reacting with exaggerated faces near a gas station. (7) The video concludes with the pair celebrating on a grassy cliff overlooking the ocean, cheering with their arms raised.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop-rock music with a strong drum beat begins immediately. A male voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone, announcing a 24-hour round-the-island challenge. (2) The music continues as a consistent backdrop while wind noise and the faint hum of scooter engines are heard during riding sequences. (3) Vocal interactions increase with the female voice laughing and the male voice shouting milestones. (4) During an emergency segment, a rhythmic alarm-like sound effect (SFX) is layered over the music. (5) The video ends with loud cheering, high-fives sounds, and a final enthusiastic summary from the male speaker as the music reaches a crescendo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '我們今天要來挑戰 24 小時沖繩環島' (Today we are going to challenge a 24-hour round-the-island trip in Okinawa) appears in a bold font. (2) Functional Text: Various location names like '波上宮' (Naminoue Shrine) and '邊戶岬' (Cape Hedo) appear on a map graphic. (3) Decorative Text: '最南端 喜屋武岬' (Southernmost point, Cape Kiyan) and '最東端' (Easternmost point) mark milestones with an energetic tone. (4) Hook Text: '發生緊急狀況' (Emergency situation) and '機車沒油了!!!' (Out of gas!!!) appear in large, vibrating fonts to emphasize drama. (5) Functional Text: '我們騎快 300 公里了' (We've ridden nearly 300 km) appears at the end for factual summary.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Travel Montage -> Milestone Checkpoints -> Emergency/Crisis -> Successful Completion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a girl in a pink shirt pointing at something off-camera with a dissatisfied expression; a man wearing a blue cap and a black vest quickly appears holding a mop, acting as a submissive assistant. (2) The scene shifts to the man frantically mopping the floor while the girl looks on; they transition to a living room area where the girl complains about the heat, and the man uses the mop handle to adjust an air conditioner. (3) The man then offers the girl bags of snacks, but she finds them too dry; he then introduces the DIKE Slushie Machine in a kitchen setting. (4) Close-up shots show the machine's operation, including pouring orange juice, dispensing slushie into a glass, and the girl eating the cold treat. (5) The man introduces a white portable air cooler (DIKE Ice Wind Pro), demonstrating its buttons and portability by pushing it across the floor. (6) The video ends with a showcase of all the DIKE cooling products and promotional text as the man enthusiastically points to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music plays immediately while a female voice is heard complaining in a high pitch, followed by a very enthusiastic and fast-paced male voice responding. (2) The male voice remains the dominant audio feature throughout, speaking in a loud, persuasive, and rapid tone to narrate the product features. (3) During the transition to the kitchen, sound effects of mechanical whirring and 'ding' sounds are synchronized with the text and machine usage. (4) The background music continues at a steady, driving tempo as the male voice describes product specifications. (5) The video concludes with the male voice shouting a call to action over the continuing upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom for all spoken dialogue. (2) Hook text includes '搞什麼阿' (What's going on?) and '廁所有點髒欸' (The toilet is a bit dirty) with an annoyed tone. (3) Decorative/Effect text includes '烤鴨好熱' (Humorous pun), '拍謝拍謝' (Apologetic), and '肚子餓' (Hungry). (4) Product feature text includes 'DIKE 好冰友雪泥機', '1.6L 大容量', '只要30分鐘', 'DIKE 冰風Pro', '體積縮小 22%', '全網最低價', and price details '$3690'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Comedy Skit -> Product Demonstration -> Promotional Offer -> CTA

(5) The man stands in front of an open closet, taking out a grey garment and showing it to the woman; she takes it and smells it with a surprised and happy expression. (6) The man is seen outdoors in a black and white baseball jersey, pulling at the collar and looking refreshed. (7) The man is in a laundry room, pouring blue liquid into a washing machine detergent drawer and then pouring small white beads from a bottle cap into the main drum. (8) The man and woman sit together, holding a bottle and gesturing towards it with thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, playful background music starts. A woman's voice speaks in a friendly, contemplative tone. '他很乾淨' '也很舒服' '啊還很持久' representing the woman's dialogue in a cute font. (3) Decorative Text: '還好啦' '這樣誇獎我' '潔癖是有啦' representing the man's narcissistic misunderstanding. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man walking through a park filled with blooming cherry blossoms; he is seen from behind and walking towards the camera. (2) He explores various cultural sites, including a shrine with fox statues, traditional wooden gates (Torii), and a riverside walkway. (3) Scene transitions to a busy city street with motorcycles, followed by multiple close-up shots of food being prepared and eaten in a restaurant. (4) Night scenes show illuminated city buildings, an Ichiran ramen restaurant with people dancing in windows, and crowded street food stalls (yatai). (5) A street performer is shown singing on a bridge at night. (6) The man visits several retail stores, looking at clothing, trying on shoes in front of a mirror, and browsing toy aisles. (7) The video concludes with the man back in the cherry blossom park and walking along a modern shopping complex exterior.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately, accompanied by an energetic male voice speaking Mandarin with a fast, enthusiastic pace. (2) The sounds of motorcycle engines revving and city traffic noise are briefly audible during the street scenes. (3) Ambient restaurant sounds, including the clatter of chopsticks and bowls, are heard during the food segments. (4) A short segment of a female street performer singing a melodic pop song with acoustic guitar accompaniment is heard during the night bridge scene. (5) Subtle 'pop' and 'swish' sound effects are used to punctuate text transitions and quick visual cuts. (6) The music maintains its energetic drive until the narrator gives a final enthusiastic sign-off, and the audio fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 「日本福岡 快閃獨旅36H 可以做多少事?」- Hook title asking how much can be done in 36 hours in Fukuoka. (2) 「福岡城看櫻花.買御城印」- Functional text indicating cherry blossom viewing at Fukuoka Castle. (3) 「警固神社千鳥居.喝藍瓶」- Mentioning Kego Shrine and Blue Bottle coffee. (4) 「福岡發源 牛腸定食」- Identifying a local beef intestine set meal. (5) 「一蘭總店每晚8點表演」- Noting a performance at the Ichiran main store. (6) 「聽街頭藝人演唱才chill」- Subjective text about the chill atmosphere of street music. (7) 「街頭潮牌.運河城.lalaport」- Listing shopping destinations like Canal City and LaLaport. (8) 「週末福岡chill一下.不飛嗎」- A final persuasive hook asking if the viewer wants to fly to Fukuoka for the weekend.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows an Intro -> Daytime Sightseeing -> Food -> Nightlife -> Shopping -> Summary flow.

By showcasing a high density of activities—ranging from traditional sightseeing and cherry blossom viewing to food tours, shopping for trendy brands, and experiencing local nightlife—the content aims to demonstrate the efficiency and fun of a solo 'flash trip.'

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young boy in blue animal-print pajamas stands in a modern living room, holding a black and white magic wand. He looks at the camera and prepares for a trick. (2) The boy performs a 'floating wand' trick by holding his own wrist, while another boy with glasses leans in closely to inspect the magic, reacting with wide-eyed surprise. (3) A woman with a face mask and hair towel appears briefly in the background kitchen area. (4) The scene shifts to a close-up of the boy's hands as the wand vibrates rapidly. (5) The boy moves to a different spot, showing a spinning black and white disc and then performing a trick with a small paper object, ending with a proud smile towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An adult male voice (off-screen) interacts with the boy, asking him what he is going to do. The boy explains his magic trick in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. (2) As the trick is performed, the adult and the other boy provide loud, exaggerated 'Ooh' and 'Wow' reactions. (3) During the wand vibration trick, a rapid clapping sound effect is layered over the audio. (4) The father jokingly asks the boy if he can conjure up 30,000 dollars. (5) The video ends with a classic 8-bit video game 'success' jingle.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Hook Text: 'POV：當你的兒子愛上魔術表演' (POV: When your son falls in love with magic performances) appears at the top, setting a humorous and relatable family tone.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short brown hair (Cai Aga) appears in a bright, modern living room, looking frustrated and gesturing toward his clothes and the camera. (2) He showcases a series of items: a hoodie, pants with bubble tea patterns, a product box, and a pink floral helmet, looking mock-annoyed with each. (3) He shifts to an excited state, holding two boxes of AROMASE scalp purifying liquid. (4) Scene transitions to a bathroom where he applies the liquid from a blue bottle directly to his dry scalp. (5) He vigorously massages his scalp, creating white foam while smiling at the camera. (6) Detailed shots of the product packaging and the liquid being poured into his palm are shown. (7) A brief black-and-white clip of a woman scratching her head appears. (8) He concludes by holding the product line next to a table, pointing at promotional dates.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, fast-paced electronic background music starts immediately. A man speaks loudly and animatedly in a mix of Mandarin and Taiwanese Hokkien, sounding like he is complaining. (2) Frequent 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects coincide with text popping up on screen. (3) The tone shifts to high-pitched enthusiasm as the man introduces the scalp treatment product. (4) A male narrator's voice takes over during the product demonstration, explaining the benefits in a clear, persuasive tone over the same upbeat music. (5) A sharp scratching sound effect plays during the brief shot of a woman scratching her head. (6) The video ends with a punchy delivery of the brand name and promotion dates.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '大家都知道' (Everyone knows) - informative hook. (2) '我是小嘎現在是千億集團hahababy旗下小小員工' (I am Little Ga, currently a small employee of the 100 billion group hahababy) - humorous context. (3) Labels for items: '打樣' (Sample), '打版' (Draft), '實驗品' (Experimental), '瑕疵品' (Defective). (4) '我要革命' (I want a revolution) - narrative turn. (5) Product name: '艾瑪絲 捷利爾藍藻頭皮淨化液' (AROMASE 5α Juniper Scalp Purifying Liquid). (6) Features: '大容量', '無矽靈', '無防腐劑', '敏弱頭皮', '黃金比例', '維他命B5'. (7) Promotion: '即日起～7/14 嘎哥團購優惠中'. (8) Pun: '父親節 (父清潔)' (Father's Day / Father's Cleaning).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro humor/complaint -> Revolution transition -> Product demo and explanation -> Final promo deal.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote AROMASE's scalp purifying liquid by leveraging the influencer's humorous persona and family-brand dynamic. It begins by establishing a relatable but funny conflict (the 'small employee' husband using sample/defective products from his wife's brand) before pivoting to a 'revolution' where he introduces a high-quality product he genuinely recommends, followed by a detailed demonstration and a call to action for a limited-time group buy.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, verbal recommendation, overlay text showing promo dates and 'group buy' details.

(3) Transitions to a sunny beach; she wears a white dress and a straw bag, running and laughing on the shore. (4) The mood shifts to a dimly lit indoor space where she looks somber; brief cuts show her celebrating a birthday with a cake and a bee plush toy in a vintage film style. (5) Outdoor road scene with Japanese signage under an overcast sky; she is seen looking out of a car window. (6) Back in the sun, she uses a toy to blow bubbles. (7) Transition to a dark, rainy night inside a car; she appears distressed, clutching her head. (8) Wide shot of her standing alone in a desolate field with a bare tree; a large, faded projection of her face appears in the sky above her. (9) Final close-up of her face looking directly at the camera with a serious expression as the title text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy rock music starts immediately featuring a male vocal singing in an expressive, slightly strained tone. (2) The instrumentation includes driving electric guitars and a steady drum kit. (3) The intensity of the music remains consistent through the middle section with the male vocals hitting higher notes. (4) Towards the end, the full rock arrangement cuts out, replaced by a soft, melodic acoustic guitar strumming and gentle 'la la la' humming. (5) No ambient environmental sounds or specific sound effects are audible over the music production.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese lyrics appear at the bottom throughout the video in a yellow font (e.g., '你聽見我了沒有', '我知道已回不去那時候'). (2) Functional Text: At the end, large yellow text displays the song title '你聽見我了沒有' followed by credits '七月 feat. 半四分衛'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Happy/Bright) -> Conflict/Memories (Nostalgic) -> Climax (Distress/Rain) -> Outro (Melancholy Reflection)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a music video designed to evoke a sense of bittersweet nostalgia and emotional longing. By contrasting bright, joyful imagery of the past (beach, smiling, birthday) with dark, rainy, and desolate imagery of the present, it illustrates the pain of a lost connection or an unrequited desire to be heard, as emphasized by the lyrics and the dramatic visual metaphors like the face in the sky.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A bag of Calbee potato chips is prominently displayed and consumed by the main character in an early scene.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a crowd of people walking along a street towards an event space. (2) It transitions indoors to a bustling second-hand sale event titled 'Hahababy'. (3) The main male creator, wearing a black mesh sweater with floral patterns, is seen energetically interacting with customers in the 'Second-hand Clothing' section, signing items and laughing. (4) The camera pans across various zones including a photo booth with large posters, a high-end action figure clearance area featuring large 'Dragon Ball' statues, and a toy clearance section. (5) The male and female creators are shown together at the end, smiling and waving to the camera as they thank the participants.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music plays throughout the video. (2) A loud, energetic male voice provides continuous narration and interacts with people, shouting prices and jokes. (3) The background is filled with the ambient sounds of a large crowd: constant chatter, laughter, and the rustling of shopping bags. (4) Distinct cartoonish sound effects (boing, ding) and recorded laughter are used to emphasize humorous interactions between the creator and the shoppers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Hahababy惜福季 第3年' (Hahababy Charity Season Year 3) indicating the event. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '600太貴了啦!!!' (600 is too expensive!!!), '沒水準!!!' (No manners!!!), '1比1嗎???' (Is it 1:1 scale?) appearing in variety-show style fonts with various colors. (3) Location Labels: '拍照打卡區' (Photo check-in area), '二手衣物區' (Second-hand clothing area), '公仔出清區' (Figure clearance area).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in an orange striped shirt and two women standing on a sidewalk in an urban Japanese setting, talking excitedly to the camera. (2) The man walks along an unexpectedly empty city street, gesturing to the lack of people and looking surprised. (3) A young boy in a white jacket and backpack appears, walking alongside the man on the sidewalk. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor counter where the man and boy are seen turning on a silver faucet, from which bright yellow orange juice flows into small plastic cups. (5) The boy is then shown outdoors again, holding and eating a large cone of soft-serve ice cream while smiling.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music plays from the beginning. A male voice speaks loudly and enthusiastically, joined by female voices in a conversational tone. (2) The man's voice dominates, expressing surprise at the emptiness of the streets. (3) A child's voice is heard expressing skepticism and then wonder. (4) Sound of liquid pouring is audible as the faucet is turned. (5) The music continues at a steady, happy tempo until the video concludes with the sounds of the group laughing and chatting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 連假每次到日本一定人都很多 (Functional: It's always crowded in Japan during holidays - Neutral tone). (2) 爆炸多人!! (Decorative: Explosively many people!! - Excited tone). (3) 街道好空 (Decorative: The street is so empty - Surprised tone). (4) 松山市 (Functional: Matsuyama City - Informative tone). (5) 水龍頭打開都是橘子汁 (Decorative: Opening the faucet, it's all orange juice - Enthusiastic tone). (6) 真的假的? (Functional: Really? - Skeptical tone). (7) 少騙人了 (Functional: Stop lying - Playful tone). (8) 我活了6年都沒看過... (Functional: I've lived for 6 years and never seen it... - Humorous tone). (9) 放羊的嘎哥 (Decorative: Gaga the Shepherd - Humorous reference to the boy who cried wolf). (10) 橘子汁!! (Functional: Orange juice!! - Excited tone). (11) 日本愛媛 都沒人超適合遛小孩 (Functional: Ehime, Japan, no one around, perfect for walking kids - Recommendation tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Walking through empty streets -> Discovering the orange juice tap -> Outro with ice cream.

By verifying the famous 'orange juice from a tap' urban legend through the eyes of a child, the content combines educational travel tips with high-energy family entertainment.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a bowl of duck ramen featuring thinly sliced duck breast and chopped green onions. (2) A transition shows the exterior of the Osaka Station City building and the Balchika 03 shopping area. (3) The camera moves inside to show the restaurant's entrance, a queue ticket, and the kitchen where several chefs are preparing food. (4) A male character in a striped shirt and red cap is shown eating a duck and egg rice bowl (Oyako-don style) with a spoon, showing an expression of enjoyment. (5) The scene shifts back to the duck ramen; the character uses chopsticks to lift the noodles and drinks the clear broth. (6) The video concludes with the character giving a thumbs-up to the camera while holding the bowl.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, jazzy piano and drum instrumental music plays continuously throughout the video. (2) No human vocals or speech are detected; the soundscape is dominated by the BGM. (3) Occasional faint ambient sounds of a restaurant environment, such as the clinking of dishes or subtle slurping noises, are layered under the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 鴨と葱。大阪也有！免排隊！ (Duck and green onion. Osaka has it too! No queuing!) - Enthusiastic hook. (2) うーめん 鴨と葱 (大阪梅田分店) (Ramen Kamo to Negi - Osaka Umeda Branch) - Informational/Location details. (3) 實測星期五12點 只等5分鐘 (Tested Friday 12 PM, only 5 min wait) - Factual hook. (4) 嘎哥飯派 鴨肉親子丼推推 (Aga Rice Party, Duck Meat Oyako-don recommended) - Opinion/Recommendation. (5) 麵來了！ (Noodles are here!) - Informational. (6) 肉嫩蔥香 其他較中規中矩 一般般 (Meat tender, onions fragrant. Others are quite standard/average) - Critical review tone. (7) 下次我會只點 鴨肉親子丼 (Next time I'll only order the duck meat oyako-don) - Preference statement. (8) 結論 不用排隊的話。可吃 (Conclusion: If you don't have to queue, it's worth eating) - Final verdict.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a logical flow from showcasing the dish to showing the location, entering the restaurant, and then detailing the tasting experience for two different dishes.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in an indoor gymnasium with a male host in a white Nike hoodie introducing the content excitedly; a group of people stands behind him. (2) The scene transitions to a female athlete in a black athletic shirt holding a yellow and blue ball, explaining rules while standing in the gym. (3) A series of quick cuts shows participants practicing, including playful wrestling between two girls and a girl dancing loosely like an inflatable tube man. (4) Professional match footage is briefly overlaid to illustrate the sport. (5) The group engages in a casual match; players in green vests run and shoot at a high yellow basket. (6) In the finale, the female athlete holds a trophy and interacts with the host to conclude the session.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male vocals dominate the intro over upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music. (2) A clear female voice takes over to explain the rules of Korfball in a professional yet friendly tone. (3) During the practice montage, various sound effects (SFX) like whistles, cartoonish 'whoosh' sounds, and bursts of laughter from the crowd are heard. (4) The audio transitions into intense match sounds, featuring the squeaking of sneakers on the court and rhythmic shouting. (5) A suspenseful musical sting plays during a missed shot, followed by a loud, collective 'Ohhh!' cheer and triumphant music when a goal is finally scored. (6) The video ends with clapping and congratulatory talk.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text appears: '今天我們要上的是合球課' (Today we are taking a Korfball class). (2) Decorative hook: '合球前國手 陳俐心' (Former National Korfball Player, Chen Lixin) identifies the expert. (3) Rule explanations: '合球不能運球' (No dribbling in Korfball), '傳球' (Passing), '每顆球都是1分' (Each goal is 1 point). (4) Emotional captions: '突然的肉搏戰?' (Sudden physical battle?), '這條線超過!' (Crossed this line!), '進球!!' (Goal!!), '(失敗)' (Failure), '這集的MVP是...?' (This episode's MVP is...?).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rule Explanation -> Playful Training -> Match Highlights -> MVP Awarding

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young boy wearing a green cap and glasses eating noodles in a restaurant; he looks focused and satisfied. (2) The scene cuts rapidly to a night market where the boy and another child are eating fish cake skewers. (3) Transitions follow showing close-ups of Korean BBQ being grilled and cut, and the boy eating various foods like large cream buns, donuts, and rice. (4) An adult male in a white shirt and cap appears briefly, eating BBQ with a grimacing/intense expression of enjoyment. (5) The boy continues to eat a variety of Korean staples including Jajangmyeon (black bean noodles), fried chicken, dumplings, and ramen. (6) The final shot shows the boy in pajamas sitting on a sofa eating instant cup noodles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic music starts immediately. A male voice rhythmically chants the word 'Eat' in a repetitive loop that is perfectly synchronized with the fast-paced visual cuts. (2) The acoustic environment is dominated by this music and vocal track, making it a 'music-video' style edit. (3) No ambient noise from the restaurants or street markets is audible. (4) The audio maintains a consistent volume and energetic tone until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional/Hook Text: 'POV：去一趟韓國要花多少伙食費? 😂' (POV: How much for food expenses for a trip to Korea?) stays fixed at the top of the screen throughout the video. The tone is humorous and sets a budget-themed context for the food montage.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Fast-paced eating montage -> Final domestic eating shot

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male creator in a black shirt and white headphones sits behind a microphone, holding a paper list and gesturing enthusiastically. (3) A female co-host in a striped shirt appears, holding a pair of novelty hand-shaped food tongs. (4) The man displays a woven picnic basket and a numbered oil painting kit. (5) The man holds multiple bags of snacks toward the camera while talking.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays. A male voice speaks with high energy, rhythmically listing fruit names in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects like 'pop' and 'ting' occur during text overlays, followed by a burst of canned applause SFX. (3) A female voice enters with a bright tone, interacting with the male speaker about gift items. (4) The music and vocals continue at a high-density pace until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Mandarin subtitles translate the spoken content throughout. (2) Decorative Text: '可嘎 543' branding in the corner; large colorful labels for fruit types like '蘋果', '蔓越莓', '草莓'. (3) Promotional Text: '台灣在地小農' (Taiwan local farmers), '$1799 一起走走野餐組' (Picnic set price), and tiered gift labels like '消費滿1000 贈小手食物夾' (Gift for $1000 spend).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts on a snowy slope with three people: a man in a grey hoodie, a man in bright yellow overalls, and a small child in pink snow gear. The man in yellow is gesturing and shouting excitedly towards the camera. (2) The scene transitions to the three of them sitting together on a single snowboard. The man in the grey hoodie is at the back, the man in yellow is in the middle holding the child in pink at the front. (3) They begin sliding down the slope in this tandem position, picking up speed. The camera alternates between a side-along follow shot and a front-facing POV shot of the man in yellow's face, showing extreme excitement and wide-mouthed shouting. (4) They successfully reach the bottom of the slope together, still balanced on the single board, cheering and making peace signs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic male voices are heard shouting 'Da tui!' (meaning 'Big legs' or 'Strong helpers' in slang) repeatedly in an excited, rhythmic tone. (2) As they start moving, the sound of wind and the friction of the snowboard against the snow becomes prominent. (3) Continuous, high-pitched screaming and laughing from both the adult males and the child fill the audio track as they accelerate. (4) The shouting subsides into victorious cheers and a final 'Yeah!' at the end of the run.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV : 當滑雪絮教練有三隻大腿' - Decorative/Hook Text: Humorously suggests the instructor has three 'powerhouses' or strong helpers helping him slide.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Preparation -> Tandem Snowboarding Action -> Celebration

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a cafe environment where a man in a green sweatshirt and a woman in a striped shirt are talking excitedly. (2) They transition into a specially decorated room filled with birthday decorations, including a life-sized cardboard cutout of the man and various photo displays. (3) The camera pans across different zones: a selfie mirror with writing on it, a message board with postcards, and a wall of framed family photographs. (4) The man showcases various merchandise such as keychains, stickers, and a donation station. (5) The couple interacts with the space, posing with the cutout and demonstrating how to use the message board. (6) The video ends with a montage of the decorations and the couple shaking hands in front of large 'HAPPY BIRTHDAY' balloons.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music starts immediately with a fast tempo. (2) A male voice speaks very loudly and excitedly, explaining the concept of the 'Birthday Cafe'. (3) Occasional responses and laughter from a female voice are heard, acting as a supporting dialogue. (4) Various sound effects like camera shutters and chime sounds are used during scene transitions. (5) The music remains consistent in volume and style throughout the video, maintaining a festive atmosphere.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '今年生日不一樣' - Functional Text, celebratory tone. (2) '生咖' (Birthday Cafe) - Decorative Text, highlighting the theme. (3) '韓星規格' (Korean Star Standard) - Decorative Text, emphasizing the high quality of the setup. (4) '人生就是要HAPPY' - Decorative Text, positive emotional tone. (5) '誠實商店' (Honesty Shop) - Functional Text, explaining a specific section. (6) '逛逛不用錢' (Browsing is free) - Hook Text, encouraging visitors. (7) '7/15 - 7/20 內湖 - 哈姆咖啡' - Functional Text, providing event details.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Tour of decorated space -> Demo of activities and merch -> Closing invitation.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in an orange shirt and a woman stand on a busy city street corner in Taichung, introducing the first store of a tea brand. (2) The scene cuts to various storefronts including 'KEBUKE' and 'Yi Mu Ri', showing current views and historical photo overlays of the locations. (3) The man tastes a drink with yellow jelly/pearls, expressing a mix of surprise and appreciation through facial expressions and exaggerated gestures. (4) The duo visits 'Chun Shui Tang', where the man uses a rolled paper tube as a prop while explaining the shop's history. (5) Finally, they visit 'Like Tea Shop', where the man holds two different cups side-by-side to compare their designs and branding.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music plays continuously throughout the video. (2) A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, providing historical context and descriptions of the tea shops being visited. (3) A female voice occasionally chimes in with short comments, laughs, or reactions to the male host's statements. (4) Discrete sound effects like slurping are audible during the tasting segments. (5) Low-level ambient street noise, including passing vehicles, is occasionally audible beneath the music and vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text includes Chinese subtitles at the bottom of the screen translating all spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook text appears frequently, such as 'KEBUKE's original appearance' and specific store addresses in red/white boxes. (3) Key historical dates like '2008', '2012', and '1980' are highlighted on-screen to emphasize the longevity of the brands.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Shop 1 History -> Shop 2 Tasting -> Shop 3 History -> Shop 4 Comparison

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of orange, translucent softgel capsules resting in a small white ceramic dish. (2) Transition to a male creator with dyed brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt and large white over-ear headphones, sitting in a studio filled with figurines. He holds a dark blue product box (LPC-DHA) and speaks with exaggerated facial expressions and hand gestures. (3) He switches to a white product box labeled 'NMN' and displays a dish of white capsules, followed by a close-up of a single white capsule held between his thumb and index finger. (4) He introduces a third white box (Collagen) and shows a dish filled with fine white powder. (5) The final phase shows him holding up multiple boxes and pointing towards the camera, emphasizing the promotional deals.

A male voice speaks very loudly and enthusiastically in a mix of Mandarin and Hokkien, with a high-pitched and persuasive tone. (2) The music remains continuous at a moderate volume while the creator's voice fluctuates in pitch and intensity as he shouts specific prices and discount percentages. (3) Sounds of clapping are heard intermittently, coinciding with the creator's physical clapping to emphasize excitement. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic summary and a call to action over the same consistent upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '智慧達 LPC-DHA 新型態營養補給軟膠囊' appears as a title at the start. (2) Decorative Hook: '5折!' and '買一送一' appear in large, bold, colorful fonts with an excited tone to highlight the discount. (3) Functional Text: Pricing information like '兩盒$3000', '兩盒 1980!', and '兩盒 1680!' is displayed clearly. (4) Functional Text: Ingredient details such as '含有藻油 (DHA) 南極磷蝦萃取' and '日本酵母來源 NMN' are listed during product segments. (5) Decorative Hook: '嘎哥獨家優惠' and '限量 100 組' appear to create a sense of urgency and exclusivity.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a group of young people wearing birthday hats and cheering in an indoor hallway; a woman in the center is holding a plush doll and shouting excitedly. (2) A man is shown hanging a red and green honeycomb pineapple lantern on a wall while others talk to him. (3) A woman is seen in a bathroom pouring rose petals and blue liquid into a bathtub as the water runs; she is wearing a white face mask. (4) A woman wears a cardboard cake costume over her head, holding a rose in her mouth and smiling. (5) A man (the birthday boy) arrives home, sees the group, and immediately tries to flee into the elevator, but is chased and brought back. (6) In the bathroom, the woman in the cake costume and others pick up the man and place him into the bubble-filled bathtub while he laughs and protests. (7) The man lies in the tub, covered in foam, holding a rose and laughing at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy shouting and group cheering accompanied by upbeat, fast-tempo background music with a festive, comedic tone. (2) Sounds of dialogue in Mandarin, laughing, and the rustling of paper decorations. (3) The sound of running water and splashing in a bathtub as people chat excitedly. (4) Loud screaming and shouting as the man tries to run away, followed by the sound of rapid footsteps and the elevator chime. (5) Continuous laughter and playful shouting as the group carries the man; the music reaches a peak with sound effects like 'ding' or comic 'boing' sounds. (6) The man's voice is heard laughing and saying it feels comfortable while lying in the water, with the music fading into a light, happy melody.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 幫我們老闆過生日 - Hook text: 'Celebrating our boss's birthday' in large yellow font. (2) 鳳梨彩球 - Functional text: 'Pineapple paper ball'. (3) 洗澡囉 - Decorative text: 'Time for a bath!' with a playful tone. (4) 主人 歡迎回家 - Functional text: 'Master, welcome home' appearing over the woman in the cake costume. (5) 快逃 - Decorative text: 'Quick, escape!' as the man runs away. (6) 玫瑰泡泡浴 - Functional text: 'Rose bubble bath'. (7) 我抱你下去 - Dialogue subtitle: 'I'll carry you down'. (8) 高清無碼香香喔 - Decorative text: 'High-definition, uncensored and fragrant'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Preparation -> The Surprise/Chase -> The Bath/Resolution

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action recording in a studio. A woman in an orange fuzzy sweater and headphones is sitting on a brown sofa, gesturing and telling a story with an animated expression. (2) The scene cuts to two other women on a sofa listening intently; one is in a grey hoodie and black cap, the other in a black sweater and jeans. (3) The camera cuts to a man in a white sweater sitting in a red armchair, laughing and reacting to the story. (4) The woman in orange mimics holding a phone and speaking, her facial expressions conveying excitement. (5) As she reaches the climax of the story, the other women on the couch react with shock, putting their hands to their heads and screaming. (6) The man in the white sweater leans back and laughs heartily. (7) The storyteller continues to laugh and gesture wildly. (8) The video concludes with a white text overlay on a blurred background promoting a YouTube channel.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice is heard narrating an anecdote in a bright, energetic tone with a low-volume, upbeat BGM in the background. (2) Multiple voices (one male, two additional females) provide verbal feedback with interjections like 'Really?' and laughter. (3) The primary female speaker imitates a telephone conversation, switching to a deeper, formal voice to say 'Annyeong haseyo' in Korean. (4) The soundscape becomes chaotic with loud, high-pitched laughter and screaming from the female guests as the story peaks. (5) The female storyteller says 'Oppa, saranghae' in a playful, high-pitched voice. (6) The segment ends with a male voice laughing and the audio fading into a clean studio silence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken Mandarin and Korean throughout the video. (2) Decorative Text: Large captions like '真的假的' (Really?) and '安寧哈塞呦' (Annyeong haseyo) appear with laughing face emojis. (3) Hook Text: '完整影片請上蔡阿嘎543頻道收看' (Watch the full video on the Tsai Aga 543 channel) appears at the end in a professional font.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Storytelling Climax -> Group Reaction -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a striped yellow shirt holds a bottle of Salat dish soap and his phone, speaking excitedly to the camera. (2) He shows a Dcard post on his phone and begins preparing a foaming bottle with the dish soap. (3) Wearing a colorful headband, he applies thick white foam to his face and washes it in a plastic tub. (4) The scene shifts to a bathroom where he washes his hair with the dish soap and then has a woman scrub his back with it. (5) Finally, he stands with the woman, comparing the skin on his two arms, one washed with dish soap and one with body wash, before scratching his arm in discomfort.

(2) The sound of a pump being pressed and water splashing is heard as the man washes his face. (3) In the bathroom, the acoustics change to include natural reverb from the tiled environment along with the sound of running water. (4) A second, calmer female voice enters as she interacts with the man. (5) The music continues at a steady energy until the man's voice shifts to a tone of physical discomfort at the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a shot of a white sedan parked on an outdoor street. A hand enters the frame, pointing at a blue foam block attached to the edge of the driver's side door. (2) The camera zooms in to provide a close-up view of the blue sponge, which consists of several layers of foam. (3) The camera pans out slightly to show the car's side profile, then zooms back in on the sponge as the hand continues to point at it. (4) The camera maintains a focused shot on the door-edge guard until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking in Mandarin Chinese with a casual and observational tone. Background noise consists of muffled city ambient sounds and light wind. (2) The narration continues as the primary audio source, with the speaker explaining the purpose of the blue sponges on car doors in Korea. (3) No background music or significant sound effects are detected throughout the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken narration, explaining that Korean car owners use these blue sponges to prevent door-edge collisions, even if they look slightly out of place.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a live-action video. Two young women stand in an office setting and bow deeply as a man in a brown jacket enters from the right. (2) The man removes his brown outer layer to reveal a black hoodie, handing it and a green varsity jacket he was carrying to the two women. (3) The man gestures while speaking, then hands a broom and a dustpan to the women before gesturing for them to leave. (4) The two women walk toward an exit, and the man begins to sweep the marble-patterned floor with the broom.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Multiple female voices greet the boss in unison with a respectful tone. A male voice responds casually. (2) The male voice asks a question about monthly performance. (3) A female voice answers with a specific high number. (4) The male voice gives a short instruction, accompanied by the sound of plastic cleaning tools being handled. (5) An upbeat, rock-style song with male vocals and distorted electric guitars starts and continues until the end as the sound of sweeping is heard.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：老闆該有的樣子' - Decorative hook text, implies a standard for how a boss should behave. (2) '老闆好' - Functional subtitle, translating a greeting to the boss. (3) '早 怎麼樣' - Functional subtitle, translating 'Morning, how's it going'. (4) '這個月業績多少了' - Functional subtitle, translating an inquiry about performance. (5) '報告老闆 300 萬' - Functional subtitle, reporting 3 million in sales. (6) 'OKOK 那早點下班啊' - Functional subtitle, translating 'OK, get off work early then'. (7) '謝謝老闆' - Functional subtitle, translating gratitude.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Employee Interaction -> Twist (Boss cleans)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with light brown hair wearing a blue hoodie and a red cross-body bag stands inside a retail store, gesturing enthusiastically while speaking to the camera. (2) The scene cuts between his energetic talking head and close-up shots of various household products: professional-looking kitchen knives on a display, makeup brushes, bags of makeup sponges, a brown travel toiletry bag, a green stainless steel water bottle, and a black microwave-safe cooking pot. (3) A young woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a quilted jacket, joins the man to examine and demonstrate the items. They both express surprise and excitement, pointing at price tags and product details in a brightly lit, modern minimalist retail environment with wooden shelves.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced pop background music plays continuously throughout. A male voice speaks in a high-pitched, excited tone with rapid delivery, occasionally shouting for emphasis. (2) A female voice enters, speaking in a friendly and conversational tone as she interacts with the male speaker. (3) Occasional ambient sounds of product packaging being handled and the faint murmur of other shoppers are heard beneath the dominant voices and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White Chinese subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken dialogue. (2) Hook/Effect Text: Yellow bold text at the beginning says '看到就進去撿便宜' (Enter when you see it to get bargains). Vertical colored boxes highlight '好用' (Useful), '好看' (Good-looking), and '便宜' (Cheap). (3) Pricing and Info: Large yellow text overlays indicate prices like '1000日圓', '200塊台幣', and '300日圓/60個'. (4) Origin Text: Large white text emphasizes '日本製' (Made in Japan) and 'Made in Japan' appears in a stylized font.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a massive orca leaping from a pool and crashing back down, sending a huge wave of water toward the audience. (2) The scene cuts to an indoor aquarium setting where a person is calmly pointing at a beluga whale swimming behind glass. (3) The footage shifts back to the outdoor stadium reality, where multiple orcas take turns splashing the crowd. People in the front rows are wearing blue raincoats and are getting completely drenched. (4) A young boy is shown in a close-up, screaming with his eyes closed as water pours over him. (5) A woman in a blue raincoat is seen laughing and wiping water from her face while holding a smartphone. (6) The camera pans to show the orca swimming near the glass, seemingly observing the wet crowd, followed by shots of people trying to dry off and laughing at their soaked state.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with loud, thunderous splashing sounds followed by immediate, high-pitched screams and cheers from a large crowd. (2) A calm, melodic J-pop song with soft piano and male vocals plays briefly during the 'expectation' segment. (3) The audio cuts back to the intense roar of water and chaotic crowd noise. A male voice (off-screen) is heard shouting in Mandarin, laughing and saying phrases like 'Alright, alright!', 'Too much!', and 'Tsunami!'. (4) The sounds of wet plastic raincoats rustling and water slapping against the seats are prominent. (5) The video ends with continued laughter and the sound of the orca surfacing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：實際上的海生館' (POV: Reality of the aquarium) - Hook text, informative tone. (2) 'POV：我以為的海生館' (POV: What I thought the aquarium was like) - Hook text, contrasting tone. (3) Blue banners at the top remain constant throughout most of the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Reality (Chaos) -> Expectation (Calm) -> Reality (Intense Splashing & Reaction)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a modern living room with two young boys; one stands near a low wooden table while the other lies face down on a white couch. (2) A series of jump cuts follow showing the boys wrestling on the couch, the younger one crawling on the older one, and both laughing. (3) They transition to playing near the dining area and under the large wooden table, mimicking animal-like crawling and hiding. (4) The boys stand in the center of the room performing a sequence of silly, exaggerated poses and dance moves, ending with them playing near the furniture again.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, playful MIDI-style background music starts immediately, featuring a bright piano melody and electronic percussion. (2) Two young male voices are heard shouting, laughing, and speaking in high-pitched, excited tones in Mandarin. (3) Cartoon-style sound effects (swish, boing, and sparkle sounds) are synchronized with the boys' sudden movements and gestures. (4) The music maintains a constant upbeat tempo throughout the video as the children continue their vocal play.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top Hook Text: 'POV：當爸媽沒在旁邊 桃貴.波能偷偷在幹嘛?' (POV: What are Taogui and Boneng secretly doing when parents aren't around?) - curious and engaging tone. (2) Bottom Hook Text: '男人的快樂。就這麼簡單' (A man's happiness. It's that simple) - humorous and relatable tone. (3) Functional Text: '喂馬吃個水果' (Feeding the horse some fruit) - descriptive and funny. (4) Functional Text: '然後一堆不知所云的動作' (Then a bunch of incomprehensible movements) - playful and observational.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Series of playful highlights -> Outro
