perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins at night outside an airport where several people are unfolding and holding a large red and white banner featuring cartoon faces and birthday wishes. (2) Inside the airport terminal, a large crowd of mostly young female fans is gathered behind a railing, cheering and holding up phones/cameras as if waiting for a celebrity. (3) A man in a white T-shirt and white shorts suddenly dashes past the crowd, pushing a child in a stroller at high speed. The scene transitions to various angles of this rapid 'escape.' (4) The duo is seen navigating through different parts of the airport, including the arrivals hall and toward the parking area, while the fans are left behind in a state of confusion and excitement. (5) A close-up shot displays a multi-layered birthday cake decorated with Dragon Ball Z characters. (6) The video concludes with the man and child inside a car, waving at the camera, followed by a still group photo of the fans holding the banner, labeled as a 'failed' celebrity chase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with high-energy, upbeat electronic background music accompanied by loud, high-pitched cheering and screaming from a crowd. (2) As the man starts running, fast-paced 'whoosh' and 'swish' sound effects are added to emphasize speed. (3) The music maintains a fast tempo during the chase sequence, with occasional loud ambient airport noises and the rattling of the stroller. (4) In the car, the music softens, and a male voice (adult) talks excitedly to a male child voice, who laughs and responds in a high-pitched, happy tone. (5) The video ends with a comedic 'failure' sound effect (a descending slide whistle or horn sound) during the final group photo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '原計劃接機排場 拉布條' (Original plan for airport pickup, pull banner) - Informative hook. (2) '明星等級接機服務' (Celebrity-level pickup service) - Humorous caption. (3) '蔡緯嘉' / '蔡桃貴' (Character names) - Identifiers. (4) '換個角度再看一次' (Look again from another angle) - Functional instruction. (5) '等等!' (Wait!) / '倒帶' (Rewind) - Directing viewer attention. (6) '驚訝指數 100%' (Surprise index 100%) - Emotional emphasis. (7) '混亂追逐' (Chaotic chase) - Descriptive hook. (8) '溫馨畫面呢!!!' (Where is the heartwarming scene!!!) - Comedic commentary. (9) '到底是要跑去哪裡' (Where on earth are they running?) - Comedic question. (10) '加速逃跑' (Accelerated escape) - Action description. (11) '小星球好快樂' (Little Star is so happy) - Emotional state. (12) '但是... 蛋糕在機場啊' (But... the cake is at the airport) - Plot twist/Humor. (13) '追星失敗' (Failed celebrity chase) - Final punchline.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro showing fan preparation -> Comedic reveal of the 'escape' from the fans -> Post-event reflection in the car.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a red bomber jacket and blue hoodie holds a coffee cup in a brightly lit clothing store, looking around with a surprised expression. (2) A woman appears, showing a white down jacket and then a black vest on a mannequin, pointing at the design details. (3) The woman holds up an oversized black long-sleeved shirt and demonstrates how to style it by tying another shirt around the waist/chest. (4) She holds up a grey tiered skirt and moves it to show the fabric. (5) The man examines denim pants and then picks up a white hoodie and a mustard-yellow sweater, reacting with exaggerated facial expressions and gestures to the low prices shown on screen.

(2) A cheerful female voice joins the conversation, discussing specific clothing items. (3) Sounds of hangers clinking and fabric rustling are audible beneath the voices. (4) Several cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings' and 'swishes' are used to highlight price reveals and transitions. (5) The man's voice becomes increasingly loud and shocked towards the end, punctuated by short bursts of laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '2990日幣' (2990 Yen) appearing with price conversions. (2) Decorative Hook: '「平價到爆」' (Extremely Affordable) in bold font. (3) Effect Text: '「我去看我的尺寸」' (I'm going to look for my size) appearing near the woman. (4) Emotional Hook: '我都沒在看價格！！' (I haven't even looked at the prices!!) in large yellow font. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-scene setup; one shot shows a man in a black t-shirt wearing a large, colorful traditional-style mask and a woman sitting on a sofa with podcasting equipment. (2) Frequent cuts transition to a different studio setup where another man in a white t-shirt and striped pants is sitting at a desk, eating noodles and laughing boisterously. (3) The camera alternates between these two locations as they engage in a lively discussion, with the man at the desk gesturing with chopsticks and pointing at the screen. (4) The video ends with a title card overlay promoting a YouTube channel.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice (masked) initiates a conversation about influencer collaborations in a questioning tone. (2) The soundscape is dominated by loud, frequent bursts of laughter from a second male voice, accompanied by the sounds of eating and chopsticks hitting a bowl. (3) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music plays throughout, providing a cheerful atmosphere. (4) A third male voice speaks clearly and professionally, describing a specific business collaboration, while the other participants react with vocal agreement and more laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White and yellow subtitles at the bottom center provide a transcription of the dialogue in Traditional Chinese. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Variety-show style captions like "第一名" (Number One) and "爽" (Refreshing/Great) appear in large, bold fonts to emphasize emotional peaks. (3) Hook Text: A final overlay states "完整影片請上蔡阿嘎543頻道收看" (Watch the full video on the Tsay A-ga 543 channel) acting as a call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a conversational flow with alternating shots between the interviewers on the sofa and the interviewee at the desk.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man sitting on a brown leather sofa in a studio setting, holding a stack of papers and speaking energetically. He wears a black t-shirt and white pants. (2) He gestures with his hands and claps them together while looking at the camera. (3) The scene cuts between him and a woman sitting next to him on the same sofa; she has long black hair and wears a grey overshirt, listening intently and occasionally speaking. (4) Close-up shots of the man's facial expressions show him transitioning from excitement to a humorous look of despair as he reveals financial figures. (5) Throughout the video, they are in a well-lit indoor space with bookshelves, Bearbrick figurines, and a Lawson Station sign in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks rapidly and with high energy, narrating a financial summary. Upbeat, rhythmic background music with a steady electronic beat plays throughout. (2) Frequent sound effects are heard, including rhythmic clapping, sharp 'ding' sounds coinciding with text appearances, and a 'boing' meme sound effect. (3) A female voice enters intermittently, providing supplementary information in a calm but engaged tone. (4) The overall audio is clear studio-quality recording with minimal ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional and hook text appears in yellow and white boxes: '新北法拍獲得 101100元' (New Taipei auction gain 101100 yuan), expressing a factual reporting tone. (2) Followed by '新北鑑價費 103200元' (New Taipei valuation fee 103200 yuan). (3) Dramatic hook text '我們倒賠 2100元' (We lost 2100 yuan) appears with an emphasis on the loss. (4) A list of additional costs appears sequentially: '不包含 查封的費用' (Doesn't include seizure fees), '員警車馬費' (Police travel fees), '鎖匠的費用' (Locksmith fees), '律師費' (Lawyer fees), and '人力成本' (Labor costs). (5) Final summary text '負 4700塊' (Negative 4700 dollars) is shown prominently to highlight the final outcome.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro to financial breakdown -> Itemized cost listing -> Final loss summary and commentary

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The content focuses on personal financial experiences rather than promoting a specific product.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action. A man wearing a black cap, sunglasses, and a black vest sneaks around a modern glass building under a clear blue sky. (2) He is joined by a woman in a white t-shirt and khaki pants; they crouch and point towards a distant target. (3) The scene transitions to a crowded airport or train station terminal where the duo follows a young couple from a distance. (4) The man in black drops a 10,000 yen bill on the floor near the couple, who pick it up with surprised expressions. (5) The duo then performs a 'relay' where they hand bottled drinks to the male of the target couple while running past him. (6) The video concludes in a souvenir shop where the target male holds a Mickey Mouse plushie box, and the woman from the tracking duo films the couple's emotional reaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic background music plays. A male voice speaks in a loud, energetic, and slightly mischievous Mandarin tone. (2) Ambient wind noise is heard during the outdoor scenes, followed by the sound of footsteps on a hard floor. (3) As the location shifts indoors, the soundscape includes muffled crowd chatter and distant public announcements. (4) Cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) such as 'dings' and 'swishes' play when text overlays appear or when the money is dropped. (5) The vocals become hushed and excited as the duo hides and watches the couple. (6) The music transitions into a more rhythmic pop style with a steady beat during the drink-handing sequence, eventually becoming softer in the final shop scene.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '嘎老闆尾隨' (Boss Ga stalking) - Hook text explaining the video's premise. (2) '死對頭!!' (Arch-rival!!) - Decorative text adding comedic emphasis. (3) '尾隨目標抵達' (Stalking target arrived) - Functional text marking a narrative phase. (4) '怎麼掉了一萬塊!!' (How did 10,000 yen fall!!) - Dramatic hook text. (5) '接力' (Relay) - Functional text describing the action. (6) '接不接受!!' (Accept or not!!) - Hook text creating suspense for a proposal moment.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Stalking/Observation -> Prank/Intervention -> Climax (Proposal support)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with an exterior shot of a cafe/restaurant called 'Ya Kou' (牙口) in Beitou, Taipei, showing its signage and entrance with plants. (2) The scene shifts indoors to a group dining. A woman in a blue sweater and a man in a black 'Dodgers' t-shirt are seen tasting pasta and pizza, expressing enjoyment through wide eyes and thumbs-up gestures. (3) The setting transitions to an outdoor market stall named 'Little Swallow Underwear Shop' (小燕子內衣店). The same man and a woman in a black crop top interact with an older female shop owner. A character wearing a large traditional Taiwanese mask (Gongzi) stands nearby. (4) The group jokes around with a mannequin wearing black mesh underwear, with the older woman laughing and making playful gestures towards the man.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy Mandarin and Taiwanese vocals begin immediately, with a man and woman talking excitedly over a medium-tempo, upbeat pop BGM. (2) The sounds of a restaurant environment, including the clinking of forks and plates, are audible as the speakers comment on the food's taste. (3) The audio transitions to a bustling outdoor market atmosphere with louder, more chaotic overlapping voices, laughter, and high-pitched exclamations from the older woman. (4) Frequent sound effects (SFX) such as cartoon-style 'boing' sounds and emphasized laughter tracks are used to punctuate the humor.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '牙口 台北市北投區大興街9巷45號' (Address for Yakou Cafe). (2) Hook Text: '第一家先介紹我們Taco家啦' (First introducing Taco's home/place). (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '好脆好香喔!!' (So crispy and fragrant!!) used to emphasize the food reaction. (4) Functional Text: '小燕子內衣店' (Little Swallow Underwear Shop) identifying the second location. (5) Hook Text: '小燕子大爆料' (Little Swallow's big reveal) appearing during the humorous exchange.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Restaurant Food Tasting -> Market Shopping & Comedy interaction

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man wearing a red jacket and a blue hoodie standing on an outdoor street, looking startled and cupping his hand to his ear as if listening for something. (2) He points excitedly at a large poster outside a restaurant that features a massive pile of grilled meat. (3) The scene shifts indoors where the man is seated at a table; a waitress places a colossal serving of pork cutlets and a mountain-sized bowl of rice in front of him. (4) A countdown timer appears on screen (3, 2, 1) and the man begins to eat the rice and meat rapidly using chopsticks. (5) A montage follows showing the man stuffing his face with large bites, displaying exaggerated expressions of enjoyment and struggle, while a woman sitting next to him observes and eats her own meal. (6) The video concludes with several quick cuts of the man eating intensely, ending on a promotional graphic directing viewers to a YouTube channel.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, fast-paced electronic background music begins immediately. A male voice speaks loudly and enthusiastically in Mandarin, with a questioning tone. (2) As the scene transitions to the restaurant, the music remains upbeat. Loud chewing and swallowing sounds are audible, occasionally accented by 'pop' or 'ding' sound effects to highlight text appearances. (3) A female voice is heard laughing and providing short, encouraging comments in the background. (4) The audio maintains a high-tempo, chaotic energy throughout the montage, concluding with the music fading out as a final call-to-action is delivered.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '聽到什麼' (What do you hear?) - Hook text. (2) '有沒有聽到啊' (Did you hear it?) - Functional text. (3) '呼喊我們期待著嘎哥要來挑戰大胃王了' (The cries of expectation for Ga-ge to challenge the big eater) - Decorative hook text. (4) '十分鐘吃完不用錢' (Eat it all in 10 minutes and it's free) - Functional informational text. (5) '總共1.5公斤' (Total 1.5kg) - Functional informational text. (6) '挑戰開始' (Challenge start) - Functional transition. (7) '好好吃~' (So delicious~) - Emotional caption. (8) '被抓包' (Caught red-handed) - Comedic variety-show style text. (9) '嘎哥是否挑戰成功?! 請至YT頻道看正片' (Did Ga-ge succeed?! Go to the YT channel to watch the full video) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Challenge Reveal -> Time-lapse Eating Montage -> Cliffhanger CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male host in a white t-shirt and green pants stands in front of a large green logistics truck, cupping his hands to shout. (2) The host walks along a roadside chain-link fence with a female companion, pointing towards the distance. (3) The duo walks through a park-like area with trees, carrying plastic bags of food towards a stone pavilion. (4) A split-screen visual shows two bento boxes being opened to reveal large pork chops, rice, and vegetables. (5) The host and his companion sit in the pavilion, eating from the bento boxes with chopsticks and showing animated facial expressions of enjoyment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts with high-energy male vocals shouting excitedly. (2) Dialogue between the male host and female companion begins, characterized by a humorous and loud tone. (3) Comical sound effects (SFX) like a 'whistle' and 'slap' are interspersed during dialogue transitions. (4) The sound of rustling plastic bags and opening bento lids is heard as the music continues. (5) Conversational voices dominate the audio as they eat, including sounds of chewing and exclamations of satisfaction, over a consistent rhythmic BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: '今天非常的特別' (Today is very special). (2) Hook text: '尋找交流道的老司機便當' (Searching for the old driver's bento at the interchange). (3) Decorative effect text: '打臉' (Slap in the face) appears with a graphic when a contradiction occurs. (4) Descriptive text: '老司機必備(?) 涼亭' (Old driver's must-have(?) Pavilion). (5) Subtitles: '這雞腿好好吃喔' (This chicken leg is so delicious) and '北港在地囝仔' (Local kid from Beigang).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in an outdoor parking lot during the daytime where a man in a light blue shirt and a woman in a striped shirt are standing in front of a black Mercedes-Benz. The man is gesturing and talking animatedly. (2) Two other young men join them, and the group engages in a lively, humorous conversation with frequent laughing and exaggerated gestures. (3) The camera focuses on specific details of the car, including the Mercedes-Benz emblem, the AMG logo, and the C43 model badge. (4) The scene shifts to the trunk being opened, where they joke about the contents, and the man in the blue shirt carries a large gear bag and a power tool. (5) Transition to the interior of the car showing the dashboard, steering wheel, and infotainment screen. (6) The woman takes the driver's seat while the man sits in the back, reacting with dramatic facial expressions and physical jolts as the car accelerates and maneuvers on the road.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music plays throughout. A male voice speaks loudly and excitedly in a mix of Mandarin and Taiwanese Hokkien, punctuated by frequent laughter from both the male and female participants. (2) The audio includes rhythmic dialogue between the four characters in the parking lot with clear, studio-like vocal quality despite being outdoors. (3) Sound effects (SFX) such as variety-show style 'ding' or 'boing' sounds are interspersed with the dialogue. (4) As the car starts moving, the roar of the engine revving and the whistling sound of a turbocharger are clearly audible. (5) Inside the car, the male voice becomes more high-pitched and frantic during acceleration, accompanied by the muffled sound of wind and tires on the road.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '車主出來之前' (Before the owner comes out) and '我們邀請我們的業務啦' (We invite our salesperson). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '你們兩個怎麼長得一樣' (Why do you two look the same?) with a humorous tone. (3) Functional Text providing car specs: 'C系列就是轎車的入門款' (C-series is the entry-level sedan) and '這台3000cc' (This one is 3000cc). (4) Decorative Text: '球棒 甩棍' (Baseball bat, Baton) appearing when discussing the trunk. (5) Decorative Hook: '看到路面只有一半' (Can only see half the road) emphasizing the height/view from the driver's seat.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in parking lot -> Detailed car inspection -> Driving experience and reactions

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a white t-shirt, blue shorts, and a cap stands with a young boy in a grey shirt in front of a colorful amusement park entrance; the man makes peace signs and looks excited. (2) A woman with long brown hair and sunglasses joins the man near the entrance as they talk to the camera. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor playground where the boy is crawling through blue and yellow tube structures. (4) The boy is then seen on various outdoor attractions: a small blue train ride and a rope-swing zip line where he glides across a wood-chip floor. (5) The boy changes into swimwear and plays at a water park area, sliding down a yellow and blue inflatable slide into a pool and standing under a water-dumping bucket. (6) The video ends with the man standing outdoors near the pool area, gesturing and smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music with a fast tempo starts immediately. The man's voice is high-pitched, loud, and very enthusiastic as he introduces the location. (2) The music continues at a slightly lower volume, serving as a background for a conversational dialogue between a man and a woman discussing prices and features of the park. (3) Ambient sounds of an indoor playground are heard, including echoes and the boy's joyful shouting. (4) Various cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) such as dings and slides are layered over the music during the ride sequences. (5) The soundscape is dominated by water splashes, rushing water from the bucket, and children laughing. (6) The man provides a concluding remark with a friendly and satisfied tone as the music reaches its peak and fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '千葉 兒童王國' (Chiba Children's Kingdom) serves as the main title at the top of the screen. (2) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the video translate the spoken dialogue. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: Price labels like '大人 ¥900' and '小朋友 ¥200' appear in large, bold fonts to emphasize affordability. (4) Decorative/Effect Text: Emotional labels such as '很Chill', '好冰哦', and '厲害' appear near the boy to highlight his reactions and the atmosphere.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Price and Logistics Discussion -> Indoor Playground Demo -> Outdoor Rides Demo -> Water Park Fun -> Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male creator wearing a white hat and a black-and-white patterned shirt stands in front of a shop named 'Feeling 18', gesturing enthusiastically. (2) Close-up shots show rows of colorful, heart-shaped, and round chocolates in a refrigerated display case. (3) The creator and three women are seen inside the shop, pointing at chocolates and tasting them; their facial expressions transition from curiosity to exaggerated surprise and delight. (4) A box of square dark chocolates is presented, and a small black pick is used to lift one piece. (5) The creator stands outside holding a massive croissant next to a standard-sized one for comparison. (6) A shot of a woman taking a large bite of the giant croissant and giving a satisfied expression. (7) A male staff member in a black uniform and beret explains something behind a gelato counter. (8) Close-up shots of 'Nama Shokupan' (toast) being pulled apart to reveal its soft texture. (9) The creator concludes the video by pointing downwards toward an on-screen text link.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music with a strong beat begins immediately. A male voice speaks rapidly and excitedly. (2) Ambient shop sounds are heard, including the low hum of people and the clicking of display cases. (3) Multiple female voices join in, laughing and making high-pitched 'Mmm' sounds of approval. (4) A loud clapping sound effect (SFX) and a 'ding' sound are used to emphasize moments of food tasting. (5) The staff member's voice is heard, speaking in a professional yet friendly tone about ingredients. (6) The music remains consistent in volume until the end, where the male creator's voice becomes more rhythmic, emphasizing a call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '夏天就帶你們來吃個冰' (Functional: Let's go eat ice in the summer). (2) '伴手禮' (Functional: Souvenirs). (3) '好漂亮 這裡跟精品店一樣' (Functional: So beautiful, it's like a boutique). (4) 'Omar 威士忌酒心' (Functional: Omar Whiskey liqueur center). (5) '好好吃' (Decorative: Delicious, with exclamation marks). (6) '巨可頌' (Decorative: Giant Croissant). (7) '馬告鹽之花—比賽冠軍款' (Functional: Maqaw and Fleur de Sel - Championship flavor). (8) '超級蓬鬆' (Decorative: Super fluffy). (9) '官網下訂直接宅配' (Functional: Order on official website for home delivery).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Itemized Food Tasting (Chocolates, Croissant, Gelato, Bread) -> Call to Action

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a person wearing a large orange mask with blue hair and a cartoonish face, sitting on a brown leather sofa, talking into a professional microphone. (2) The scene cuts to a woman sitting on the same sofa, wearing headphones and a grey cardigan over a black tank top, laughing. (3) The camera then shows a man in a black t-shirt and white pants, also wearing headphones and holding a smartphone, sitting in a red chair and laughing while gesturing with his hands. (4) The video continues to cut between these three characters as they engage in a lively discussion, with the background filled with shelves of figurines and Japanese-style artwork.

(4) The audio contains intermittent canned laughter sound effects and light, upbeat background music that maintains a playful atmosphere throughout.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a white t-shirt and a woman in a striped shirt are inside a car; they are arguing intensely with exaggerated facial expressions, and the man appears to be eating something that belongs to the woman. (2) The scene shifts to the man, now wearing a yellow overshirt, standing excitedly in front of a shop called 'Ruyi Sunny Cake' (如邑堂). (3) He enters the shop and interacts with an elderly pastry chef (Master A-ming), gesturing wildly. (4) The video transitions to a kitchen workshop where the man and the chef are preparing 'Truffle Sunny Cakes' with detailed close-ups of the pastry layers and ingredients like black truffle and dough being rolled. (5) A series of close-up product shots follow, showing different flavors of pastries being sliced or broken open to reveal fillings. (6) The man is seen tasting the pastries with highly emotional, positive reactions. (7) Finally, the man is shown leaving the shop carrying multiple branded gift bags.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat, and comical music plays throughout. Loud, shouting voices of a male and female arguing in Mandarin and Taiwanese Hokkien dominate the start. (2) The male voice becomes high-pitched and enthusiastic, introducing the shop with high energy. (3) Sounds of dough being rolled and kitchen activity are layered with the energetic BGM. (4) A deeper, older male voice (the master) explains the pastry-making process in a friendly and professional tone. (5) Frequent comical sound effects (SFX) like pops and dings emphasize specific actions or text reveals. (6) The music remains consistent in tempo until a final crescendo at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '!!!!!' and variety-show style captions like '好吃啊' (So delicious) and '去台中' (Go to Taichung) appear to emphasize the argument. (2) Functional text identifies the shop: '如邑堂' and its accolades: '五屆太陽餅冠軍' (5-time Sunny Cake Champion). (3) Product feature text: '120層純手工 黃金比例' (120 layers handmade, golden ratio), and descriptions of ingredients like '義大利頂級野生松露' (Top Italian wild truffles). (4) Product name labels: '松露太陽餅', '法式國王太陽餅', '抹茶', etc. (5) Closing hook text: '送禮就選 五屆太陽餅冠軍 如邑堂' (Choose the 5-time champion for gifts).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro conflict in car -> Journey to the shop -> Behind-the-scenes production -> Product showcase and tasting -> Outro/CTA.

The narrative then shifts to showcase the high-quality, handmade nature of the products, specifically highlighting the 'Truffle Sunny Cake' and other varieties to drive sales and brand awareness.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit subway station corridor. A man wearing a beige utility shirt and a white cap stands in the foreground, holding a Lucario plush toy and showing his phone screen; a woman in a grey t-shirt stands behind him, gesturing excitedly. (2) They walk along a long wall decorated with thousands of Pokémon cards and large posters of Mega Gardevoir and Lucario. (3) The man approaches the wall and carefully peels off a Pokémon card sticker, revealing a Lucario card. (4) Detailed shots show the promotional posters for the 'Super Evolution' series and 'Super Courage/Super Symphony' expansion packs. (5) The man performs a celebratory dance holding his card, while the woman holds a Mega Gardevoir plush in the background. (6) The video concludes with the man walking towards the camera, encouraging viewers to visit the station and buy the cards.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic BGM starts immediately. A male voice speaks loudly and enthusiastically in Mandarin, explaining he is at the station at 6 AM on Father's Day. (2) Ambient subway station echoes are heard in the background but are secondary to the vocals and music. (3) Occasional female laughter and short exclamation phrases complement the main narration. (4) Sound effects such as 'shing' or 'pop' are used when text overlays appear or when the card is peeled. (5) The music maintains a constant high-tempo rhythm until the end of the video, fading out as the man finishes his closing statement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins at night outdoors in front of a modern architectural structure with curved lines. A young man in a black shirt is talking to the camera, introducing two people wearing large, caricature-like masks. (2) The setting shifts to an indoor restaurant with stainless steel tables. A man wearing a short brown bob wig and sunglasses is seen eating fish cakes from a cup. (3) Chronological close-ups of various Korean dishes follow: sizzling grilled pork belly (samgyeopsal) on a grill and a large, steaming pot of pork bone soup (gamjatang). (4) The man in the wig and the host are shown eating enthusiastically, with the guest in the wig making exaggerated expressions of pleasure and satisfaction. (5) The video concludes with more eating shots and close-ups of the food being lifted with chopsticks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy Mandarin vocals from multiple male speakers are heard alongside upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music. (2) Ambient noise of a bustling restaurant environment, including the clinking of metal dishes and muffled background chatter, becomes prominent. (3) Distinctive sound effects (SFX) such as 'boing' or 'pop' sounds are used to accentuate comedic moments and text appearances. (4) Eating sounds like slurping and chewing are clearly audible during the food close-ups. (5) The vocal intensity remains high throughout, with frequent laughter and excited exclamations from both male and female voices.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '我們終於邀請到我們B哥' (We finally invited our Brother B), '來到我們的韓國啦' (Come to our Korea). (2) Decorative Hook Text: '吃10樣韓國在地美食' (Eat 10 kinds of local Korean delicacies), '總分100分' (Total score 100 points). (3) Content Labels: '烤五花肉' (Grilled pork belly), '馬鈴薯燉排骨' (Pork bone soup). (4) Emotional/Variety-show Text: '太滿足' (So satisfied), '逐漸 K 化' (Gradually becoming K-ified), '9局下半' (Bottom of the 9th inning).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at outdoor landmark -> Transition to restaurant -> Sequential tasting and evaluation of multiple dishes.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an outdoor park setting where a young man in a black shirt is walking; suddenly, another individual in a light green hooded jacket and mask runs up and tries to snatch his bag. (2) They engage in a theatrical struggle with dramatic zooming effects. (3) The 'thief' stops and reveals their identity, leading to a friendly exchange. (4) The main creator opens his bag to display several packets of 'migoo' mixed nuts. (5) Close-up shots transition to a studio setting showing the nuts being poured onto a plate and high-quality macro shots of the ingredients. (6) The creator is shown eating a nut with an exaggerated, wide-eyed expression of satisfaction. (7) Back in the park, they approach a third man sitting on a bench; the creator gives him some sample packets while they talk. (8) Images of other brand products, including boxed noodles and pork jerky, flash on the screen. (9) The creator stands in front of the camera, pointing and gesturing enthusiastically for the closing segment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, tense music plays initially, accompanied by the sound of scuffling feet and muffled shouting. (2) The music transitions into a bright, high-energy variety-show style BGM as the men start talking. (3) Male vocals are dominant, characterized by a loud, high-pitched, and extremely energetic tone in Mandarin. (4) A descriptive narration begins, explaining the product features over the upbeat music. (5) Ambient park noise is minimal, but sound effects like 'dings' and 'crunching' are added for emphasis during product shots. (6) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic call to action and a short musical sting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles translate the fast-paced Mandarin dialogue throughout the video. (2) Hook text like '網路聲量第一名' (Ranked No. 1 in online volume) and '堅果界的愛馬仕' (The Hermes of the nut world) appears in bold, colorful fonts. (3) Product specifications and certifications like 'A.A. Clean Label' and 'iTQi' awards are listed during the demonstration. (4) Decorative text such as '現在嘎哥團購中' (Ga Ge's group buy is now active) and the creator's social media handle '@yga0721' appear toward the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Theft) -> Comedic Reveal -> Product Demonstration -> Social Interaction -> Call to Action

(7) The video returns to the man in the parking lot who points to the camera and gestures urgently to emphasize the final message.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a lime green t-shirt appears in a brightly lit indoor living room, repeatedly asking a question and showing various items like a mask, brush, and a stack of cash. (3) Scene shifts to a bathroom where the man is shown pumping shampoo into his hand and washing his hair in the shower. (4) Close-up shots follow, showing the man drying his hair with a hairdryer and showcasing the fluffy, thick texture of his hair from various angles. (5) Finally, he returns to the living room setting, enthusiastically pointing at the product and then toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat background music starts with rhythmic vocal cues in Mandarin repeating 'Want this? Use this!' accompanied by 'pop' sound effects. (2) A male voice speaks with an enthusiastic, fast-paced, and humorous tone, describing the problems of aging and hair loss. (3) The audio shifts to a more informative narrative style over the same upbeat BGM, explaining product features like absorption and cooling sensations. (4) Ambient sounds of water splashing are heard briefly during the shower scene. (5) The video ends with the narrator's loud, persuasive concluding remarks and a final musical flourish.

(2) '抗老化 洗髮神品' (Anti-aging hair wash holy grail) emphasizing the product category. (3) 'Dr.FORHAIR 固髮煥活洗髮露' (Brand and product name). (4) Lists of problems: '掉髮' (hair loss), '敏感' (sensitive), '乾燥' (dry). (5) '比毛孔小2500倍' (2500x smaller than pores) as a functional tech claim. (6) '蓬鬆' (Fluffy), '清爽' (Refreshing) describing results. (7) '好市多獨家販售中' (Exclusively on sale at Costco) as a functional CTA.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a black baseball cap and a white shirt talks directly to the camera in a studio setting, displaying a collection of gold coins in a binder. (2) Close-up shots show various commemorative coins with anime characters and Osaka landmarks. (3) The man walks through the streets of Osaka near the Tsutenkaku Tower, showing the large crowds. (4) He enters a souvenir shop and uses a commemorative coin vending machine. (5) He visits the Tennoji Zoo, showing signs and various animal enclosures including giraffes and zebras. (6) He travels to the Harukas 300 observation deck, shows his ticket, and looks out of the floor-to-ceiling windows on the 60th floor at the city below. (7) The video ends with him standing against the city skyline view.

(2) The music continues as the man narrates his journey, with occasional sound effects like bells and pops when text appears. (4) The audio maintains a consistent high-energy pace through the transitions between locations.

(2) Decorative Text: "相見恨晚" (Regret meeting so late), "人超多!!!" (So many people!!!), "喜歡" (Like). (3) Location/Status: "大阪通天閣", "天王寺動物園 GET", "Harukas 300 Observation Deck Ticket", "第60樓".

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man in a white t-shirt and denim shorts sitting on a grey sofa, looking at his phone. A woman in a black top and blue shorts leans against him. He reacts with exaggerated annoyance, pointing at her face and then his shirt to indicate her makeup might stain it. (2) Scene transitions to a cafe-like setting. The man, now in a blue patterned shirt over a white tee, complains loudly while the woman eats cake. There are multiple cakes and colorful mugs on the table. (3) The man is then shown mopping a white floor while the woman lies on the sofa behind him, casually scrolling through her phone. They engage in a heated, comedic argument about housework. (4) The setting shifts outdoors in front of a storefront. The man shouts towards the sky in frustration because the shop is closed, while the woman looks on sheepishly. (5) In a walk-in closet filled with clothes, the woman shows him two different dresses. He continues to look at his phone while giving perfunctory, supposedly 'clever' responses. (6) The video ends with him looking excited at the mention of divorce assets, pointing at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a loud, sudden shout followed by upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music with a strong beat. A male and female voice engage in high-pitched, exaggerated shouting matches. (2) Throughout the video, various comedic sound effects (SFX) are used, including a deep monster-like roar ('evil dragon roar') and sharp 'ding' or 'boing' sounds to punctuate jokes. (3) The dialogue is primarily in Mandarin with some Taiwanese phrases, delivered with high intensity and fast speech density. (4) The BGM remains constant in energy, providing a rhythmic backdrop to the rapid scene transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Header text: 'POV：男人結婚後的轉變' (POV: Changes in men after marriage) is visible at the top throughout. (2) Decorative variety-show style text appears frequently to emphasize emotions: '欸!' (Hey!), '靠什麼靠' (What are you leaning on), '惡龍咆哮' (Evil dragon roar), '誰比較划算還不知道' (Still don't know who gets the better deal). (3) Functional white subtitles are provided at the bottom to translate all spoken dialogue into traditional Chinese characters.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Series of comedic conflict scenarios -> Punchline conclusion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young boy wearing a black t-shirt and colorful tie-dye shorts is seen jumping between concrete blocks in an outdoor coastal parking area. He moves with confidence while another child stands in the background. (2) As the boy attempts to jump from a wall to a block, he slips and falls backward over the wall, landing on his back with his legs flailing in the air. The fall is repeated with slow-motion and zooms. (3) The boy gets up, laughing and smiling, and walks towards the camera. A woman's hand enters the frame to check on him, and he continues to laugh while adjusting his bag.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo funk-style music starts immediately. An adult male voice is heard narrating excitedly in Mandarin, reacting to the boy's parkour moves. (2) As the boy falls, the narrator's tone shifts to dramatic surprise followed by loud, infectious laughter from both a male and a female off-camera. (3) The boy's own high-pitched laughter is heard as he stands up. The upbeat music continues at a consistent volume until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional and Hook Text: '跑酷小子' (Parkour Boy) appears at the start. (2) Hook Text: '跑酷之耀' (Glory of Parkour) and '炫接倒數' (Transition Countdown) as he prepares to jump. (3) Decorative Text: '突然的地板動作' (Sudden floor move) and '動作分數 8.7分' (Action score 8.7) appear during the fall, conveying a humorous tone. (4) Decorative Text: '跑酷(X) 仆街小子(O)' (Parkour X, Fall-on-street Boy O) appears as a sarcastic correction. (5) Closing Text: '謝謝精彩的演出' (Thanks for the wonderful performance) appears at the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a bright red t-shirt stands in a white hallway, speaking directly to the camera with an exaggeratedly confused and surprised facial expression, gesturing with his hands. (2) The scene cuts to a modern living room/dining area where a young boy in a striped shirt sits on a white sofa; the camera pans to another young boy with glasses standing nearby. Both boys look at the man calmly. (3) The scene cuts back to the man in the red shirt in the hallway, who continues to speak with high energy, looking shocked as he explains a fact to the viewers, using wide hand gestures to emphasize his point.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched, and slightly surprised tone. Upbeat, fast-tempo background music with a light electronic feel begins. (2) The male voice asks a question, followed by a young boy's voice responding clearly and confidently. A 'ding' sound effect plays when the boy answers. (3) The primary male voice returns, speaking more rapidly and loudly, expressing realization. The music continues at a steady volume, and ambient indoor silence is maintained in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A large blue box at the bottom of the screen contains white text: '難道只有我不知道? 太陽系現在是八大行星' (Is it just me who didn't know? The solar system now has eight major planets) with a surprised emoji. (2) Decorative Text: A pink slanted banner appears near the top with the text '八大行星' (Eight major planets) and a planet emoji. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles in white appear at the bottom, synchronized with the spoken dialogue, documenting the conversation about Pluto being removed from the planet list in 2006.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a white t-shirt with a blue and beige geometric pattern stands against a plain wall, pointing and gesturing towards the camera with a serious yet exaggerated expression. (2) He is then shown in various home settings performing chores: picking up a white laundry basket and pulling out 1000 NTD bills from a white cloth; rummaging through a polka-dot bag on a table and spreading out many receipts; standing in a kitchen with a yellow food packet; and opening a white storage cabinet to hide rolls of cash inside product boxes. (3) He is seen vigorously wiping a large white table with a cloth. He finds a pile of white powder on the table, takes out a black credit card, and humorously mimics snorting the powder before being interrupted by a woman in a black dress. (4) The man and woman engage in an animated discussion, with the woman holding a yellow and blue box. (5) The scene shifts to the man standing behind a table piled high with dozens of product boxes (Shipwell/Funcare), waving his hands excitedly and holding up various small product packets.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy upbeat background music starts. A male voice speaks loudly and emphatically in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects such as a cash register 'cha-ching' and sharp 'pop' sounds are heard as the man reveals money or transitions through tasks. The music maintains a constant high tempo with heavy electronic percussion. (3) The audio shifts to a dialogue between the male and a female voice; the male tone is defensive and humorous, while the female tone is questioning and slightly amused. Ambient room noise is minimal. (4) The music swells in volume as the man enters a high-pressure sales pitch mode, his voice becoming extremely loud, fast, and enthusiastic, punctuated by shouting to emphasize 'group buy' deals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '為什麼男人應該包辦所有家事?' (Why should men do all the housework?). (2) Task labels: '洗衣' (Laundry), '包包、發票' (Bags, receipts), '煮飯' (Cooking), '整理收納' (Organizing). (3) Functional subtitles translate the dialogue. (4) Humorous alerts: '⚠️個人儲蓄警告⚠️' (Personal savings warning). (5) Product promotion text: '船井牛奶鈣魚膠原粉', '愛用推薦2年', '船井高成長優惠團' (Funcare growth promo group). (6) Call to action: '手刀下單' (Order quickly), '贈品送的更多' (More free gifts).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Comedy Sketches of Housework Benefits -> Interaction with Spouse -> Product Endorsement -> Group Buy CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a parody presented in a 1:1 social media format. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white button-down shirt, stands in front of a beige curtain background. She looks directly at the camera with a somber, serious facial expression. (2) As she speaks, she gestures with her hands and holds up a white piece of paper representing a 'DNA report'. Large yellow and white text overlays frame the scene. (3) Towards the end, a man in a black t-shirt enters from the right side of the frame. Both characters immediately break character, laughing and cheering excitedly while looking at the scripts in their hands.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in a deep, professional, and slightly melancholic tone. The background features slow, suspenseful piano music that creates a serious atmosphere. (2) The female narration continues at a steady pace, detailing a dramatic story. (3) The serious music is interrupted by a loud, high-pitched, and extremely energetic male voice shouting 'Yes!' and 'Can do it!'. The woman joins in with an excited, higher-pitched tone. Sound of papers rustling is audible during the celebration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top banner: '真相 PART 3' (Truth PART 3) in large yellow characters, conveying a sense of urgent exposé. (2) Bottom banner: '劇本1 嘎哥把逆轉劇本寫好了 接下來就靠你至已了 +0' (Script 1: Ga Ge has finished the reversal script, now it's up to you +0), suggesting the scene is a staged performance. (3) Mid-screen variety-style captions: '侵佔款項事件' (Embezzlement case), '99.99%有親子關係' (99.99% parent-child relationship), and 'Yes DNA', used for dramatic emphasis and comedic effect.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Serious exposé parody -> Sudden reveal of 'behind-the-scenes' celebration

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short brown hair wearing an oversized white T-shirt holds a blue-and-white checkered hand flag, standing behind a wooden desk in an office-like room with Japanese woodblock prints on the wall. He gestures energetically towards another man whose back is to the camera. (2) The man in white performs a simulated ring-toss game with his hands, catching an invisible or CGI object from the other man and then showing a stern, wide-eyed expression. (3) The man in white addresses the camera directly with intense facial expressions, pointing his finger and moving closer to the lens in a series of fast-cut close-ups. (4) He continues to wave the flag vigorously and make exaggerated gestures while speaking. (5) The video transitions to several slides of full-screen text detailing legal regulations, followed by a final white screen displaying government logos and official text.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male vocals start immediately, speaking in a loud, fast-paced, and enthusiastic tone reminiscent of a variety show host. Upbeat, rhythmic background music with a strong electronic beat begins. (2) Frequent cartoon-style sound effects (whistles, sharp 'dings', and 'whooshes') occur in synchronization with the actor's gestures. (3) The vocal tone shifts between a comical, high-pitched salesman persona and a very deep, serious, and stern warning tone. (4) The music remains consistent in tempo but fades slightly when the speaker delivers the more serious legal warnings. (5) The final sequence features a slightly more subdued musical tail during the text slides and logos.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: Continuous Traditional Chinese subtitles detailing the spoken dialogue about e-cigarette regulations. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Large, colorful variety-show style captions appear such as '電子煙哦 :)' (E-cigarette oh), '罰五萬' (Fine 50,000), '通通都違法' (All are illegal), and '5千萬' (50 million) to emphasize key points. (3) Legal Information: Sequential slides (1) (2) (3) detailing specific articles of the Tobacco Hazards Prevention Act and corresponding fines. (4) Branding: Official titles '衛生福利部 國民健康署' (Ministry of Health and Welfare, Health Promotion Administration) and '新竹市衛生局' (Hsinchu City Health Bureau) are displayed at the end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts inside a bright airport terminal where a woman with long dark hair in a light-colored top is seen running away from the camera, pushing a luggage cart. (2) She is followed by two young boys in matching green tracksuits and other companions. They move through the glass doors to the outdoor passenger pickup area. (3) Outside, the woman is playfully 'captured' or pulled into the back of a white car that features colorful custom graphics including birthday greetings and photos. (4) The two boys quickly follow her into the car while a man filming the scene continues to record their departure. The woman waves back from the car window as the door closes.

(2) A male voice, likely the one filming, shouts excitedly in Mandarin, 'Mom's being taken away!' with a playful, exaggerated tone of panic. (3) Children's high-pitched voices and laughter are heard as they run. (4) The sound of a car door opening and closing is audible amidst the continued commentary and laughter from the group.

(3) Functional Text: Signs in the background show 'Welcome to Taiwan' and directions for 'Taxi' and 'North Meeting Point'.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair in a black shirt stands in a brightly lit studio, holding a red envelope and speaking enthusiastically as confetti falls over him and a group of people behind him. (2) The scene transitions to a card game on a wooden table; a man in a black t-shirt looks surprised while holding cards. (3) A woman in a light blue shirt reveals a full 'One Dragon' hand (cards 1-13 in sequence), accompanied by a 3D gold dragon animation weaving through the cards. (4) The camera captures chaotic reactions, including close-ups of the man in the black shirt laughing hysterically with his mouth wide open and the woman in blue jumping and clapping in excitement. (5) The group continues to laugh and point at the cards on the table while the man in the black shirt gestures towards the woman.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic, upbeat background music begins with a male voice shouting enthusiastically about a 'Harvard Studio' competition. (2) Sound of cards shuffling and being placed on a table, interspersed with expectant murmurs and short bursts of laughter. (3) A sudden, high-pitched scream of excitement from a female, followed by a loud, synchronized 'Whoa!' from the group and the sound of frantic clapping. (4) Chaos of multiple voices shouting in Traditional Chinese; one male voice is heard laughing uncontrollably in a high-pitched tone. (5) The music stays upbeat as the vocal density increases with everyone talking over each other in a celebratory manner.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: '來啦我們一年一度的' (Here comes our annual...). (2) Hook text in large yellow/blue blocks: '哈佛工作室' (Harvard Studio) and '三節獎金爭霸賽' (Three-Festival Bonus Championship). (3) Decorative text: '一條龍' (One Dragon) with a gold dragon emoji. (4) Emotional captions: '幸福的快要死掉' (So happy I could die) and '真的假的啦' (Are you serious?). (5) Suspicious/Humorous hook: '你們是不是串供' (Are you guys colluding?) and '綜藝之神降臨囉' (The God of Variety Shows has descended).

(6) The male character sits on a wooden fence outdoors, speaking directly and intensely into the camera, gesturing with his gloved hands. (7) Quick flashes of the Taipei Arena building and a website for 'hahababy' featuring various clothing items. (8) The male character delivers a final close-up provocative monologue ending with a title card over a dark, smoky background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Intense cinematic music starts abruptly with a loud, aggressive female shout. (2) A deep, authoritative male voiceover (announcer style) begins, speaking dramatically in Mandarin over a fast-paced electronic beat. (3) Sound effects of heavy punching thuds and wind whooshes accompany the visual montage. (4) The soundtrack transitions to a high-energy, suspenseful background track as the male character speaks in a mix of Mandarin and Hokkien; his tone is provocative and loud. (5) Ambient park noises are barely audible under the dominant music and vocals. (6) The video ends with a dramatic musical swell and a deep echo effect on the final spoken title.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '2025 哈佛工作室鉅獻' (2025 Harvard Studio Presentation) - dramatic tone. (2) Decorative: 'AB合約終局之戰' (AB Contract Finale Battle) - suspenseful hook. (3) Hook: '【拳上羅拉】' (Punch on Lola) - central title. (4) Functional: '一場價值三千萬的拳賽' (A boxing match worth 30 million) - informative. (5) Decorative: '不叫黑衣人 不拿鐵鎚 不躲廁所' (No black-clothed men, no hammers, no hiding in toilets) - satirical tone. (6) Hook: '我的hahababy就是台灣製' (My hahababy is Taiwan-made) - defensive and proud tone. (7) Functional: '2025.4.1 台北小巨蛋' (2025.4.1 Taipei Arena) - event date/location. (8) Hook: '再給你100萬獎金' (Give you another 1 million prize) - aggressive emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Fast-paced cinematic intro -> Montage of conflict themes -> Direct character provocation -> Call to action for event tickets.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a hype trailer/parody promotion for a staged boxing event between two influencers to resolve a publicized dispute. It uses aggressive visuals, dramatic music, and call-out text to build excitement for the event and drive ticket sales for the 'Punch on Lola' match scheduled at Taipei Arena, while simultaneously promoting the 'hahababy' clothing brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal mention of the brand, display of the official website, and clothing store background.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of Hokkien-Mandarin code-switching and highly expressive/comical anger characteristic of Taiwanese variety style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video blends real-world influencer drama with high production value professional wrestling-style promotion techniques to create viral engagement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a purple T-shirt stands in a well-lit indoor room, holding a grey and white striped shirt. A large green text box covers the bottom half of the screen. (2) A still image of actor Greg Han (Kuang-Han Hsu) in a Uniqlo ad appears briefly, showing him in a similar striped shirt. (3) The man in the purple shirt returns to center frame, looking intensely at the camera before dropping his head slightly as large black text reading '不可能' (Impossible) appears over him. (4) Another man wearing the striped shirt walks into the frame from the right, standing next to the first man and adjusting the shirt while looking at the camera. The background remains a domestic interior with a wall clock and shelves.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced male vocals speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin over an upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM. (2) The music continues as the speaker asks a question with a rising tone. (3) A sharp, comical impact sound effect plays as the man says 'Impossible' and the tone shifts to a more deadpan delivery. (4) The music transitions into a lighthearted, slightly mocking comedic melody as a second voice is briefly heard and the first man makes a final comment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '最近很多人看了許光漢代言UNIQLO 的形象照片覺得很帥' (Context about Greg Han's Uniqlo ad). (2) Functional Text: '紛紛敲碗嘎哥 想要嘎哥教大家 怎樣用一件簡單的襯衫 就可以穿搭出許光漢的帥氣感？' (Request for a fashion tutorial). (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '如何穿上Uniqlo就跟許光漢一樣帥' (Main title hook). (4) Decorative Text: '不可能' (Humorous punchline). (5) Decorative Text: '你再怎麼穿，還是蔡宗翰' (Personalized joke referencing the individual on screen).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A lemur eats a carrot chunk in an enclosure. (2) A man wearing a striped cap and cream shirt imitates the lemur's fast chewing and wide-eyed expression. (3) A giraffe is fed a carrot by a hand over a fence. (4) The man imitates the giraffe's tongue movement while being fed lettuce by another hand. (5) A capybara in a small pool shakes its head rapidly while eating. (6) The man, sitting in a restaurant, is fed a carrot by a young boy and imitates the capybara's rapid head-shaking and chewing. (7) An extended scene shows the young boy at a restaurant table continuously feeding the man edamame and other vegetables; the man sticks out his tongue and mimics animalistic eating behaviors while the boy laughs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic music starts with a repetitive vocal hook that sounds like "num num num num" synced to the eating motions. (2) The music continues at a steady volume while the man makes faint exaggerated munching sounds. (3) Ambient restaurant noise becomes audible, including the clinking of dishes and the high-pitched laughter of a child. (4) The man speaks briefly in a playful, joking tone toward the child as the music fades slightly in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook/Decorative: "POV: 這輩子當人真可惜" (POV: What a pity to be human in this life) appearing at the top in white text on a black background, conveying a humorous and self-deprecating tone. (2) Functional: "這小子服務不錯" (This kid's service is not bad) appears at the bottom with a laughing emoji, indicating the man's satisfaction with his son's feeding actions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a Comparison -> Demonstration flow, contrasting animal eating habits with a man's humorous imitations.

It uses a structured comparison montage where the creator first imitates various zoo animals eating, then applies this 'animal behavior' to a real-life situation where his young son feeds him at a restaurant, creating a comical and heartwarming father-son interaction.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific brand promotion or direct call-to-action regarding the food or location is present.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator (Cai A-ga) uses his signature comedic facial expressions and involves his children in common social media trend formats.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen view. The upper half shows a woman in a white button-down shirt standing against a plain background, while the lower half displays large text overlays. (2) The woman holds a stack of papers (a script) and looks down as if reading, maintaining a serious expression. (3) A man enters the frame from the right side, wearing a black shirt, and begins gesturing wildly towards the woman, pointing and shouting with an exaggeratedly joyful expression. (4) Scene transitions to another 'script' phase where the woman continues reading, then occasionally looks up at the camera. (5) The man reappears, throwing papers into the air and celebrating enthusiastically. Both characters end the video laughing and waving towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, synthesized pop background music plays with a moderate tempo. (2) A female voice begins speaking in a calm, steady narrative tone, reading text from a script. (3) A male voice abruptly enters, shouting with high energy and excitement, using words like 'Yes!', 'Bravo!', and 'Woo!'. (4) The woman's voice returns, maintaining a slightly more emotional but still scripted tone. (5) The male voice dominates the final section with loud cheering, laughter, and celebratory exclamations as the music reaches its peak volume.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '真相 PART 3' (Truth Part 3) - Hook. (2) '劇本 4 頻繁高額消費事件' (Script 4: Frequent High-Value Consumption Incident) - Title text. (3) '劇本 4+5 嘎哥把逆轉劇本寫好了 接下來就靠你至已了 +0' (Script 4+5: Brother Ga has written the reversal script, now it's up to you +0) - Hook text. (4) Multiple lines of functional subtitles appearing in white/yellow, detailing a narrative about money, 'Lola', and 'Andy'. (5) '劇本 5 我想對ANDY說' (Script 5: I want to say to Andy). (6) 'Bravo', 'Yes', '怎麼輸?' (How can we lose?) - Emotional decorative text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Scripted Reading -> Interrupted Celebration -> Scripted Reading -> Final Celebration

The content uses a 'scripted' format to mock recent controversies involving internet personalities (referencing names like Lola and Andy), turning what might be a serious narrative into a comedic performance for entertainment.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While the characters mention a social media account at the end, it is presented as part of the skit's conclusion rather than a paid commercial placement.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with the main creator in a light blue t-shirt and white cap, standing with a woman in front of a colorful 'ENTRANCE' sign at a zoo, gesturing excitedly. (2) The scene transitions to a zoo enclosure where two young boys are being sprayed with water by elephants; the boys laugh and jump around. (3) The family is then shown running through a bamboo forest toward a two-story wooden treehouse structure. (4) Inside the treehouse, the camera pans across a minimalist room with white beds and a wooden ladder. (5) The final segment shows the family feeding carrots to various animals including giraffes, deer, and capybaras, with lemurs jumping onto the creator's shoulders.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat pop music plays as the main male vocal introduces the trip in an excited, high-pitched tone. (2) The soundscape shifts to include loud splashing water and the high-pitched screams and laughter of children. (3) During the treehouse tour, the music volume drops slightly to allow the family's 'oohs' and 'aahs' to be heard clearly. (4) The final phase features consistent upbeat music interspersed with the sounds of animals munching on carrots and the creator's playful reactions to the lemurs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我們要去動物園住一晚' (Variety-show hook, excited tone). (2) '大象要噴水!!' (Decorative warning text, energetic tone). (3) '我們的家', '是樹屋!!' (Functional titles identifying the setting). (4) '被卡皮巴拉包圍' (Descriptive caption, humorous tone).

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a cream sweater showing exaggerated surprised expressions as different gift boxes are moved in front of him. (2) He turns to join a male and female friend sitting at a table with a portable BBQ grill and plates of raw meat and vegetables. (3) The man engages in a lively discussion with the friends, with frequent cuts showing them eating and reacting. (4) A close-up shot shows a hand pouring a golden translucent liquid from a branded foil pouch into a clear double-walled glass. (5) The three individuals stand together, each holding different colored gift boxes (red, green, beige), gesturing enthusiastically towards the camera. (6) The video ends with a group shot where they continue joking and posing with the products.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop BGM begins immediately. A male voice speaks with high energy and an enthusiastic, fast-paced tone in a mix of Mandarin and Hokkien. (2) Frequent sound effects including 'swooshes' for transitions and comedic 'pings' or impact sounds are heard. (3) The dialogue shifts between the three characters, maintaining a cheerful and humorous atmosphere with clear, studio-quality recording. (4) The music remains constant in the background, reinforcing the energetic promotional message until the final seconds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White and yellow traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom, transcribing the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Yellow name tags like '台北_周先生' and '新北_王小姐' label the participants. (3) Hook Text: Large colorful variety-show style captions like '农纯乡中秋礼盒' (Nongchunxiang Mid-Autumn Gift Box) and '任选两件79折' (21% off for any two items) appear in bold fonts to emphasize key selling points and the holiday theme.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a first-person POV shot of a hand pressing a round pedestrian crossing button on a metal pole in a city setting. (2) The hand then points toward a traffic light across the street, showing the red man signal. (3) As the light turns green, the camera stays on the hand which counts from one to five using fingers against the background of the crossing. (4) A scene transition shows a wide shot of the same man in a grey beanie and black shirt pressing the button and sprinting across the crosswalk. (5) He reaches the other side just as the light changes, turning back to the camera with arms outstretched in a gesture of disbelief and amusement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with upbeat, quirky background music and the distinct, rapid beeping of an Australian pedestrian crossing signal. A male voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin about the speed of the lights. (2) The speaker counts 'one, two, three, four, five' clearly in Mandarin in sync with his finger movements. (3) The sound of the man's quick footsteps on the pavement and his heavy breathing become prominent as he runs. (4) The music reaches a playful climax as he stops and laughs on the other side of the street.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '澳洲雪梨。行人紅綠燈只有5秒？' (Sydney, Australia. Pedestrian crossing light only 5 seconds?) appearing at the top as a hook. (2) Decorative Text: '雪梨都市傳說' (Sydney Urban Legend) in a bold red banner, conveying a sense of mystery or investigation. (3) Decorative Text: '行人紅綠燈只有5秒' (Pedestrian crossing light only 5 seconds) appearing at the end in a larger, emphasized font for dramatic effect.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> POV Counting -> Action Sprint -> Reaction/Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. A male host with white headphones and a beige vest sits in a studio filled with Dragon Ball figurines, speaking enthusiastically into a microphone. (2) Cut to a male guest with glasses wearing a beige shirt, holding papers and explaining a concept while gesturing. (3) Transition to a shot of a woman in a denim jacket sitting next to a man wearing a large, humorous yellow face mask with blue hair; they both listen and react to the guest. (5) Fast cuts between all four individuals as they engage in a lively debate, with various cartoonish text overlays appearing around them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music with a clear beat begins. A high-pitched, excited male voice speaks in Mandarin. (2) A second male voice with a steady, professional tone enters, providing an explanation while the music continues at a lower volume. (3) Sound effects like a metallic 'ding' and comedic 'pop' sounds are heard alongside the host's loud laughter. (4) Multiple voices, including a female voice and more male voices, join in a fast-paced conversation with some Hokkien phrases intermixed. (5) The soundscape ends with a mix of upbeat music, group laughter, and enthusiastic shouting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '所以包租代管是合法的東西' (Functional: Inquiry about the legality of lease management, curious tone). (2) '只要你誠實納稅' (Functional: Explanation about paying taxes, professional tone). (3) '???' (Decorative: Floating over a character, skeptical tone). (2) With a sudden, forceful movement, he rips his shirt open and throws it aside, revealing his bare, muscular chest and abs as the woman claps in surprise. (3) The man leans down extremely close to the woman's face, placing his gloved hands around her neck and face in a mock-intimate gesture before pulling back to strike a final pose as the crowd cheers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Loud, upbeat electronic dance music (EDM) with a heavy bassline plays at a high volume. (2) As the action intensifies, the soundscape is filled with high-pitched female screaming and enthusiastic crowd cheering that partially masks the music. (3) A man's voice is heard shouting excitedly in Japanese over the steady beat and the continuous roar of the audience as the performance concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: Colorful graffiti on the background wall reads 'MUSCLE BAR FUKUOKA', identifying the venue and its energetic theme. (2) Decorative Text: Labels on the table coasters read 'MUSCLE BAR', reinforcing the brand identity of the establishment.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair, wearing a white oversized t-shirt and silver-white headphones, sits in a studio and speaks into a professional microphone while holding a script. The studio background has colorful illustrations and collectibles. (2) Transition to a close-up of a Taiwanese Unified Invoice (lottery receipt) where a specific character in the URL is circled in red to show a typo. (3) A woman in a denim jacket is seen reacting on a sofa. (4) The man holds up large poker cards (King of Hearts) to demonstrate a second trivia fact about the missing mustache.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat background music starts. A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin with high-pitched emphasis. (2) Sounds of a crowd cheering and laughing are heard as the first trivia point is made. (3) A female voice reacts with surprise and interest. (4) The music continues at a consistent tempo as the man explains the second fact, ending with a celebratory sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 我們傳統的統一發票 (Functional: Traditional Unified Invoice). (2) 小維 (Decorative: Name of the person/segment). (3) 統一發票為了防止作弊 每期會有一兩個不一樣的錯字 (Hook: Unified invoices have 1-2 typos to prevent fraud). (4) Do you know? (Hook). (5) 完整影片請上 蔡阿嘎543頻道收看 (Functional: CTA to watch full video on Tsai Aga 543 channel).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Trivia Fact 1 (Invoice) -> Reaction -> Trivia Fact 2 (Poker Card) -> Outro CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Three people—a man in a red t-shirt, a man in a black t-shirt with sunglasses, and a woman in a white dress—stand next to a red Tesla Model Y in a parking lot; the man in red gestures excitedly at the front of the car. (2) The scene transitions to the interior, where the woman sits in the backseat, touching the white leather upholstery and pointing at the entertainment screen located behind the center console. (3) The video cuts to shots of the car driving on roads and highways; the camera alternates between the driver's face (man in red), the passengers' reactions, and exterior shots of the red car moving through traffic.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop background music starts. Multiple male voices are heard speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin with high-pitched tones. (2) The music continues as the acoustic environment shifts to the interior of the car, where voices sound slightly more resonant; a female voice is heard expressing surprise and delight. (3) As the car begins to drive, muffled ambient road noise is heard, followed by several loud, synchronized shouts of 'Oh!!' and 'Woah!' from all speakers, indicating excitement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '這台什麼行頭' (What is this outfit/style?), 'Model Y 煥新版' (Model Y Refreshed Edition). (2) Decorative Text: '白內裝' (White Interior), '還有電視' (And a TV), '你真的很騷' (You're really flashy/showy). (3) Hook Text: '隔音真的好蠻多的' (The soundproofing is really much better), '完全聽不到風切聲' (Can't hear the wind noise at all), '從地獄到天堂' (From hell to heaven).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Exterior -> Interior Feature Walkthrough -> Driving Experience Test

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a stylized text card over a yellow brick wall background. (2) It transitions to a studio setting where a male host, wearing a white shirt and headphones, is speaking animatedly into a microphone. (3) A female guest is sitting on a brown sofa, reacting to the host's trivia questions with expressions of surprise and skepticism. (4) The scene frequently cuts between the host's excited gestures and close-ups of the guest. (5) Periodic text cards reappear to introduce new trivia segments. (6) The video concludes with an end screen featuring a promotional image and text directing viewers to a full video on another channel.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Enthusiastic male vocals open with a trivia question, accompanied by upbeat, medium-tempo background music and audience laughter sound effects. (2) The soundscape features a mix of the host's high-pitched shouting and a female guest's occasional laughter and brief comments. (3) Mid-video, the host performs a short, melodic vocal snippet of a popular song. (4) Various sound effects like 'ding' for correct facts and loud 'Oh!' reactions are interspersed throughout the dialogue. (5) The audio remains a clear studio recording with minimal ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '小陳1016 在台灣被棄養的嬰兒會跟當地的市長同一個姓' (Trivia about abandoned babies having the same surname as the mayor), tone is intriguing. (2) Functional Text: Variety-show style subtitles like '誰知道' (Who knew?), '騙人' (Liar), and '好可怕' (So scary), reflecting emotional reactions. (3) Decorative Hook: '小M 加油站附設廁所是宋楚瑜所提出的構想' (Trivia about gas station toilets), tone is informative. (4) Decorative Hook: '當你孤單你會想起誰 原唱不是張棟樑' (Trivia about the original singer of a song), tone is surprising. (5) Promotional Text: '完整影片請上 蔡阿嘎543 頻道收看', tone is instructional.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a black hoodie stands in a bathroom setting, demonstrating a white multi-hook hanger by hanging several shirts on it. (2) The scene cuts to the same man in a red jacket inside a 3coins store in Japan, holding the packaged product and gesturing excitedly. (3) Back in the bathroom, he demonstrates the 'magic' feature by pressing a button, causing the clothes to drop off the hangers instantly. (4) He then shows a step-by-step process of inserting the hanger into shirts and expanding the arms. (5) He demonstrates the individual release mechanism and the split-side release function while pointing at the specific buttons on the hanger frame.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and quirky background music starts with a male voice speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin. (2) Frequent mechanical clicking and snapping sounds are heard as he operates the plastic hanger mechanism. (3) The vocal tone remains high-pitched and energetic throughout, with specific sound effects (like a 'whoosh') used during transitions. (4) The music continues steadily until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '日本3coins 神奇懶人衣架' (Japan 3coins Magic Lazy Hanger) - Title hook. (2) '推薦大家如果有來日本 3coins 必買好用衣架' (Recommend to everyone, if you come to Japan, must buy this 3coins hanger) - Recommendation. (3) '嘎哥示範怎麼用' (Ga Ge demonstrates how to use) - Character intro. (4) '掛衣服很簡單 插進去、打開、固定 不用另外拿衣架' (Hanging clothes is easy: insert, open, fix; no need for extra hangers) - Functional instruction. (5) '8件衣服一起收' (Collect 8 pieces of clothing together) - Feature highlight. (6) '這是什麼懶人福音啦' (What kind of gospel for lazy people is this) - Emotional reaction. (7) '收右邊4件 轉右邊 收左邊4件 轉左邊' (Collect 4 on the right, turn right; 4 on the left, turn left) - Instructional. (8) '這神奇發明誰想的? 很懶耶 這要找嘎哥業配吧' (Who thought of this magic invention? So lazy. Should find Ga Ge for a sponsorship) - Closing hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Store Reveal -> Practical Feature Demo -> Closing Commentary
