perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator wearing a white t-shirt stands in a bright indoor kitchen, introducing a motorized fruit peeling machine. She pours green grapes into a clear cylindrical device. (2) The device spins rapidly, and the scene cuts to reveal perfectly peeled grapes in a small bowl. (3) The creator introduces a mini hand-held mop, demonstrating its use on a black induction cooktop and then rinsing/squeezing it over a kitchen sink. (4) She introduces a metal kebab rack for an air fryer, assembles meat and vegetable skewers, and cooks them; she is then shown eating a finished skewer. (5) She concludes by gesturing towards the products on the counter, with graphic overlays indicating her final recommendations.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese. (2) Sounds of a mechanical motor whirring are heard during the grape peeling sequence. (3) Water splashing and mechanical clicking sounds occur as the mini mop is demonstrated and squeezed. (4) Audio includes the sound of biting and chewing during the kebab tasting. (5) The music continues at a steady tempo until a final variety-show style 'ding' sound effect marks the conclusion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: 【無用小廢物實測】 (Testing Useless Little Items) appears at the top throughout. (2) Functional: 1. 水果削皮機 (1. Fruit Peeling Machine) with subtext '1號選手：葡萄' (Contestant No. 1: Grape). (3) Hook: 完全去皮!!! (Completely peeled!!!) with a heart-eye emoji. (4) Functional: 2. 迷你小拖把 (2. Mini Mop) and '見證奇蹟的時刻' (Moment of witnessing a miracle). (5) Decorative: 不實用 (Not practical) with a cartoon bear icon. (6) Functional: 3. 氣炸鍋串烤架 (3. Air Fryer Kebab Rack) and '出爐囉' (Out of the oven). (7) Decorative: 推薦 (Recommended) marked with green checkmarks for the peeler and rack.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. A group of adults and children are gathered in a modern urban plaza with glass-walled buildings, waving and cheering at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to the interior of a luxury cruise yacht where a man in a purple tie-dye shirt is seated at a dining table talking to a young boy. (3) The camera moves to the deck of the boat, showing a panoramic view of the Sydney Opera House. The man and a woman pose for photos with the landmark in the background. (4) The final segment shows the man and woman inside a brightly lit supermarket, inspecting milk cartons in a refrigerator and holding up packaged clothing items in the aisles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat pop music begins immediately with the sound of a group cheering and laughing. A woman's voice excitedly introduces the concept of an Australian trip. (2) The music volume decreases, transitioning to a dialogue-heavy phase. A male voice speaks in a playful, teasing tone to a child, accompanied by the low-frequency hum of a boat engine and ambient indoor chatter. (3) Music swells again as high-pitched female voices scream excitedly upon seeing the Opera House. (4) Ambient supermarket noise (refrigerator hum, distant overhead paging) becomes the primary background as the male and female voices discuss prices and products in a fast-paced, conversational manner.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Today we're taking them to find ex-boyfriends and ex-girlfriends... Australia trip'. (2) Decorative Text: 'Dinner on a Sydney Harbor yacht'. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the conversation between the father and son regarding seasickness and 'Mommy'. (4) Decorative Text: 'Sydney Opera House' and 'Sydney New Year's Fireworks' appearing with digital sparkle effects. (5) Functional Text: Price comparisons for milk and the brand name 'BONDS' highlighted with variety-show style stickers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook/Intro -> Yacht Dining -> Sightseeing Highlights -> Local Shopping Observation

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male character in a blue shirt sitting in a room, holding a whiteboard and marker, looking directly at the camera with an expressive face. (3) Throughout the video, there are frequent cuts between the couple's reactions, close-ups of the written answers on the boards, and split-screen views showing both of them simultaneously. (4) The characters engage in exaggerated gestures, such as laughing loudly, hiding their faces, and pointing at each other in response to the revealed answers. (5) The setting remains a brightly lit indoor space decorated with newspaper clippings and a large green plant.

(2) An off-screen male voice is heard asking a series of questions in a clear, professional tone. (3) The on-screen male and female characters provide verbal responses, often accompanied by loud laughter, cheering sound effects (SFX), and playful banter. (4) Specific SFX like buzzers for mismatches and bell dings for correct or funny moments are used to emphasize the game's progress. (5) The audio remains clear with studio-quality recording, focusing on the high-energy dialogue and the background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (3) Hook Text: Emotional stickers and captions such as '(So exciting?!)', '(Boss's stamina is great)', and '(Middle finger of love)' are used to highlight specific humorous or shocking moments.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man wearing a grey t-shirt sits cross-legged on a bed with white sheets; three varieties of Nissin Cup Noodles are arranged in front of him. He holds a unique white plastic utensil that combines a fork and spoon. (2) Close-up shot showing the utensil's handle groove being used to clip the lid of a cup noodle closed. (3) Close-up shot demonstrating the spoon-like curve of the utensil scooping up ingredients from the soup. (4) Close-up shot showing the wavy tines of the fork successfully gripping noodles to prevent them from slipping. (5) Close-up shot demonstrating the tip of the utensil perfectly matching the inner curve of the cup bottom to scoop up leftover bits. (6) The man eats the noodles with an exaggeratedly happy and surprised facial expression, gesturing to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male vocals begin speaking in Traditional Chinese with a fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music track. (2) The speaker describes a specific promotion in Japan where buying three cups of noodles for 500 yen gets you a special utensil. (3) The audio features various sound effects (dings and swooshes) synchronized with text overlays, alongside the speaker's enthusiastic exclamations like 'Amazing!' and loud slurping sounds while eating. (4) The music maintains a constant high-tempo rhythm throughout the demonstration phases until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '天才發明' (Genius invention) - Hook text. (2) '日清杯麵專用匙' (Nissin Cup Noodle dedicated spoon) - Functional Title. (3) '用途一' (Use 1), '用途二' (Use 2), '用途三' (Use 3), '用途四' (Use 4) - Functional labels for the demonstration. (4) '完美卡住' (Perfectly stuck), '方便吃料' (Convenient for toppings), '避免麵滑' (Avoid noodle slipping), '貼合杯碗' (Fits the bowl) - Descriptive labels for features. (5) '推薦各位去試試' (Recommend everyone to try it) - Closing hook text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Intro -> Feature Demonstration (1-4) -> Tasting/Reaction -> CTA

(4) Cai Aga holds up a price list written in Japanese and points to specific figures while looking at the camera. (5) A Japanese woman in a white and blue bikini is shown sitting in a bathtub filled with bubbles, playing with the foam. (6) Back in the studio, Ah Xian gestures wildly to describe an experience, while Cai Aga and Er Bo react with exaggerated laughter and shock, with Cai Aga waving a stack of papers.

(4) Cartoonish sound effects (boings, sparkles, and a 'wow' chime) are used to punctuate specific reactions or scene transitions. (9) '請我幫她脫她的衣服' (Asked me to help her undress) - Sensational hook. (10) '百分百還原就是這個' (100% restoration is this) - Affirmation.

(5) The music volume increases slightly during the closing promotional segment as the male voice delivers a final call to action.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a POV shot of an airplane cabin, showing two passengers across the aisle: a man in a grey sweater and a woman in a leopard-print hat. Both are wearing masks and look toward the camera. (2) The camera focuses down on an airplane meal tray. Hands enter the frame and meticulously begin folding napkins, tying plastic bags, and nesting empty containers into each other to maximize space. (3) The process continues as individual food wrappers are compressed and tucked into the main plastic tray. (4) A quick cut shows a completely cleared and organized tray with all waste contained under the lid of one bowl. (5) A brief comparison shot shows a different, messy tray with items scattered. (6) The video concludes with the man in the grey sweater putting his hands together in a gesture of gratitude and giving a thumbs-up while pointing at his neat tray.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track begins immediately and plays throughout the entire video. There are no spoken vocals detected. (2) The music maintains a consistent rhythm without any significant shifts in tone or volume. (3) The subtle, constant white noise of an airplane cabin (engine hum) is audible in the background behind the music. (4) Occasional low-frequency sound effects (soft rustling/thuds) accompany the visual actions of cleaning, but they are mostly masked by the BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：潔癖人吃飛機餐' (Hook text, excited tone). (2) '難道只有我會這樣？' (Hook text, questioning tone). (3) '垃圾打結！！捏扁！！' (Instructional text, emphatic tone). (4) '全部收好！' (Action description). (5) '吃完就要這麼乾淨！' (Goal-oriented text). (6) '大部分人吃完都這麼亂！' (Comparison text, observational). (7) '整齊乾淨 沒有疊餐碗 這樣空服員收走時 垃圾不會亂飛亂噴，是不是很棒？！' (Explanatory/Summary text, encouraging tone).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Cleaning Demonstration -> Result Comparison -> Final Endorsement

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene starts in a studio with a man wearing an orange mask and an orange shirt sitting next to a woman in a plaid shirt; they are both in front of microphones. (2) A static image of the Mao Gong Ding bronze tripod is shown. (3) The camera cuts to a man in a white t-shirt wearing large white headphones, gesturing with three fingers. (4) Close-up images of three different jade artifacts shaped like cabbages are shown sequentially: a large one with insects, a smaller pale green one, and a flower-vase style one. (5) The people in the studio react with expressive facial movements and laughter as they discuss the size of the artifacts, comparing them to smartphones using hand gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music plays throughout. (2) A male voice explains that many people believe there is only one jadeite cabbage in the National Palace Museum. (3) A second male voice excitedly clarifies that there are actually three, followed by a woman's surprised reaction and loud laughter. (4) The discussion continues with the speakers describing the specific names and origins of the artifacts. (5) Ambient studio sound is clear, punctuated by intentional sound effects like a 'ding' for facts and recorded laughter tracks mixed with live reactions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '很多人以為 故宮的翠玉白菜只有一顆' (Surprised tone). (2) Functional Text: '其實有三顆' (Surprising fact tone). (3) Decorative Text: '故宮三寶只有毛公鼎真的是國寶' (Informative tone). (4) Labels: '第一顆叫做翠玉白菜', '第二顆叫做翠玉小白菜', '第三顆叫做翠玉白菜花插' (Categorical tone). (5) Functional Text: '跟手機大小這樣而已吧' (Descriptive tone). (6) CTA: '完整影片請上 蔡阿嘎543頻道收看' (Prompting tone).

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping guide and fashion recommendation vlog, specifically targeting travelers or fashion enthusiasts visiting Japan. By showcasing diverse brands ranging from casual (BAYFLOW) to functional (THE NORTH FACE Purple Label) and edgy (Schott NYC), the creator highlights specific items' material quality and design to provide viewers with curated shopping options.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of brand names, logo headers, and specific positive attributes of the clothing items.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Enthusiastic Mandarin narration with descriptive keyword bubbles and clear brand-focused headers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video focuses heavily on the 'Purple Label' of The North Face, which is a Japan-exclusive line, adding significant value for tourists interested in unique regional products.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an office setting. A woman with a ponytail and a black-and-white striped sweater is crying at her desk, with cartoon blue tear stickers on her face. A man in a white t-shirt approaches her and starts talking animatedly. (2) A transition occurs to a humorous scene where the man, now wearing a red head guard, interacts with a large cardboard wall being held up. Another man in a red sweatshirt is visible behind the wall. The woman appears wearing red boxing gloves. (3) The man in the white t-shirt is back in the office, holding up two small purple packs of Tempo tissues to the camera, gesturing excitedly. He then demonstrates wiping his face with a tissue. (4) Close-up shots follow, showing the packaging of different products: 'Tempo Protect Mini' wet wipes and 'Tempo Moist Flushable Tissue' with a cat illustration. (5) A demonstration scene shows a piece of moist toilet paper being tossed into a toilet bowl and flushed away. (6) The video returns to the man and woman in the office. He gives her several packs of the products while continuing to talk and joke with her as she smiles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the sound of a woman crying loudly, followed by a man's energetic and slightly mocking voice in Mandarin. (2) Upbeat, fast-paced background music starts and continues throughout the video. (3) Sound effects of 'thudding' occur when the cardboard is hit, accompanied by loud shouting and laughter from multiple people. (4) The man's voice dominates as a narrator/presenter, speaking in a high-pitched, enthusiastic 'sales' tone to describe product features. (5) A clear sound of a toilet flushing is heard mid-video. (6) The audio concludes with playful banter between the man and woman over the fading background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '怎樣啦 又出包' (What's wrong? Messed up again). (2) Functional Text: '對不起~' (Sorry~). (3) Hook Text: '打中間 打中間' (Hit the middle, hit the middle). (4) Functional Text: '腳本還有AB版484' (Is there an AB version of the script?). (5) Decorative/Hook Text: 'Tempo迷你紙手帕 不用再擔心出包啦' (Tempo mini paper handkerchief, no need to worry about messing up anymore - Tone: Encouraging). (6) Hook Text: 'Tempo迷你口袋系列 超方便輕巧好攜帶' (Tempo mini pocket series, super convenient and portable - Tone: Informative). (7) Functional Text: '還有4層厚實設計 就算遇濕也不容易破' (4-layer thick design, doesn't break easily even when wet). (8) Hook Text: 'Tempo迷你口袋系列 抗菌倍護濕紙巾' (Antibacterial protective wet wipes). (9) Functional Text: '不含酒精 還給你99%的保護力' (Alcohol-free, 99% protection). (10) Hook Text: 'Tempo濕式衛生紙 遇水可分解' (Moist toilet paper, water decomposable). (11) Decorative Text: '直接沖到馬桶也沒問題!!' (No problem flushing directly into the toilet!! - Tone: Confident).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro skit -> Product demonstration and feature highlights -> Closing interaction.

It uses a comedic 'problem-solution' narrative where characters face messy or emotional situations in an office and skit setting, positioning the portable Tempo products as the convenient solution for cleaning up and maintaining hygiene.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire second half of the video is dedicated to explaining the features, variety, and benefits of Tempo products with clear brand visibility.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts at Kamogawa Sea World where a large crowd is seated in a stadium. An orca leaps and splashes water, drenching a woman and a child wearing blue raincoats. (2) Transition to a career experience center where two boys are dressing up in uniforms, including pilot and firefighter gear. They are seen using equipment like VR headsets and microphones in a recording studio setup. (3) The scene moves to an outdoor amusement park and outlet mall. A man in a white t-shirt and black hat attempts a ball-toss game and fails, followed by him struggling with a claw machine. The video concludes with the boys making funny faces and reacting to the games.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat background music starts immediately. Sounds of water splashing and a crowd cheering loudly are heard as the orca jumps. A female voice shouts in excitement. (2) The music continues as a transition to indoor dialogue. A male voice narrates playfully while children's voices are heard responding and role-playing. Studio recording effects and mechanical beeps from games are audible. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to an outdoor park with ambient wind and distant chatter. The male host laughs loudly and shouts in a comedic, frustrated tone after failing a game. The music reaches a crescendo and then ends with a short sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '鴨川海洋公園 SeaWorld' (Title). Decorative Text: '大浪攻擊' (Big wave attack) appearing with a splash effect. (2) Functional Text: 'Kandu 兒童職業體驗城' (Kandu Children's Career Experience City). Functional Text: '阿波嚇哭了' (A-Bo is scared to tears), '自己就會穿衣服' (Can dress himself now). (3) Functional Text: '木更津 Kisarapea 樂園' (Kisarazu Kisarapea Park). Hook Text: '全日本最大 OUTLET' (Largest Outlet in Japan). (4) Emotional Text: '綜藝之神降臨啦' (The god of variety shows has descended) used when the host fails at a game.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Sea World) -> Experience (Kids' Center) -> Entertainment (Outlet & Games)

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a pink shirt and white undershirt with headphones sits in a studio environment, speaking into a professional microphone while holding papers. (2) The scene cuts to a person wearing a large, smiling orange mask (Dama style) and a blue patterned shirt, reacting enthusiastically to the speech. (3) The shots alternate between the man in the pink shirt gesturing with his hands and the masked figure. (4) A brief shot shows a young woman with long dark hair in a denim jacket laughing. (5) The video concludes with an end-screen graphic promoting a YouTube channel called '蔡阿嘎543'.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear male voice speaks with a moderate, informative yet casual tone; light upbeat lo-fi background music is audible. (2) Energetic male laughter and a secondary male voice (behind the mask) enter the soundscape. (3) Occasional subtle sound effects like 'dings' are heard for emphasis. (4) The audio concludes with rhythmic upbeat music and group laughter during the channel promotion phase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom center throughout the video, translating the dialogue about Thai laws. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: An '18+' circular sticker appears as a variety-show style overlay when sensitive topics are mentioned. (3) Hook Text: The final frame contains large text saying '完整影片請上 蔡阿嘎543 頻道收看' (Watch the full video on Cai Aga 543 channel) in an informative tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a conversational flow: Intro fact -> Discussion/Reaction -> Humorous conclusion -> Outro.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two young adults outdoors, a man with glasses and a woman with dark hair, looking at rings on their fingers and laughing together. (2) It then shifts to an indoor scene where a young woman in a white t-shirt stands by a refrigerator filled with dragon fruits and vegetables, talking to an older woman in a red shirt who is holding a green sponge gourd. (3) The scene transitions back outdoors to a market-like setting where the same young woman and others are helping an elderly lady in a blue shirt with her bags of groceries. (4) The young woman reacts with big smiles and gestures as she talks with the elderly woman. (5) The video ends with a series of quick reactions from the young woman, showing surprise and laughter during their conversation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy music with a rhythmic beat plays as young people speak excitedly and laugh. (2) The music continues as the dialogue shifts to a conversation between a young woman and an older woman; the younger woman asks questions in a curious tone, while the older woman responds firmly. (3) Background street noise and market sounds are heard as the group interacts with an elderly woman. (4) Distinct sound effects like a surprise 'ting' and cartoonish laughter are added for emphasis. (5) The video concludes with a humorous 'cricket' sound effect during a moment of comedic silence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '怎樣怎樣' (How about it), '上班談戀愛啦' (Dating at work). (2) Decorative Text: '但我喜歡這個情侶' (But I like this couple) with a heart emoji. (3) Functional Text: 'Taco你家不是有在賣那個...絲瓜義大利麵' (Taco, doesn't your family sell that... sponge gourd pasta?). (4) Hook Text: '直接跟食物銀行批貨??' (Directly stocking from the food bank??). (5) Functional Text: '是蘋果絲瓜哦' (It's an apple sponge gourd), '我不會賣給你哦' (I won't sell it to you). (6) Decorative Text: '古錐TACO啦' (Cute Taco).

It uses humor and lighthearted interactions to make social work feel accessible and engaging to a younger audience, while also subtly promoting the 'haha baby' brand through apparel and the host's persona.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man (Cai Aga) and a woman (Er Bo) sitting at a white table, shaking hands enthusiastically with exaggerated facial expressions of joy. (2) Cai Aga begins addressing the camera directly, gesturing widely with his hands, while Er Bo listens and nods beside him. (3) The scene transitions to a series of still photographs showing various university student service teams posing together, each photo accompanied by descriptive text. (4) The hosts return to the screen, clapping their hands and displaying the rewards (scholarships and apparel) while maintaining a high-energy interaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music begins immediately. A male voice speaks in a very high-pitched, excited, and loud tone, with a female voice providing shorter, supportive interjections. (2) The male narrator continues at a high speech density, describing the achievements of different service groups. (3) Sound effects of cheering and clapping are integrated when winners are mentioned. (4) The music maintains its tempo throughout, ending with the hosts speaking in a friendly, conversational manner as the volume fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '恭喜恭喜' (Congratulations) - celebratory hook. (2) '嘎哥連任好里家第二屆理事長' (Aga re-elected as chairman) - decorative text. (3) '入選名單' (Selection list) - functional text. (4) Names of various university clubs like '中國醫藥大學 風浪藥學服務社' - functional text identifying winners. (5) '5萬元的獎助學金' (50,000 TWD scholarship) and '30件的hahababy聯名團服' (30 hahababy uniforms) - functional text detailing prizes.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed announcement with photo slides -> Prize reveal -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action family comedy. It starts with a young boy in patterned pajamas jumping onto a large white sofa and performing a somersault/roll across the cushions in a modern living room. (2) A transition occurs showing an adult man wearing a black t-shirt and olive pants mimicking the exact same jumping and rolling movement on the same sofa, though with significantly more weight and less agility. (3) Two young boys are seen running in a dining area wearing plastic wrap on their heads and goggles, waving their arms excitedly. (4) The man then appears in the same spot with plastic wrap on his head and goggles, imitating their frantic arm-waving and dancing. (5) A boy runs in circles around a low wooden table while counting. (6) The man mimics the action, running around the same table while counting loudly. (7) Two boys are rolling and wrestling on a large modular white sofa. (8) The man mimics the rolling behavior on the sofa alone. (9) The video ends with a brief clip of a white cat looking confused with animated question marks hovering around its head.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music with a fast tempo plays continuously. (2) Vocal activity consists of children's high-pitched laughter, excited shouting, and counting in Mandarin. (3) An adult male voice is heard imitating the children's counting and making exaggerated grunting or laughing sounds. (4) Sound effects (SFX) such as 'boing' sounds for jumps and 'whoosh' sounds for movements are added for comedic effect. (5) The audio ends with a short 'Huh?' vocal sound clip associated with the cat meme.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook Text at the top center throughout the video: 'POV：模仿兒子的謎樣行為' (POV: Mimicking the son's mysterious behaviors), establishing the theme. (2) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the counting ('70, 71, 72...') and speech of the characters. (3) Effect Text: Numbers appearing on screen synchronized with the counting.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: A sequence of side-by-side or alternating comparisons where a child's behavior is shown first, followed by the father's exaggerated imitation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult male (father), 2 young boys (sons).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male in a black t-shirt and khaki/olive pants; two young boys wearing colorful patterned pajamas or t-shirts, sometimes wearing goggles and plastic wrap.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit bedroom where a woman in floral pajamas is sitting on a yellow-covered bed, checking her phone. (2) In a parking garage, a man in a striped shirt stands next to a black electric scooter, gesturing as he talks to the camera; he later puts on a helmet. (3) The couple is seen at the National Palace Museum plaza under a clear blue sky, posing with peace signs. (4) Inside an art gallery, they walk past large paintings and museum labels, specifically looking at Impressionist works from The MET collection. (5) The video concludes with the couple back outside, smiling and talking directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a man's voice waking a woman up, followed by upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM. (2) In the garage, the man's voice has a slight reverb as he explains the rules of their '1st and 15th' date days. (3) Outside, ambient wind noise is audible over their conversation as they arrive at the museum. (4) In the exhibition hall, the environment becomes quiet and reverent, with the man's narration describing the paintings they see. (5) The upbeat music continues to the end as the couple exchanges final playful remarks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '妖起床出門了 快點' (Get up and go out now), setting an energetic tone. (2) Decorative Hook: '老夫妻 · 初一 · 十五小約會 #01' appears as a consistent series title throughout. (3) Functional Text: '從現在開始 每個月的初一 十五 就是我們夫妻的約會日' explaining the recurring tradition. (4) Descriptive Text: Labels for paintings like '梵谷真跡耶!' (It's a real Van Gogh!) and '美國大都會博物館名作展' (The MET Masterpieces Exhibition).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in bedroom -> Concept explanation in garage -> Museum visit and art viewing -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a denim shirt and black pants, stands in a studio environment. She wears large black over-ear headphones and sings into a professional condenser microphone protected by a pop filter. (2) She performs a synchronized dance involving rhythmic stepping, arm crossing, and pointing while maintaining a cheerful expression against a light blue curtain backdrop. (3) The scene transitions to show a man in a black T-shirt in a different room featuring shelves of collectibles; he performs exaggerated, comedic dance moves and facial expressions. (4) The video employs split-screen layouts and rapid cuts between the woman's singing performance and the man's physical comedy. (5) The final shot expands to a wide view of the studio, showing professional camera equipment and a cameraman as the man crouches on the floor looking at the lens.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic instrumental track starts immediately. A female voice begins singing in Mandarin with extremely rapid delivery and a bright, energetic tone. (2) The vocal intensity remains high as the singer navigates complex melodic runs synchronized with the heavy beat. (3) A male voice enters, providing loud, rhythmic shouts and exaggerated vocalizations that match the comedic energy of the music. (4) The singing ends with a sustained high-pitched note, followed by a brief period of the electronic beat before fading into ambient studio sound.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White Traditional Chinese subtitles appear centered at the bottom of the frame, providing the literal lyrics of the song being performed. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Various stylized captions in larger yellow or red fonts appear momentarily, including question marks '(??????)', the phrase 'Act cute', and the name 'Cai Aga'. These emphasize comedic beats and character names.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro singing -> High-energy dance and reaction montage -> Final comedic reveal

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is live-action. A man in denim overalls and a woman in black clothing stand in a home entryway, speaking with exaggerated expressions and gestures. (2) The woman leads the man to various 'artworks' around the house: a pile of laundry on a chair, a dusty corner with hair, and a sink overflowing with dirty baby bottles. Each is presented with a gilded frame graphic. (3) Transition to a product demonstration of the Giaretti baby bottle washer, showing close-ups of the machine's interface, the steaming process, and clean bottles. (4) The man demonstrates the Roborock F25 Ultra vacuum, pushing it across a wooden floor where it emits steam and cleans hair/debris. (5) The couple stands together at the end, the man pointing at the woman's face while she smiles for the final 'artwork' frame.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music plays throughout. A male and a female voice speak in Mandarin and Taiwanese with very excited, humorous, and high-pitched tones. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens inside a traditional temple where a group of four people (two men and two women) are holding incense sticks and performing a bowing prayer ritual. (2) The scene transitions to an outdoor parking lot where two women wearing masks wave and make heart gestures with their hands, soon joined by a man and another woman. (3) Close-up shots show hands organizing food offerings and several printed sheets of paper (likely name lists) on a red table within the temple. (4) A title card appears with red text on a white crumpled paper background. (5) A man with glasses and a mask talks directly to the camera in a parking lot, followed by various members of the group laughing and gesturing excitedly while looking back at the temple or the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice is heard chanting a prayer in Mandarin with a sincere tone; ambient temple sounds and low-volume background music are present. (2) Upbeat, energetic pop music begins as multiple voices cheer and shout 'Yeah!' outdoors. (3) The audio shifts back to the temple environment with the sounds of paper being handled and people discussing the placement of the name lists. (4) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies the title card transition. (5) A fast-paced conversation follows with various speakers (male and female) talking excitedly, laughing, and reacting loudly over a continuous upbeat background track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translating the prayer to the 'Land God' (土地公). (2) Decorative Text: 'Grandpa ❤️ bless us' and 'Please help us in 2025'. (3) Descriptive Text: '(Guidance from a worship veteran)' appearing as a variety-show style note. (4) Transition Text: 'Time fast-forwards to after the year-end party' in red font. (5) Hook Text: 'Sasa's small discovery' and 'Defeating Tsai Wei-chia with magic' at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a before-and-after structure: Intro -> Temple Ritual/Offerings -> Post-event reaction and discussion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with reddish-brown hair in a beige vest and headphones speaks into a microphone in a studio setting, with a coffee cup on the table; the scene alternates to a woman in a red shirt responding. (3) The camera cuts rapidly between the man, the woman in red, and another woman in a plaid shirt as they all erupt into intense laughter, leaning back and covering their mouths.

(2) A second male voice, slightly muffled by a mask, speaks with a confident and punchy delivery. (3) The soundscape is filled with loud, multi-layered group laughter and high-pitched vocal reactions as the speakers exchange jokes about working conditions, with the first male voice shouting emphatically about how tiring the work is.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom, translating the conversation about work choices and brand departments. (2) Variety-show style laughing emojis (😂) appear across the middle of the screen during the laughter phase. (3) Functional text in the end frame prompts viewers to watch the full video on the '蔡阿嘎543' (Tsai Aga 543) channel.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black jacket, beige pants, and professional headphones, stands in a studio setting with teal curtains behind her. She holds a clear water bottle near a professional condenser microphone. (2) She takes a sip of water while looking at the camera. (3) A hand reaches into the frame from the right side, handing her a small bottle of '38度金門高粱酒' (Kinmen Kaoliang Liquor). (4) She accepts the liquor bottle and begins a high-energy singing performance, holding both the water and liquor bottles. (5) Throughout the performance, she uses exaggerated facial expressions, points aggressively at the camera, and dances to the rhythm. (6) In the final segment, she raises her arms and gestures to an imaginary crowd, shouting enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a loud, upbeat rock music intro featuring distorted electric guitars and high-tempo drums. (2) A female vocal enters, singing in a powerful, slightly raspy, and soulful tone in Taiwanese Hokkien. The vocal volume is high, dominating the soundscape. (3) The rock instrumentation remains consistent, maintaining a driving energy throughout the song. (4) In the final seconds, the music continues as the female voice shouts motivational call-outs ('People in the back!', 'Friends on the 3rd floor!') mimicking a live concert atmosphere, followed by a final vocal flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom, translating the song lyrics: '攏細你啦' (It's all you). (2) '攏細你害我來氣心魯命' (You made me so troubled and angry). (3) '你的心 我的心 結結作一伙' (Your heart and mine are tied together). (4) '要討我的愛 好膽你就來' (If you want my love, come if you have the guts). (5) '思念作風颱 心情三溫暖' (Missing you is like a typhoon, emotions alternating between hot and cold). (6) Decorative Text: Near the end, '後面的人' (People in the back) and '三樓的朋友' (Friends on the 3rd floor) appear as she shouts them, emphasizing the live performance vibe.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Setup -> Sudden prop introduction (Liquor) -> High-energy rock cover performance -> Interaction with imaginary audience.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a white oversized t-shirt and white pants stands in a living room with a person wearing a large, cartoonish orange head mask. They are gesturing and talking animatedly. (2) The man brings out a black Prada shopping bag and a jewelry box, opening it to reveal a black hair claw clip. (3) A digital graphic appears showing the product's price on a website. (4) The man, the masked character, and a young boy move through various rooms (bathroom, bedroom) picking up numerous plastic hair clips from different surfaces. (5) A woman in a white dress and denim jacket enters the kitchen area; the man presents her with the Prada clip. She looks surprised and smiles broadly. (6) The group interacts in the kitchen/dining area while the woman examines the gift and the boy plays with balloons.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, quirky, fast-paced electronic background music plays. A high-pitched, energetic male voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin. Occasional interjections from a second male voice. (2) The music continues as the man's voice becomes more dramatic and loud during the product reveal. (3) A 'Ding' sound effect and an 'Oh my god' vocal sample play when the price graphic appears. (4) Fast-paced music continues with sounds of objects being moved and children's laughter. (5) A female voice enters, sounding surprised with 'Huh?' and 'Wow' interjections. (6) Music fades slightly into the background as the male and female voices converse in a humorous, high-energy tone. Sounds of balloons popping or being hit are audible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Mandarin subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large, colorful, stylized captions like '買一堆!!' (Buy a bunch!!), '都亂丟!!' (Throwing them everywhere!!), and '不見' (Disappeared) appear to emphasize emotional points. (3) Product Info: 'Prada天價鯊魚夾' (Prada sky-high priced shark clip) and '要價$23500!!!' appear during the reveal. (4) Counter Text: '(客浴+1)', '(房間床頭+2)' track the number of hair clips found. (5) Outro Hook: '看二伯什麼時候就會不見' (See when Er Bo will lose it) appears at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Problem Setup -> Product Reveal -> Search Montage -> Reaction/Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a white beanie and a black sweatshirt is standing on a sunny street in Australia, talking and gesturing excitedly to the camera while a woman stands next to him. (3) Transitions show various rooms of the house including a laundry room with a sofa, a long hallway, and a cozy outdoor patio with artificial grass and a hanging chair. (4) The man and woman engage in a dialogue-heavy segment in a hallway, where the man teases the woman with playful gestures, ending with them discussing prices inside a bedroom area.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat synthesized pop music plays as a high-pitched male voice and a friendly female voice speak rapidly in Mandarin with an excited tone. (2) The background music remains constant while indoor ambient sounds like footsteps on floorboards and the rustling of clothes are audible as they move through the house. (3) Specific sound effects like 'ding' pings and chime sounds are synchronized with the appearance of on-screen text and jokes. (4) The vocal density remains high as the male speaker continues a rapid-fire commentary until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Chronological subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Room labels like '【廚房】' (Kitchen) and '【洗衣房】' (Laundry Room) appear with stylized borders. (3) Hook Text: Humorous captions such as '(我沒有吃醋)' (I'm not jealous), '追愛' (Chasing love), and '(沒有要放過你^^)' (Not going to let you off) are used to emphasize jokes and emotional reactions.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white t-shirt and grey trousers introduces a 'drone soccer' class while standing in front of a large red inflatable net structure; two other young women stand behind her. (2) The scene shifts to a girl holding a white game controller, looking up as a glowing, spherical cage-enclosed drone flies through a white circular hoop. (3) A montage follows showing various attempts to land the drone in a blue inflatable pit; some drones bounce off the walls while others land successfully. (4) The group of young people, including several males and females, are seen holding controllers and shouting excitedly as multiple drones fly around the indoor gym-like facility. (5) Close-up shots of different individuals reacting with joy, frustration, or focused concentration while operating the drones.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays throughout the video. A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, introducing the drone activity. (2) High-pitched whirring and buzzing sounds of drone motors are frequently heard in the background. (3) Multiple female and male voices are heard cheering, laughing, and shouting phrases like 'Wah!' and 'Yay!' during successful goals. (4) Occasional 'thud' and 'clatter' sounds occur when the drones hit the inflatable structures or the floor.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我們今天要上的是 足球無人機課' (Functional): Introductory text stating they are attending a drone soccer class. (2) 'Taco 全速前進', 'Taco 也進了!' (Decorative/Hook): Variety-show style text highlighting a participant's progress with an excited tone. (3) '\開心/' (Decorative): Emotional stickers representing joy. (4) '降落失敗', '又失敗', '還是失敗...' (Functional): Captions describing the repeated landing failures in a humorous tone. (5) '成功降落!', '耶 搬進球門!' (Hook): Celebrating successes. (6) '失控足球online', '非常的失控' (Hook): Descriptive titles suggesting a chaotic and fun atmosphere.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Game Highlights (Success) -> Game Highlights (Failure) -> Group Reaction/Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a white room where a man in a red sweater and a woman in a blue tracksuit are attempting a 'trust challenge'. The man leans back into the air, while a woman sitting in a chair supports him. They both laugh as they succeed. (2) They switch roles. The woman in blue prepares to lean back while the man sits in the chair. A third woman in a red hoodie records them on her phone. (3) The woman in blue leans back abruptly, but the man catches her with his feet instead of his hands. Her face is pushed directly against his white socks. (4) The woman reacts with a mix of shock and laughter while the screen fades to black and white with sad text overlays. (5) The video ends with a close-up of the man's white socks, which appear to have dirt or stains on them.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic music plays as people talk and laugh loudly. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect plays when the first challenge succeeds. (3) A whistle sound effect signals the start of the second attempt, followed by a drum roll. (4) As the woman falls, a comical 'boing' sound effect is heard, followed by explosive laughter from multiple people. (5) The upbeat music is suddenly replaced by a slow, melancholic piano melody as the video turns black and white. (6) The video concludes with the sound of the woman jokingly complaining about the dirty socks amidst lingering laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '夫妻信任挑戰' (Couple Trust Challenge) appears at the start in a bold, energetic font. (2) '攻守交換' (Switching Roles) appears when they swap positions, serving as a functional transition. (3) '(我是誰我在哪)' (Who am I, where am I?) appears as a humorous, decorative caption during the fall. (4) '這些年來的夫妻情...' (The couple's love all these years...) and '還有什麼信任可言...' (What trust is left...) appear in a stylized, dramatic font to emphasize the mock-sadness. (5) '只好把他的新襪子弄髒' (Had to get his new socks dirty) appears as a final humorous punchline.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Challenge -> Success -> Role Swap -> Comedic Failure -> Close-up Reveal

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a dark night sky showing moving green lights of an aurora borealis; a silhouette of a person is briefly visible. (2) Two people, a man in a tan vest and a green beanie and a woman in a denim jacket, appear in a well-lit night scene pointing excitedly at the sky. (3) A series of scenes shows various angles and colors of the aurora (green, pink, purple) over a landscape with small buildings and stars. (4) The male creator is shown speaking directly into the camera with expressive hand gestures. (5) A montage displays still and moving images of the couple enjoying the aurora, including a shot from inside a transparent dome tent.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Wind noise is prominent, with a male and a female voice speaking in an excited, high-pitched tone; no music is audible. (2) An upbeat, medium-tempo pop music track begins as the male voice speaks enthusiastically. (3) The male voice sings a brief melodic line, while the upbeat music continues in the background. (4) The audio transitions to a slow, sentimental piano and string instrumental piece, and all vocal dialogue stops for the rest of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: "真的成功追到極光!!!" (Successfully caught the aurora!!!) in yellow with a black outline, conveying a triumphant tone. (2) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the first half translating dialogue like "上面有沒有綠綠的" (Is there green on top?) and "雖然等級是大概二、三這樣而已" (Although the level is only about 2 or 3). (3) Decorative Text: "最後欣賞一下我們的極光美照" (Finally, enjoy our beautiful aurora photos) appearing at the start of the montage with a satisfied tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video moves from an immediate reaction of discovery to a detailed commentary, ending with a sentimental visual montage.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a young Asian man in a traditional patterned knit cardigan and hat sitting on public transport next to an older Caucasian man in a brown jacket. (2) The older man notices the younger man's bright rainbow-colored socks and points them out with a smile; he then lifts his own pant leg to reveal plain brown socks, initiating a humorous comparison. (3) A woman in a red jacket, the older man's wife, joins the interaction, laughing and gesturing toward her husband. (4) A young Asian woman is shown interacting with the couple, holding a phone and smiling as they converse. (5) The camera captures various close-up reaction shots of everyone laughing, nodding, and gesturing warmly towards one another throughout the encounter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Background music starts with a light, upbeat acoustic guitar melody; ambient noise of a moving train or bus is audible. (2) An older male voice speaks English with a Scandinavian accent, asking "Do you speak English?"; younger male and female voices respond in English. (3) The soundscape becomes filled with frequent, loud, and genuine laughter from all four individuals. (4) The older man continues to joke about his "poor man" socks and being married for fifty-five years, with his voice remaining friendly and high-spirited. (5) The music continues steadily as the dialogue and laughter create a warm, collaborative acoustic environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Chronological subtitles translate the English conversation including "Do you speak English", "Colorful", "you see my... no color", "can we change", "youtuber", "artist", and "fifty five years". (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Chinese variety-show style captions provide emotional context such as "(I人粉緊張)" indicating social anxiety, "(很熱情 很熱情)" noting the passion of the locals, "(來自妻子的嘲笑)" highlighting the wife's ridicule, and "(好調皮的北北)" describing the playful nature of the grandpa. Tone is consistently humorous and appreciative.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Observation of socks -> Humorous comparison -> Disclosure of identity -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit office corridor. A man in a red sweater and white pants gestures animatedly while talking to a woman in a black jacket who is holding a variety-show style board. (2) The scene shifts to the man inside an airplane, then on a train, looking distressed but quickly transitioning into a montage of him traveling through various Japanese locations. (3) He is seen in a mall looking at a manhole cover plaque, holding up anime-themed lottery tickets in a shop, walking under yellow ginkgo trees, standing in front of the Hanshin Koshien Stadium, trying on clothes in a fitting room, eating ramen and eel rice, holding convenience store snacks, walking past a Kobe beef sign, and finally praying at a Shinto shrine before walking away with a shopping bag.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a conversation in Mandarin between a man and a woman in an office setting. The man's voice is high-pitched and pleading, then becomes loud and insistent. (2) As the scene transitions to the plane, an upbeat, mid-tempo pop song with English vocals and electronic elements begins and remains the primary audio throughout the rest of the video. (3) The music maintains a constant volume while the man's dialogue stops, replaced by the visual montage of travel sounds, though the music is the dominant layer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV：教你如何跟公司請病假' (POV: Teaching you how to ask for sick leave from the company). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Subtitles translate the office argument about leave and then humorously frame various travel activities as 'doctor's orders,' such as 'Doctor said to go see yellow plants' and 'If not enough, use Kobe beef to supplement protein.' (3) Decorative/Effect Text: The video ends with a closing caption '看完醫生好像比較好了... 可以繼續活下去了' (Feeling better after seeing the doctor... can continue living) with crying-laughing emojis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro skit in office -> Quick-cut montage of Japanese travel activities -> Outro prayer at a shrine

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young man in a white T-shirt and a 'The North Face' crossbody bag speaking excitedly to the camera in an airport terminal, holding a green passport. (2) He gestures towards another man who proudly holds up an airline boarding pass with 'FIRST' printed clearly on it. (3) The scene transitions to the interior of a luxury first-class airplane suite where the second man is seen exploring the seat controls, lounging, and laughing with joy. (4) A montage of high-end food service follows, featuring caviar in a silver dish, a thick grilled steak, fluffy pancakes with cream, a creamy pasta dish, and a small gourmet burger. (5) The man is shown tasting each dish with exaggerated expressions of satisfaction, including a comical moment where he pulls a piece of silver foil or paper out of his mouth. (6) A brief shot shows a driver at an airport holding a name sign for 'TSUNG HAN TSAI'. (7) The final sequence returns to the airport where the first man pokes at the second man's noticeably larger belly, and they both laugh at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male vocals in Mandarin dominate the opening, characterized by rapid-fire speech and an excited tone. (2) An upbeat, fast-tempo pop-jazz background music track with prominent piano and drum beats begins. (3) During the airplane scenes, the music continues but is layered with ambient cabin sounds and the sound of silverware clinking against plates. (4) Specific sound effects like a 'ding' and cartoonish pops are used to emphasize text overlays. (5) In the food sequence, there are audible sounds of chewing and 'mmm' expressions of delight. (6) The audio concludes with loud, shared laughter between the two main characters and a final burst of high-tempo music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text provides subtitles for all spoken dialogue. (2) Hook text at the start: '我們是坐商務艙' (We are in business class) and '你以為商務艙就結束了嗎' (You thought business class was it?). (3) Large decorative text labels: '頭等艙' (First Class), '享受頭等艙奢華感中' (Enjoying first-class luxury), and '主食魚子醬' (Main dish caviar). (4) Reaction text: '（幸福死啦）' (Dying of happiness), '幸福的滋味' (Taste of happiness), and '吃到包裝紙' (Ate the wrapping paper). (5) Closing humorous text: '肚子變更凸了' (Belly got bigger) and '15樣!!!' (15 items!!!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Ticket Reveal -> Luxury Cabin Experience -> Food Montage -> Humor/Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man in a yellow cardigan and a red beanie walking on a snowy city street, gesturing excitedly towards a building. (2) The scene shifts to the exterior of a McDonald's with a sign reading 'The Northernmost McDonald's in the World'. (3) Close-up shots of McDonald's postcards and interior signage follow. (4) The main character and a female companion are then seen sitting inside the restaurant, unboxing and examining various food items like burgers and fries. (5) They taste the food, showing exaggerated facial expressions of surprise and analysis. (6) A third man joins them later to taste the fries, and the video concludes with them continuing their review at the table.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited male voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin. (2) Ambient street noise is faintly audible under the music. (3) As the scene moves indoors, the music continues while a female voice joins the conversation, sounding curious and engaged. (4) Sounds of food packaging being opened, chewing, and liquid pouring are heard. (5) A second male voice with a deeper tone appears briefly to offer a critique. (6) The overall audio remains fast-paced with continuous dialogue and persistent BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '來 蔡宗翰' (Come, Cai Zonghan), '這你的點啊' (This is your point). Decorative Hook: '全世界最北邊麥當勞' (The northernmost McDonald's in the world) in bold yellow text. (2) Functional Text: '最北麥當勞明信片 / NT$30' indicating price. Narrative text explaining the history: '這間麥當勞是在去年才變成最北的' (This McDonald's just became the northernmost last year). (3) Functional Text: '麥香魚堡 / NT$450', '地瓜薯條 / 加購價 NT$66', '辣味雞塊 四塊 / NT$170', '雙層牛肉堡 / NT$700'. (4) Effect Text: '(有請薯條大師評鑑)' (Inviting the fries master for evaluation) and '(確實)' (Indeed) used for comedic emphasis.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man and a woman wearing white 'haha baby' T-shirts stand in a parking lot, talking animatedly; the man makes exaggerated sad facial expressions. (2) Transition to South Korea; the woman, now in a grey plaid school uniform, meets a tall, handsome Korean man in a tan uniform jacket and school attire. (3) The pair pose for photos in a studio, then walk together on a busy city street, holding hands; the woman exhibits shy smiles and excited gestures. (4) They stand against a red brick wall where the man performs a 'kabedon' (leaning his arm against the wall close to her face) while looking into her eyes. (5) The woman and several other female friends squeeze into a photo booth with the Korean man, posing with hand hearts and V-signs. (6) The video ends with a POV shot of the man holding out a beverage and smiling warmly toward the camera.

(3) The woman's voice is frequently heard laughing, squealing in excitement, and speaking in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. (4) Occasional Korean phrases are heard from the male companion, mixed with ambient street noises of pedestrians and traffic. (5) The romantic music swells during the wall-lean scene, followed by the sound of a camera shutter effect and group chatter in the photo booth.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a black beanie and a black-and-white striped long-sleeved shirt stands in the middle of a spacious, modern airport terminal. He holds a green passport and a small document, gesturing with them as he speaks animatedly to the camera. His facial expressions shift from curious to conspiratorial. (2) The scene cuts to the man walking down a brightly lit airport corridor. Luxury brand advertisements are visible on the wall behind him. He looks disgruntled and speaks directly into the camera with a frustrated expression while still clutching his passport.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in Mandarin and Hokkien with a high-pitched, energetic, and slightly mocking tone. The background is filled with the ambient hum of a busy airport terminal, including distant chatter and mechanical sounds. (2) After a hard cut, the same male voice continues speaking, but the tone becomes more frustrated and aggressive. The ambient noise shifts to the sound of walking in a quieter, echoing hallway.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "POV：當你以為馬關條約續約" (Hook Text: Humorous premise about the renewal of the Treaty of Shimonoseki). (2) "我現在人在日本關西機場... 現在是12/2" (Functional Text: Establishing location at Kansai Airport and the date). (3) "聽說中共昨天不承認舊金山和約... 所以馬關條約無條件強制續約？" (Functional Text: Explaining the satirical political logic). (4) "我等一下實測過海關... 我就走日本人的通道 看他會不會讓我過？" (Functional Text: Describing the intended experiment). (5) "淦 不行啊" (Decorative Text: Expressing frustration at the failure of the experiment). (6) "習近平唬爛洨" (Decorative Text: Aggressive satirical punchline targeting a political figure).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hypothesis -> Failed Result/Reaction

(2) Frequent sounds of group laughter and female voices reacting with 'so beautiful' or laughter. (3) Comedic sound effects (SFX) like bells, whistles, and cartoonish 'boing' sounds are inserted after jokes. (4) The audio transitions quickly between different scenes, maintaining a high-energy and chaotic soundscape. (5) In the final phase, there's a mix of shouting and collective laughter as a prank or funny makeup is revealed.

(5) '這公司容不下任何一個男生' (This company can't accommodate any more men) - recurring humorous caption. (6) '好美哦' (So beautiful) - decorative text echoing the dialogue. (7) '去洗掉!!' perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an indoor office/studio setting. A woman in a red and white striped sweater speaks to a man wearing a white floral cardigan. (2) Two other female voices chime in asking for 8 months and 10 months respectively. Ambient studio silence is replaced by a fast-paced pop music track with a strong electronic beat. (3) The music "Overdrive" plays prominently during a posing montage. (4) A male voice suddenly yells loudly "夠了! 現在! 現在!" (Enough! Now! Now!) in an exaggeratedly angry and humorous tone, cutting through the music briefly before the track continues and fades.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a parking lot with a group of people wearing matching 'haha baby RUN' t-shirts and bibs; Tsai A-ga (main creator) speaks excitedly to the camera while holding his bib #00001. (2) A blonde man in sunglasses (acting as a coach) gives instructions, leading to humorous interactions and laughter among the group members. (3) The group performs a warm-up dance routine with various exaggerated movements and hand-clapping. (4) The scene transitions to a roadside near a large Ferris wheel where different groups (7K and 3.5K) are shown running or walking; Tsai A-ga runs down a hill with a water bottle, shouting playfully.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately; a high-pitched, excited male voice (Tsai A-ga) introduces the road run event dates and location. (2) The music continues as a second male voice with a humorous, steady tone (the coach) explains running techniques, interspersed with loud laughter and chatter from several females. (3) Rhythmic counting and group shouting occur during the warm-up sequence, synced with the beat of the music. (4) The soundscape becomes more wind-heavy as the location moves outdoors for the run; the main male voice provides energetic commentary and a final loud shout at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Dec 20th, 21st' (12月20號、21號), 'haha baby 2nd Road Run' (hahababy的第二屆路跑). Tone: Informative and enthusiastic. (2) Decorative Text: 'Coach is so bad' (這教練好爛喔), 'Truth: No money = this kind of coach' (大實話: 阿你沒花錢只能請這種的). Tone: Humorous and mocking. (3) Functional Labels: '7K Group', '3.5K Group', '3.5K Walking Group' (3.5K組散步組). Tone: Neutral. (4) Hook Text: 'Year-end bonus might be increased' (年終好像會加碼). Tone: Playful and enticing.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Event introduction -> Humorous group warm-up -> Multi-group running execution.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in an indoor hallway where a man in a white t-shirt and maroon pants and a woman in a grey top and patterned pants are standing. The man rotates his right arm rapidly while the woman prepares to slap him. She successfully slaps him across the cheek, and they both laugh. (2) A title card 'Round 2' appears. The man attempts the same motion, but the woman grazes him gently. They exchange dialogue and gestures of amusement. (3) 'Round 3' appears. The man rotates both arms simultaneously. The woman slaps him forcefully, causing her to fall to the floor in laughter/mock pain. The man approaches the camera with a surprised and humorous expression, and the scene ends with the two of them laughing together on the floor.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music starts immediately. A male voice explains an internet experiment about hand speed in Mandarin. A clear 'thwack' sound effect is heard when the woman slaps the man, followed by loud, genuine laughter from both. (2) The music continues as the man and woman discuss the previous attempt. In 'Round 2', the vocal tone is playful and lighthearted. (3) Before the third attempt, a heartbeat sound effect builds tension. A much louder 'slap' sound is heard. The woman screams 'It hurts!' in a humorous tone while laughing hysterically. The man jokes about the sound quality for the microphone. The video ends with a comedic jingle.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '網路實驗 手轉很快不會被打到' (Internet experiment: rotating hands fast won't get hit). Tone: Informative/Hook. (2) Decorative Text: '反擊成功!!!' (Counterattack successful!!!). Tone: Exciting. (3) Functional Text: 'Round 2' and 'Round 3' to mark sections. (4) Variety Captions: '(擦到而已!!)' (Just a graze!!), '(闆娘超溫柔)' (Boss lady is so gentle), '很痛欸' (It really hurts), '我怕收音收不到啊' (I was afraid the mic wouldn't pick it up). Tone: Humorous and commentary-style.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Round 1 Attempt -> Round 2 Attempt -> Round 3 Attempt -> Comedic Conclusion

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in an indoor office-like setting filled with collectibles. A man in a blue hoodie hands a cardboard box to another man in a white jacket decorated with colorful patterns. They engage in an animated conversation. (2) The man in the blue hoodie attempts to use his smartphone but gestures that it is out of battery. The man in the white jacket produces a small white device (portable charger) and connects it to the blue hoodie man's phone. (3) The scene transitions to a series of product close-ups showing the white portable charger (labeled FunCube MINI 2) being plugged into various phones, demonstrating its folding stand, and charging an Apple Watch. (4) The man in the white jacket then presents another model, a longer, bar-shaped charger (FunCube BAR) featuring customized graphics of faces. (5) Hand-held shots demonstrate the 'BAR' model plugged into a wall outlet while simultaneously charging two phones. (6) The video concludes with the man in the white jacket standing in front of several product variants, gesturing energetically towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music with a light electronic feel starts immediately. Two male voices are heard talking excitedly in Mandarin and Taiwanese dialect. (2) Sound effects such as 'ding' and 'ping' are added as text overlays appear. The primary speaker's tone is very energetic and persuasive. (3) During the product demonstration, the music continues while a clear, professional-sounding voiceover (the man in the white jacket) explains the specific technical features of the chargers. (4) In the final segment, the two men laugh together, and the music swells slightly before fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text includes full-sentence subtitles in Traditional Chinese at the bottom. (2) Hook and descriptive text appear frequently: '手機也沒電了...' (Phone is out of battery), 'FunCube MINI 2' (Product Name), '22.5W 急速快充' (22.5W Fast Charge), 'Apple Watch 無線充' (Apple Watch Wireless Charging). (3) The final text '嘎哥優惠團購中' (Gage's discount group buy in progress) serves as a call to action with a celebratory tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Comedy Skit -> Product Feature Showcase -> Group Buy CTA

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action studio recording. A woman with long reddish-brown hair in a black hoodie sits at a table with a large microphone, laughing while recounting a story. (2) The scene cuts to another woman with long dark hair wearing a beige fuzzy sweater who is laughing intensely. (3) A man with reddish hair and a black-and-white patterned sweater, wearing white headphones, gestures wildly and speaks loudly into a microphone. (4) Rapid cuts alternate between the three individuals as they engage in a lively conversation. (5) A brief insert shot at 0:41 shows a person wearing an orange character mask. (6) The video concludes with a man sitting in the studio and then transitions to a static outro screen with social media information.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A woman's voice begins with an upbeat and slightly embarrassed tone, describing a past job offer. (2) Frequent, high-pitched collective laughter from multiple people fills the audio. (3) A man's voice enters, sounding loud and boisterous, mimicking a drunken state. (4) Upbeat, fast-paced background music plays throughout, occasionally accented by comedic sound effects and laughter tracks. (5) The voices remain high-energy and conversational until the very end where the music fades during the outro.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom center throughout the video, translating the spoken dialogue about joining 'hahababy'. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Captions like '(這樣隨和的嗎XD)' and '沒有醉!!!' appear to highlight comedic moments and emphasize the speakers' emotions. (3) Outro Text: Lists social media handles and channel names for '蔡阿嘎543'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro anecdote -> Group reaction/laughter -> Host clarification/re-enactment -> Outro

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man and two women sitting on a yoga mat in a room filled with toy shelves, watching a split-screen video of a flexibility challenge. (2) The man and one woman attempt to stand up together by holding hands while sitting face-to-face; they fail and fall back laughing, then try a second time with more effort but still fail. (3) A different woman in a cream-colored outfit replaces the first one and tries the challenge with the man; they struggle with funny facial expressions and dramatic movements. (4) In a bonus round, two men attempt the same movement, resulting in a chaotic and humorous physical tangle on the floor. (5) The video ends with a montage of the participants laughing and a still photo of two men.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music starts immediately with the man's loud, enthusiastic voice-over introducing the challenge. (2) As the participants attempt the movements, there are frequent cartoonish sound effects like 'boing' and 'crash' accompanying their falls. (3) A brief snippet of a sentimental, romantic pop song plays during a slow-motion hug after a failed attempt. (4) The audio is filled with loud laughter, rhythmic counting (1, 2, 3), and shouting in Mandarin. (5) The music reaches a peak during the final chaotic 'bonus' attempt with multiple voices laughing and talking simultaneously.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '雙人動作挑戰 請注意安全!' - Hook text at the top indicating a two-person action challenge with a safety warning. (2) 'ROUND 1', 'ROUND 2' - Functional text marking the attempt numbers. (3) '很簡單啊' (Very simple) - Decorative text appearing when the man is confident. (4) '發現體重不平均...' (Discovered weight is uneven...) - Commentary text explaining their failure. (5) '男上加男' (Man on man) - Punny variety-style caption during the all-male round. (6) '果然是真愛!!!' (As expected, it's true love!!!) - Final emotional hook text over a photo.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Failed attempts with first partner -> Successful/funny attempts with second partner -> Chaotic bonus round.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen layout showing a reference video at the top and the main creators watching it on a phone in the foreground. (2) The main male creator (white shirt, maroon pants) attempts to lift a woman (striped shirt) from a yoga mat by her hips, but she falls forward, and they both laugh. (3) A different man in a green sweater tries to lift a woman in white, straining his face and failing as she falls back to the mat. (4) A woman in a beige sweater attempts the lift on the woman in stripes, managing a partial lift before they both collapse in laughter. (5) The main male creator tries again, successfully lifting the woman in stripes straight up; he holds the pose and then celebrates with a flexed-arm victory pose.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, fast-paced upbeat music begins with immediate loud laughter and excited shouting in Mandarin. (2) A man's voice is heard counting '1, 2, 3' followed by the sound of a dull 'thud' and more collective laughter. (3) The music pauses briefly for a comedic effect during a fail, then resumes with cartoon-like sound effects (SFX) as people fall. (4) The audio ends with a triumphant orchestral fanfare and cheering as the successful lift is completed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '很簡單啊!?' (It's very simple!?) in yellow bold font. (2) Functional Text: '挑戰倒數3秒' (Challenge countdown 3 seconds) at the bottom. (3) Decorative Text: '要成功了嗎!!!' (Going to succeed!!!) and 'Boom!!!' in red following a fall. (4) Descriptive Text: '雪恥再戰!!!' (Revenge battle!!!) and names like '蔡宗翰' appearing on screen. (5) Closing Text: '防護措施要做好!!!' (Make sure to have safety measures!!!) appearing over a black background.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Failed attempts montage -> Final successful attempt -> Outro/Warning

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a colorful jacket and a woman in a brown sweatshirt stand in an outdoor parking lot with a massive blue and white Ferris wheel in the background. They are gesturing excitedly toward the camera. (2) The scene transitions to the inside of a shopping mall where a large, colorful exhibition entrance for '2UNGLE 10th Anniversary' is visible. The woman poses in front of it. (3) They explore various themed zones: a wall of retro television sets, a 'Time Corridor' featuring illustrated timelines and screens showing past videos, and a playful indoor street scene with a zebra crossing and oversized smiley face props. (4) The duo stands before a white-clothed object, which they pull away to reveal a cartoon-style statue of the female character (Er Bo). (5) The camera shows a series of product shots featuring mugs, bags, and stickers with brand illustrations. (6) The video concludes with a rapid-fire montage of the pair posing at various photo spots within the exhibition.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat synth-pop background music plays throughout. A male voice with an enthusiastic, loud tone begins speaking immediately, joined by a cheerful female voice. (2) Sound effects like 'sparkle' chimes and applause are heard during transitions and the statue reveal. (3) The ambient sound of a busy shopping mall is occasionally audible beneath the voices and BGM. (4) The music tempo remains consistent and fast-paced until the final montage where it ends on a bright chord.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue regarding the 10th-anniversary exhibition. (2) Hook text: '二伯十周年展 正式開幕' (Er Bo 10th Anniversary Exhibition Grand Opening) appears in bold yellow and black. (3) Informational text: '台中麗寶樂園' (Taichung Lihpao Resort) and '免費參觀' (Free Entry) mark the location and cost. (4) Zone titles: '復古電視區' (Retro TV Zone), '時光走廊區' (Time Corridor Zone) appear as variety-show style headers. (5) Promotional text: '十周年限量紀念商品' (10th Anniversary Limited Commemorative Goods) highlights the merch section.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at landmark -> Guided tour of exhibition zones -> Product showcase -> Closing montage

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two men are arguing and shoving each other on a wooden deck next to a pond. One man accidentally knocks a keychain from the other's hand into the water. (2) A woman dressed in white with a tinsel crown (the Goddess) emerges from the pond with bubbles surrounding her. (3) The Goddess holds a treasure chest and presents various colorful monster-like keychains to the first man. He points and describes his lost item. (4) The Goddess smiles and presents a large retail box of keychains. The man is overjoyed and starts unboxing them, showing gold-colored monster keychains to the camera. (5) The second man, seeing the reward, intentionally tosses his own item into the pond. The Goddess reappears, but this time she looks apologetic, and the man is left empty-handed and distraught. (6) The video ends with a shot of four different monster keychains lined up on a wooden rail.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Loud, aggressive shouting between two male voices, followed by a clear splashing sound. (2) A transition to a magical, bubbling sound effect with a shimmering chime as the female voice enters. (3) The female voice speaks in a calm, gentle, and rhythmic tone. The first male voice responds with high-pitched excitement. (4) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music begins as they discuss the product. (5) Another splash sound is heard, followed by a repeat of the bubbling sound effect. (6) The female voice speaks again, sounding slightly more informational, followed by a final comedic 'boing' or sad sound effect as the second male realizes he won't get anything.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '鑰匙圈飛出' (Keychain flies out) and '(掉進河裡了...)' (Fell into the river...) explaining the action. (2) Hook Text: '你推屁推啊!!' '那很貴欸!!' capturing the argument's intensity. (3) Functional Text: '(河中女神出場音效)' (Goddess of the river entrance sound effect). (4) Decorative Text: '忍者龜牙寶' (Ninja Turtle Tooth Baby?) and '放克牙寶鑰匙圈 S3金派系列' (Fuggler Keychain S3 Gold Party Series) used for product branding. (5) Functional Text: '12月26號可以到全家去購買' (Can be purchased at FamilyMart on December 26) acting as a Call to Action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a classic fable structure: Conflict -> Magical Intervention -> Reward for Honesty -> Attempted Greed -> Punishment/Lesson.
