perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a man in a white t-shirt wearing professional over-ear headphones, speaking into a black studio microphone with expressive facial movements. (2) The scene cuts to a second man sitting in a red armchair, wearing a large, oversized cartoon mask with a permanent grin and exaggerated features. (3) A third shot reveals a woman in a light blue long-sleeved shirt sitting on a brown sofa, holding a patterned pillow and reacting to the conversation. (4) The visual flow continues with rapid cuts between these three individuals as they engage in a lively discussion, frequently using hand gestures to emphasize their points. (5) Floating clapping hand icons appear on the screen during a moment of laughter and agreement. (6) The video concludes with a transition to a graphic screen showing channel information.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched and energetic male voice leads the audio, discussing 'holiday bonuses' and a card game called 'Shoot the Dragon Gate' (射龍門). (2) A second, slightly deeper male voice and a soft-toned female voice respond in turn, creating a dynamic multi-person conversation. (3) There is no background music throughout the primary dialogue, leaving a 'studio quiet' acoustic environment focused on vocal clarity. (4) Studio-added sound effects (SFX) of clapping and cheers are introduced around the middle mark to punctuate the discussion. (5) The recording ends with a brief, upbeat musical sting and a shared laughter track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Full functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom center of the frame, translating the spoken dialogue about betting and card games. (2) Decorative variety-show style text like '慘敗???' (Crushing defeat???) appears in larger, colorful fonts to highlight emotional reactions. (3) Final instructional text (3) '完整影片請上蔡阿嘎543頻道收看' (Watch the full video on Cai Aga 543 channel) serves as a call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video maintains a constant talking-head pace, alternating between the three speakers to build a conversational rhythm.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a live-action video. A male and a female character stand in a brightly lit mall corridor in front of a colorful 'Photo Booth' structure, gesturing enthusiastically to the camera. (2) The scene cuts rapidly between shots of various merchandise: acrylic keychains, plush toys, and printed stickers. (3) The characters interact with a digital photo booth screen, showing the results of their photos. (4) Close-up shots demonstrate a small CD-shaped keychain being tapped against a smartphone, which then displays a YouTube video. (5) The duo presents more items including phone cases, canned drinks, folders, and a large colorful umbrella. (6) A hand holds a pink lucky charm in front of large character statues as if performing a blessing ritual. (7) The video ends with the pair waving towards the camera in front of the store display.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music with a steady drum beat begins immediately. A male voice speaks with high energy and a friendly tone. (2) A female voice enters, alternating with the male voice in a fast-paced conversation; they sound excited and humorous. (3) Occasional cartoonish sound effects (pings, chimes, and 'wa' noises) are heard during product reveals. (4) The music remains continuous throughout the main segment but shifts to a slightly more jaunty, quirky track during the final instructional charm sequence. (5) Ambient mall background noise is minimal, muffled by the studio-quality vocal recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我們二伯在台中麗寶的十週年展' (Our Erbo's 10th Anniversary Exhibition in Taichung Lihpao) - Hook text. (2) '馬上帶大家來開箱' (Taking everyone to unbox right away) - Functional. (3) '十週年拍貼機' (10th Anniversary Photo Booth) - Functional. (4) '還有CD吊飾' (Also CD keychains) - Functional. (5) 'NFC感應CD吊飾' (NFC sensor CD keychain) - Functional. (6) '直接幫我導流量' (Directly helps me drive traffic) - Hook/Humorous. (7) '只要599!!' (Only 599!!) - Promotional hook. (8) '免費入場' (Free admission) - Promotional hook. (9) '千億御守購前說明' (Pre-purchase instruction for Qianyi charm) - Functional title.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a beige jumpsuit, orange helmet, and safety harness is seen ziplining over a lush green forest and a lake. A circular inset shows a close-up of his face, which shifts from intense focus to a joyful smile. (2) The scene cuts to the man sitting on a wooden platform beside a young boy. He holds a smartphone in a clear waterproof pouch and shows the camera that his hand is shaking. (3) A woman in an orange safety jumpsuit and white helmet is seen being secured to the zipline by a staff member; she looks nervous but is laughing. (4) The zipline sequence begins with a split-screen view showing both the man's POV and a side view of him descending. He overtakes another person on a parallel line. (5) The video concludes with shots of the landing area and a final close-up of the man's excited expression as he reaches the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music and a male voice speaking in an excited, slightly breathless tone. (2) As the man sits on the platform, the BGM continues at a lower volume, layered with ambient wind noise and the man's conversational dialogue with a child. (3) During the ziplining sequence, loud wind noise and the mechanical whirring of the pulley on the cable become dominant. There are multiple instances of loud, high-pitched shouting and laughter from both a male and a female voice. (4) The music swells towards the end, coinciding with celebratory exclamations from the speaker as he finishes the ride.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '腳超麻的!!' (My legs are super numb!!) - Emotional hook. (2) '高空滑索' (High-altitude zipline) - Functional description. (3) '(劇高嘎抗拒中)' (Resisting due to severe fear of heights) - Humorous effect text. (4) '貴你敢嗎?' (Gui, do you dare?) - Functional question to the child. (5) '勇者' (Brave man) - Decorative label. (6) '為了拍攝都可以 創作者之魂' (Anything for filming, the soul of a creator) - Hook text. (7) '肉眼可見的害怕' (Visible fear) - Humorous observation. (8) '準備出發 3 2 1 GO' - Functional countdown. (9) '翰直接超車' (Han directly overtakes) - Narrative text. (10) '克服恐懼!!' (Overcome fear!!) - Concluding motivational hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Preparation and Fear -> Action/Ziplining Descent -> Celebration

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses split-screens and facial inserts to capture the simultaneous POV and the emotional reaction of the creator, which is a common technique in high-engagement travel vlogs.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a skit where two men in red tops are looking at a smartphone; the man with brown hair and glasses seems dismissive of the content on the phone. (2) Suddenly, the scene shifts to a high-energy dance sequence featuring the man in the red cardigan, a woman in a red track jacket, and several performers in large 'God of Wealth' mascot costumes. (3) The main character demonstrates the use of a purple SupaMop and bucket while dancing synchronously with the mascots. (4) Close-up shots show collaborative product packaging featuring 'SupaMop' and the 'Kuai Kuai' snack brand. (5) The final segment features the main character standing in front of stacks of product boxes, gesturing excitedly while speaking directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with casual male dialogue between two speakers over a quiet room background. (2) An upbeat, fast-tempo pop music track with festive electronic arrangements begins. (3) A male vocalist (the main character) sings lyrics about luck, wealth, and the 'SupaMop' product. (4) Sound effects of the mop spinning in the bucket are audible over the music. (5) The music continues at a lower volume while the main character delivers a fast-paced promotional speech about prizes and website links, ending with a collective cheer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Dialogue subtitles translate the opening skit into Traditional Chinese. (2) Large, stylized lyrics appear on screen in red and white fonts, emphasizing key phrases like 'Good luck' and 'SupaMop'. (3) Functional text overlays describe product features such as 'Clean/Dirty water separation' and 'Triangular mop head'. (4) Promotional text lists prizes including 'iPhone 17 Pro' and 'Dyson Air Purifier'. (5) Closing text provides instructions to 'Log in receipts' and a call to action to visit the Instagram bio link.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Skit Intro -> Musical Product Performance -> Direct Promotional Appeal

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 1 female lead, 1 male support, and 5 mascot performers.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male influencer with reddish-brown hair and glasses, wearing a white shirt under a red knitted cardigan and white textured cargo pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initially a minimalist living room with a pink sofa; later shifts to a brightly lit studio filled with product boxes, festive Lunar New Year decorations, and a green curtain.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut from dialogue to music

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Musical Performance -> Feature Demo -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a cross-brand collaboration between SupaMop and the snack brand Kuai Kuai. It uses a festive Lunar New Year theme to market a specific mop product and a concurrent lucky draw campaign offering high-value prizes like iPhones and Dyson products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, verbal promotion of brand names, and display of specific marketing slogans and prize information.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The high-speed comedic delivery and over-the-top expressive style characteristic of influencer Cai Aga.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes traditional Taiwanese cultural symbols (God of Wealth, Kuai Kuai snacks) to create a sense of nostalgia and festivity, which is then pivoted into a modern commercial promotion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a medium shot of a man with brown hair wearing a black oversized t-shirt against a plain white wall, maintaining a solemn and sorrowful facial expression. (2) He bows deeply at 0:13, 0:37, and 1:10, a traditional gesture of apology. (3) Throughout the video, his hands move from being clasped in front to gesturing for emphasis, including pointing at himself and placing a hand over his heart. (4) Starting around 0:54, multiple news headlines and social media screenshots are overlayed on the screen while the man remains in the background. (5) The video concludes with the man standing still, continuing his speech with intense facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in a grave, formal, and rhythmic tone, mimicking the style of a public apology or a legal statement. (2) There is no background music, creating a 'studio quiet' acoustic environment that highlights the clarity of the vocals. (3) The audio is composed of fragmented edits where sentences are clipped together, resulting in a fast-paced but staccato vocal delivery. (4) No ambient noise or significant sound effects are detected beyond the clean studio recording of the speech.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text at the top: 'POV : 蔡小嘎的莫名道歉聲明' (POV: Tsai Aga's inexplicable apology statement), setting a satirical context. (2) Functional Text: White subtitles appear chronologically at the bottom translating the spoken words, such as '本人 蔡緯嘉' (Myself, Tsai Wei-chia) and '對不起' (I'm sorry). (3) Content/Tone: The text records a series of increasingly absurd associations for which he is 'apologizing,' maintaining a serious linguistic register despite the nonsensical content.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a constant talking-head format with frequent jump cuts and occasional text/graphic overlays.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tsai Aga) appears throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man with short brown hair wearing a black oversized t-shirt with 'AVIREX' printed on the collar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, minimalist white wall with no decorations, typical of a home studio or office setting.

vocal_qualities.tone: Solemn and professional, yet satirically exaggerated.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> List of Absurd Apologies -> Final Bow.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a satirical parody of public apology videos commonly released by influencers. It mocks the trend where public figures are forced to apologize for tangential or distant connections to scandals (in this case, an employee's relative's relative), highlighting the absurdity of guilt by association in online culture.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The content is a comedic skit focused on social commentary rather than product promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tsai Aga's signature deadpan delivery and his self-mocking 'aka Chiayi Yamashita Tomohisa' title.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes actual news screenshots to ground the satire in real-world media trends in Taiwan.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman kneeling on the floor of a bedroom, sifting through a white cabinet filled with books and binders. (2) She pulls out a folder of award certificates and shows them to the camera with a playful expression. (3) She transitions to a brown box filled with old journals and letters, flipping through them while laughing. (4) She reaches into a large black bag and pulls out a heavy, dusty black photo album, which is revealed to be a wedding album. (5) Finally, she opens the drawer of a wooden desk and finds items belonging to the person filming, sparking a humorous exchange.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music plays throughout. A female voice (on-screen) and a male voice (off-screen) engage in energetic, humorous dialogue in Mandarin and Hokkien. (2) The sounds of rustling paper and drawers opening are layered over the voices. (3) Electronic bleep sound effects are used twice to censor specific spoken content. (4) The audio maintains a high-energy, comedic tone with frequent laughter from both speakers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Static top banner: '北港舊家斷捨離' (Decluttering old home in Beigang) and '挖出歷任前男友情書!!!' (Digging out love letters from ex-boyfriends!!!) in Traditional Chinese. (2) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom, providing a transcription of the dialogue in a casual, variety-show font. (3) Decorative/Hook text: '想毀屍滅跡喔' (Trying to destroy the evidence), '1 2 3', and '不要太恥了' (Don't be too ashamed) appear to emphasize punchlines.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Discovery of old items (awards, letters, album) -> Finding cameraman's items (Ending).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character on screen; the male is heard but stays off-camera except for possibly a hand/arm.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a comedic lifestyle vlog documenting the nostalgic and often embarrassing process of decluttering an old home. It leverages the relatable experience of finding 'relics' from past relationships to create a humorous dynamic between the couple.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: None

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of Traditional Chinese subtitles with variety-show style commentary; code-switching between Mandarin and Hokkien.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video captures a popular 'decluttering' (斷捨離) trend, focusing on the emotional and comedic value of old personal items.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair, wearing a pink t-shirt and a yellow/orange vest, stands in a brightly lit hallway, speaking excitedly to the camera. (2) He jumps and cheers with two women, one in a pink hoodie and another in a dark teal hoodie, in a celebratory manner. (3) The scene transitions to the interior of a modern apartment, showing a large entryway with beige cabinets and a dark brown door. (4) The tour continues into a spacious living room with a large, white L-shaped sofa, a round coffee table, and a wall-mounted TV. Two women sit on the sofa talking. (5) The camera moves to a bedroom featuring a large bed with a white mattress and a unique orange-red curtain. A small, mushroom-shaped lamp is shown glowing on the wall. (6) The video concludes with shots of the ceiling, highlighting a cloud-like lighting fixture and recessed lighting, while the main characters point and discuss the design.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male vocals shouting an introduction with upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM in the background. (2) Sound of group cheering, clapping, and laughter as the music continues at a consistent volume. (3) The BGM volume lowers slightly as a conversation between a male and two female voices begins, describing the house layout. (4) Occasional 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects (SFX) occur simultaneously with the appearance of text on screen. (5) Ambient indoor noise is minimal, suggesting a quiet room or high-quality recording equipment. (6) The video ends with a mix of laughter and a final high-pitched remark from a female speaker.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text: '我們今天要來恭喜我們的 hahababy 的總監 羅小姐 正式加入我們的 房貸少年團 耶' appearing as subtitles. (2) Functional text: '23、24坪' indicating the apartment size. (3) Decorative/Hook text: '超大的玄關', '寬敞的客廳', '300多公分的沙發' highlighting features with an enthusiastic tone. (4) Hook text: '(偷抱怨?)' and '豬肝紅?' expressing humorous or questioning tones. (5) Decorative text: '很有設計感的天花板' and '(潔癖人會注意的)' adding variety-show style commentary.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Celebration -> Entryway Tour -> Living Room Tour -> Bedroom Tour -> Design Details

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a group of five people sitting on a pink sofa in a studio setting; a woman in a pink tweed jacket and a man in a black high-collar shirt are in the foreground, while three others sit behind them. (2) The man introduces the woman with energetic hand gestures, and the group claps as she waves and smiles. (3) The woman speaks to the camera, gesturing with a long grey foam tube, while the man reacts with exaggerated facial expressions of surprise and excitement. (4) Transitions between the woman explaining a course and the man's enthusiastic responses occur frequently. (5) The video concludes with the woman making a joke, causing the group to laugh, followed by a final screen with large white text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo background music starts immediately along with the sound of enthusiastic clapping and cheering. (2) A male voice enters with a high-pitched, excited tone introducing the guest. (3) A female voice takes over, speaking clearly and professionally but with a friendly, humorous undertone. (4) Periodic bursts of group laughter and 'ooh' sounds from the background crowd are heard in response to the dialogue. (5) The music continues throughout, punctuated by a sharp comedic sound effect at the very end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Standard white subtitles throughout translating the spoken Mandarin. (2) Decorative Text: '職場救星' (Workplace Savior) appears in yellow with a halo effect. (3) Hook Text: '想要賺錢的聽我的就對了' (If you want to make money, just listen to me) appears in large bold white font. (4) Content Text: '5週職場翻盤' (5-Week Workplace Turnaround) lists course details and price ranges from 30,000 to 30,000,000. (5) Punchline Text: '投胎' (Reincarnation) appears as massive white characters at the end for comedic emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with clapping -> Course introduction and benefits -> Comedic dialogue -> Punchline and laughter.
